Specifically, to overcome poor generalization across varying expressway environments, we introduce an online Bayesian inference module. This module continuously evaluates vehicle trajectories to dynamically update the probabilistic boundaries of normal driving behaviors, serving as an asynchronous trigger to precisely localize anomalies in space and time. Instead of processing the continuous video stream, the VLM processes only the localized visual regions indicated by the trigger. This targeted visual input prevents attention dilution and enables accurate semantic reasoning. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that VIBES improves detection accuracy for far-field anomalies and reduces computational overhead, achieving high real-time efficiency and explainability while demonstrating generalization across diverse expressway conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VIBES框架，利用贝叶斯推理引导VLM聚焦局部区域，实现高效远场异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 高速监控视频中远场目标异常行为检测至关重要，但现有VLM处理全局帧导致注意力稀释和计算成本高昂，且难以泛化到多样场景。
light_analysis.method: VIBES采用异步协作框架，通过在线贝叶斯推理模块持续评估车辆轨迹，动态更新正常驾驶行为的概率边界，作为异步触发信号精确定位时空异常，仅触发VLM处理局部区域，避免注意力稀释。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，VIBES显著提升远场异常检测精度，降低计算开销，实现高实时性和可解释性，并在多种高速条件下展示强泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIBES通过异步协作和贝叶斯推理引导，有效解决了VLM在远场异常检测中的注意力稀释和计算效率问题，为高速监控提供高精度、高效率且可解释的解决方案，未来可扩展至其他视频分析任务。

title: AIPsy-Affect: A Keyword-Free Clinical Stimulus Battery for Mechanistic Interpretability of Emotion in Language Models
abstract: Mechanistic interpretability research on emotion in large language models -- linear probing, activation patching, sparse autoencoder (SAE) feature analysis, causal ablation, steering vector extraction -- depends on stimuli that contain the words for the emotions they test. When a probe fires on "I am furious", it is unclear whether the model has detected anger or detected the word "furious". The two readings have very different consequences for every downstream claim about emotion circuits, features, and interventions. We release AIPsy-Affect, a 480-item clinical stimulus battery that removes the confound at the stimulus level: 192 keyword-free vignettes evoking each of Plutchik's eight primary emotions through narrative situation alone, 192 matched neutral controls that share characters, setting, length, and surface structure with the affect surgically removed, plus moderate-intensity and discriminant-validity splits. The matched-pair structure supports linear probing, activation patching, SAE feature analysis, causal ablation, and steering vector extraction under a strong methodological guarantee: any internal representation that distinguishes a clinical item from its matched neutral cannot be doing so on the basis of emotion-keyword presence. A three-method NLP defense battery -- bag-of-words sentiment, an emotion-category lexicon, and a contextual transformer classifier -- confirms the property: bag-of-words methods see only situational vocabulary, and a contextual classifier detects affect (p < 10^-15) but cannot identify the category (5.2% top-1 vs. 82.5% on a keyword-rich control). AIPsy-Affect extends our earlier 96-item battery (arXiv:2603.22295) by a factor of four and is released openly under MIT license.
comment: Dataset paper. 12 pages + appendix, 2 figures. Dataset available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/keidolabs/aipsy-affect. MIT license

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIPsy-Affect，一个无关键词的临床刺激工具包，用于语言模型情绪机制的因果可解释性研究，消除情绪关键词混肴。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前语言模型情绪可解释性研究依赖包含情绪词的刺激，导致无法区分模型检测到的是情绪词还是真实情绪，影响后续关于情绪电路、特征和干预的结论。因此需要无关键词的刺激集来消除混淆。
light_analysis.method: AIPsy-Affect包含480个项目：192个无关键词临床场景（每种Plutchik基本情绪24个）、192个匹配的中性控制（共享角色、背景等但去除情感）、中等强度集和判别效度集。匹配对结构支持线性探针、激活修补、SAE特征分析、因果消融和转向向量提取，确保内部表示差异不源于关键词。
light_analysis.result: 三种方法验证：词袋情感和情感词典仅检测情境词汇；上下文分类器能检测情感（p<10^-15）但无法识别类别（top-1准确率5.2% vs 关键词丰富的控制82.5%），证明刺激集有效消除关键词混肴。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIPsy-Affect为语言模型情绪因果可解释性提供可靠工具，扩展先前工作四倍，MIT许可开源。它规避了关键词混肴，支持多种分析，但限于Plutchik模型，未来可扩展。

title: OptProver: Bridging Olympiad and Optimization through Continual Training in Formal Theorem Proving
abstract: Recent advances in formal theorem proving have focused on Olympiad-level mathematics, leaving undergraduate domains largely unexplored. Optimization, fundamental to machine learning, operations research, and scientific computing, remains underserved by existing provers. Its reliance on domain-specific formalisms (convexity, optimality conditions, and algorithmic analysis) creates significant distribution shift, making naive domain transfer ineffective. We present OptProver, a trained model that achieves robust transfer from Olympiad to undergraduate optimization. Starting from a strong Olympiad-level prover, our pipeline mitigates distribution shift through two key innovations. First, we employ large-scale optimization-focused data curation via expert iteration. Second, we introduce a specialized preference learning objective that integrates perplexity-weighted optimization with a mechanism to penalize valid but non-progressing proof steps. This not only addresses distribution shifts but also guides the search toward efficient trajectories. To enable rigorous evaluation, we construct a novel benchmark in Lean 4 focused on optimization. On this benchmark, OptProver achieves state-of-the-art Pass@1 and Pass@32 among comparably sized models while maintaining competitive performance on general theorem-proving tasks, demonstrating effective domain transfer without catastrophic forgetting.

light_analysis.overview: OptProver通过持续训练与偏好学习，将奥数级定理证明器有效迁移至本科优化领域。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有定理证明研究聚焦于奥数级数学，忽视了本科优化领域，而优化问题依赖凸性、最优性条件等特定形式主义，与奥数数据存在显著分布偏移，朴素域迁移效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: OptProver基于强奥数级证明器，采用专家迭代大规模整理优化数据，并引入加权困惑度与惩罚无效步骤的偏好学习目标，缓解分布偏移并引导搜索向高效轨迹收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在Lean 4优化基准上，OptProver的Pass@1和Pass@32达到同类规模模型最佳，同时在通用定理证明任务中保持竞争力，展示了有效域迁移而无灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.conclusion: OptProver成功从奥数域迁移至优化域，提供了优化专用基准与方法，验证了持续学习的可行性，未来可扩展至更广泛的数学领域。

title: K-SENSE: A Knowledge-Guided Self-Augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health Conditions on Social Media
abstract: Early detection of mental health conditions, particularly stress and depression, from social media text remains a challenging open problem in computational psychiatry and natural language processing. Automated systems must contend with figurative language, implicit emotional expression, and the high noise inherent in user-generated content. Existing approaches either leverage external commonsense knowledge to model mental states explicitly, or apply self-augmentation and contrastive training to improve generalization, but seldom do both in a principled, unified framework. We propose K-SENSE (Knowledge-guided Self-augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health), a framework that jointly exploits external psychological reasoning and internal representation robustness. K-SENSE adopts a three-stage encoding pipeline: (1) inferential commonsense knowledge is extracted from the COMET model across five mental state dimensions; (2) a semantic anchor is constructed by combining hidden representations from two parallel encoding streams, projected into a shared space before fusion; and (3) a supervised contrastive learning objective aligns same-class representations while encouraging the attention mechanism to suppress irrelevant knowledge noise. We evaluate K-SENSE on Dreaddit (stress detection) and Depression_Mixed (depression detection), achieving mean F1-scores of 86.1 (0.6%) and 94.3 (0.8%), respectively, over five independent runs. These represent improvements of approximately 2.6 and 1.5 percentage points over the strongest prior baselines. Ablation experiments confirm the contribution of each architectural component, including the temporal knowledge integration strategy and the choice to keep the knowledge encoder frozen during fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出K-SENSE框架，融合外部常识知识和自增强对比学习，用于社交媒体文本的神经语义心理健康评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 早期从社交媒体文本检测心理健康状况（如压力和抑郁）是一项挑战，因为存在比喻语言、隐含情感表达和用户生成内容的高噪声。现有方法要么利用外部常识知识显式建模心理状态，要么应用自增强和对比训练提高泛化能力，但很少在统一框架中同时兼顾两者。因此，需要一个能够联合利用外部心理推理和内部表示鲁棒性的方法。
light_analysis.method: K-SENSE采用三阶段编码流程：首先从COMET模型提取五个心理状态维度的推理常识知识；然后通过两个并行编码流的隐藏表示构建语义锚点，在融合前投影到共享空间；最后使用监督对比学习目标对齐同类表示，同时引导注意力机制抑制无关知识噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在Dreaddit（压力检测）和Depression_Mixed（抑郁检测）数据集上，K-SENSE分别达到平均F1分数86.1（标准差0.6%）和94.3（标准差0.8%），相比最强基线分别提升约2.6和1.5个百分点。消融实验证实了每个架构组件的贡献，包括时序知识整合策略和微调时冻结知识编码器的选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: K-SENSE通过联合外部常识知识和自增强对比学习，提高了心理健康检测的性能。该框架具有学术价值，为计算精神病学和自然语言处理提供了统一方法。实际应用可用于早期心理健康筛查。未来工作可探索更丰富的知识源或动态知识整合。

title: DARC-CLIP: Dynamic Adaptive Refinement with Cross-Attention for Meme Understanding
abstract: Memes convey meaning through the interaction of visual and textual signals, often combining humor, irony, and offense in subtle ways. Detecting harmful or sensitive content in memes requires accurate modeling of these multimodal cues. Existing CLIP-based approaches rely on static fusion, which struggles to capture fine grained dependencies between modalities. We propose DARC-CLIP, a CLIP-based framework for adaptive multimodal fusion with a hierarchical refinement stack. DARC-CLIP introduces Adaptive Cross-Attention Refiners to for bidirectional information alignment and Dynamic Feature Adapters for task-sensitive signal adaptation. We evaluate DARC-CLIP on the PrideMM benchmark, which includes hate, target, stance, and humor classification, and further test generalization on the CrisisHateMM dataset. DARC-CLIP achieves highly competitive classification accuracy across tasks, with significant gains of +4.18 AUROC and +6.84 F1 in hate detection over the strongest baseline. Ablation studies confirm that ACAR and DFA are the main contributors to these gains. These results show that adaptive cross-signal refinement is an effective strategy for multimodal content analysis in socially sensitive classification.
comment: Accepted to IEEE ICASSP 2026. 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出DARC-CLIP框架，通过自适应交叉注意力精炼和动态特征适配实现多模态 meme 理解，显著提升仇恨检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Meme 通过视觉和文本信号交互传达含义，现有 CLIP 方法采用静态融合，难以捕捉细粒度的跨模态依赖。在检测有害或敏感内容时，需要准确建模多模态线索，但静态融合限制了模型对微妙关系的理解。因此，需要一种自适应融合方法来提升 meme 理解能力，特别是在社会敏感分类任务中。
light_analysis.method: DARC-CLIP 基于 CLIP，引入自适应交叉注意力精炼器（ACAR）实现双向信息对齐，以及动态特征适配器（DFA）进行任务敏感的信号适应。框架采用层次化精炼堆栈，通过迭代优化跨模态交互。在 PrideMM 基准（包含仇恨、目标、立场和幽默分类）和 CrisisHateMM 数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: DARC-CLIP 在多项任务上取得高竞争力结果，其中仇恨检测相比最强基线提升 +4.18 AUROC 和 +6.84 F1。消融实验证实 ACAR 和 DFA 是主要贡献者。模型在多个分类任务上表现优异，表明自适应融合策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了自适应交叉信号精炼在 multimodal 内容分析中的有效性，特别是针对社会敏感分类。DARC-CLIP 通过动态调整模态交互提升了 meme 理解能力，但未讨论大规模部署或跨领域泛化。未来可探索更高效的精炼结构或扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: Operational Feature Fingerprints of Graph Datasets via a White-Box Signal-Subspace Probe
abstract: Graph neural networks achieve strong node-classification accuracy, but learned message passing entangles ego attributes, neighborhood smoothing, high-pass graph differences, class geometry, and classifier-boundary effects inside opaque representations. This obscures why nodes are classified as they are and which graph-learning mechanisms a dataset requires.   We propose WG-SRC, a white-box signal-subspace probe for prediction and graph dataset diagnosis. WG-SRC replaces learned message passing with a fixed, named graph-signal dictionary containing raw features, row- and symmetric-normalized low-pass propagation, and high-pass graph differences. It combines Fisher coordinate selection, class-wise PCA subspaces, closed-form multi-alpha ridge classification, and validation-based score fusion, so prediction and analysis rely on explicit class subspaces, energy-controlled dimensions, and closed-form linear decisions.   As a white-box graph-learning instrument, WG-SRC uses predictive performance to validate its diagnostics. Across six node-classification datasets, it remains competitive with reproduced baselines and achieves positive average gain under aligned splits. Its atlas decomposes behavior into raw-feature, low-pass, high-pass, class-geometric, and ridge-boundary components. The resulting fingerprints distinguish low-pass-dominated Amazon graphs, mixed high-pass and class-geometrically complex Chameleon behavior, and raw- or boundary-sensitive WebKB graphs. Aligned interventions show when high-pass blocks act as removable noise, when raw or graph-derived signals should be preserved, and when ridge correction matters. WG-SRC therefore serves both as a functioning white-box classifier and as a dataset-fingerprinting probe, enabling fingerprint-conditioned analysis of how black-box model components behave under different graph-signal conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WG-SRC白盒信号子空间探针，用于图数据集诊断和预测，生成操作特征指纹，解释图学习机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络虽在节点分类中表现优异，但其学习过程不透明，混合了多种信号与边界效应，难以解释分类原因及数据集所需机制。现有方法内部表征晦涩，缺乏可解释的诊断工具，因此需要一种白盒方法以显式分离并分析图信号成分。
light_analysis.method: WG-SRC采用固定命名的图信号字典（原始特征、行和对称归一化低通传播、高通差异），结合Fisher坐标选择、类PCA子空间、闭式多alpha岭分类及基于验证的分数融合。通过显式类子空间、能量控制维度和闭式线性决策实现预测与诊断，其图谱分解行为为原始特征、低通、高通、类几何和岭边界组件。
light_analysis.result: 在六个节点分类数据集上，WG-SRC与复现基线保持竞争力，在一致划分下实现平均正增益。其指纹区分了低通主导的Amazon图、混合高通与类几何复杂的Chameleon行为，以及原始或边界敏感的WebKB图。干预实验表明高通块作为可移除噪声、原始或图派生信号需保留、岭校正重要性等。
light_analysis.conclusion: WG-SRC既作为白盒分类器，又作为数据集指纹探针，支持指纹条件分析黑盒模型在不同图信号条件下的行为。该工作为图学习提供可解释诊断工具，有助于理解数据集特性与模型设计，潜在局限是依赖固定信号字典，未来可扩展至动态图或更多信号类型。

title: Quantifying and Mitigating Self-Preference Bias of LLM Judges
abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has become a dominant approach in automated evaluation systems, playing critical roles in model alignment, leaderboard construction, quality control, and so on. However, the scalability and trustworthiness of this approach can be substantially distorted by Self-Preference Bias (SPB), which is a directional evaluative deviation in which LLMs systematically favor or disfavor their own generated outputs during evaluation. Existing measurements rely on costly human annotations and conflate generative capability with evaluative stance, and thus are impractical for large-scale deployment in real-world systems. To address this issue, we introduce a fully automated framework to quantifying and mitigating SPB, which constructs equal-quality pairs of responses with negligible quality differences, enabling statistical disentanglement of discriminability from bias propensity without human gold standards. Empirical analysis across 20 mainstream LLMs reveals that advanced capabilities are often uncorrelated, or even negatively correlated, with low SPB. To mitigate this bias, we propose a structured multi-dimensional evaluation strategy grounded in cognitive load decomposition, which reduces SPB by 31.5\% on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动化框架量化与缓解LLM评估中的自我偏好偏差（SPB），无需人工标注。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM-as-a-Judge在自动评估中广泛使用，但存在自我偏好偏差（SPB），即LLM系统性地偏好自身输出，导致评估失真。现有测量依赖昂贵的人工标注，且无法区分生成能力与评估立场，难以大规模部署。该研究旨在提出一种无需人工金标准的自动化方法，以量化并缓解SPB。
light_analysis.method: 构建等质量响应对（通过质量差异可忽略的生成），利用统计方法解耦判别能力与偏差倾向，无需人工标准。提出基于认知负荷分解的结构化多维评估策略，通过分解评估维度降低偏差。实验涵盖20个主流LLM，分析高级能力与SPB的相关性。
light_analysis.result: 在20个主流LLM上的实验表明，高级能力与低SPB往往不相关甚至负相关。提出的缓解策略平均降低自我偏好偏差31.5%，显著提升评估公正性。该方法无需人工标注，适用于大规模部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究实现了SPB的自动化量化与缓解，提升了LLM-as-a-Judge的可信度。认知负荷分解策略有效降低偏差，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的维度分解或结合其他偏差缓解技术。

title: Flow4DGS-SLAM: Optical Flow-Guided 4D Gaussian Splatting SLAM
abstract: Handling the dynamic environments is a significant research challenge in Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). Recent research combines 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with SLAM to achieve both robust camera pose estimation and photorealistic renderings. However, using SLAM to efficiently reconstruct both static and dynamic regions remains challenging. In this work, we propose an efficient framework for dynamic 3DGS SLAM guided by optical flow. Using the input depth and prior optical flow, we first propose a category-agnostic motion mask generation strategy by fitting a camera ego-motion model to decompose the optical flow. This module separates dynamic and static Gaussians and simultaneously provides flow-guided camera pose initialization. We boost the training speed of dynamic 3DGS by explicitly modeling their temporal centers at keyframes. These centers are propagated using 3D scene flow priors and are dynamically initialized with an adaptive insertion strategy. Alongside this, we model the temporal opacity and rotation using a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to adaptively learn the complex dynamics. The empirical results demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in tracking, dynamic reconstruction, and training efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于光流引导的4D高斯溅射SLAM框架，高效处理动态场景的相机跟踪与动态重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉SLAM在动态环境中的鲁棒性和效率是重大挑战。现有3DGS-SLAM虽能实现高质量渲染，但难以高效同时重建静态和动态区域。需要一种能分离动态与静态高斯、加速训练并保持高精度的框架。
light_analysis.method: 利用输入深度和先验光流，通过拟合相机自运动模型分解光流，生成类别无关的运动掩码，分离动态与静态高斯，并初始化光流引导的相机位姿。关键帧处显式建模动态高斯的时间中心，利用3D场景流先验传播，并采用自适应插入策略动态初始化。使用高斯混合模型（GMM）学习时间不透明度和旋转。
light_analysis.result: 在跟踪、动态重建和训练效率上达到最先进性能。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但声称在多个维度优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一个高效的动态3DGS SLAM框架，通过光流引导和GMM建模，显著提升了动态场景下的相机定位和场景重建质量。未来可扩展至更复杂动态场景或实时应用。

title: FILTR: Extracting Topological Features from Pretrained 3D Models
abstract: Recent advances in pretraining 3D point cloud encoders (e.g., Point-BERT, Point-MAE) have produced powerful models, whose abilities are typically evaluated on geometric or semantic tasks. At the same time, topological descriptors have been shown to provide informative summaries of a shape's multiscale structure. In this paper we pose the question whether topological information can be derived from features produced by 3D encoders. To address this question, we first introduce DONUT, a synthetic benchmark with controlled topological complexity, and propose FILTR (Filtration Transformer), a learnable framework to predict persistence diagrams directly from frozen encoders. FILTR adapts a transformer decoder to treat diagram generation as a set prediction task. Our analysis on DONUT reveals that existing encoders retain only limited global topological signals, yet FILTR successfully leverages information produced by these encoders to approximate persistence diagrams. Our approach enables, for the first time, data-driven extraction of persistence diagrams from raw point clouds through an efficient learnable feed-forward mechanism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FILTR框架，从预训练3D点云编码器中数据驱动地预测持久性图，首次实现高效前馈式拓扑特征提取。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练3D点云编码器在几何和语义任务上表现优异，但忽略了拓扑结构信息。传统拓扑描述符计算复杂，难以与深度学习集成。本文探索是否能从编码器特征中提取拓扑信息，以低成本获得多尺度结构总结。
light_analysis.method: 引入DONUT合成基准以控制拓扑复杂性，提出FILTR（Filtration Transformer），采用transformer解码器将持久性图生成建模为集合预测任务，从冻结的预训练编码器（如Point-BERT、Point-MAE）中学习预测，无需传统滤波或单纯复形计算。
light_analysis.result: 在DONUT上分析表明，现有编码器仅保留有限全局拓扑信号，但FILTR能有效利用这些信号近似持久性图。首次实现从原始点云通过可学习前馈机制数据驱动提取持久性图，避免了传统方法的计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证实了从预训练3D模型中提取拓扑特征的可行性，FILTR为拓扑数据分析与表示学习搭建了桥梁。该方法可高效获取形状的拓扑摘要，有望应用于3D分类、检索等任务。未来可探索改善编码器拓扑信息保留或扩展到其他模式。

title: PermaFrost-Attack: Stealth Pretraining Seeding(SPS) for planting Logic Landmines During LLM Training
abstract: Aligned large language models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to adversarial manipulation, and their reliance on web-scale pretraining creates a subtle but consequential attack surface. We study Stealth Pretraining Seeding (SPS), a threat model in which adversaries distribute small amounts of poisoned content across stealth websites, increasing the likelihood that such material is absorbed into future training corpora derived from sources such as Common Crawl. Because each individual payload is tiny, diffuse, and superficially benign, the attack is difficult to detect during dataset construction or filtering. The result is a latent form of poisoning that remains largely invisible under standard evaluation, yet can later be activated by a precise trigger such as <00TRIGGER00>. We call this attack PermaFrost, reflecting its latent and reactivatable nature. We study it through PermaFrost-Attack, a controlled framework for latent conceptual poisoning, together with three geometric diagnostics: Thermodynamic Length, Spectral Curvature, and the Infection Traceback Graph. Across multiple model families and scales, we show that this controlled SPS proxy can induce persistent unsafe behavior that often remains hidden under standard evaluation. Our results identify SPS as a practical and underappreciated threat to future foundation models. This paper introduces a novel geometric diagnostic lens for systematically examining latent model behavior, providing a principled foundation for detecting, characterizing, and understanding vulnerabilities that may remain invisible under standard evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Stealth Pretraining Seeding (SPS)威胁模型，通过潜伏毒化实现LLM后门攻击，并引入几何诊断方法检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）在预训练阶段依赖网络数据，存在被恶意投毒的风险。现有攻击方法通常需要大规模污染数据或修改模型结构，而SPS通过散布少量看似无害的毒化内容到网页，使其被纳入训练语料，形成潜伏后门。这种攻击难以被标准评估检测，但可通过特定触发器激活，对未来的基础模型构成实际威胁。研究旨在揭示并防御此类隐蔽攻击。
light_analysis.method: 提出PermaFrost-Attack框架，模拟SPS攻击：在Common Crawl等来源中嵌入微小毒化样本（含<00TRIGGER00>触发器），保持表面良性以逃避过滤。同时引入三种几何诊断指标：Thermodynamic Length、Spectral Curvature和Infection Traceback Graph，用于检测和表征潜伏的模型行为。实验在多种模型族和规模上进行，验证攻击的有效性和诊断方法的可行性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型家族和规模上，PermaFrost攻击可诱导模型产生持久的、标准评估下隐藏的不安全行为。攻击成功率高，且毒化样本数量极少（每批次仅少量网页），难以被常规数据过滤或安全评测发现。几何诊断方法能有效识别潜伏后门，提供比传统评估更敏感的检测手段。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了SPS作为针对基础模型的隐蔽威胁的实用性，并提出了几何诊断框架用于检测此类潜伏漏洞。该工作强调了当前安全评估范式的不足，为未来LLM安全对齐提供了新视角。潜在局限性包括诊断方法的计算成本，未来工作可探索更高效的检测和防御机制。

title: SketchVLM: Vision language models can annotate images to explain thoughts and guide users
abstract: When answering questions about images, humans naturally point, label, and draw to explain their reasoning. In contrast, modern vision-language models (VLMs) such as Gemini-3-Pro and GPT-5 only respond with text, which can be difficult for users to verify. We present SketchVLM, a training-free, model-agnostic framework that enables VLMs to produce non-destructive, editable SVG overlays on the input image to visually explain their answers. Across seven benchmarks spanning visual reasoning (maze navigation, ball-drop trajectory prediction, and object counting) and drawing (part labeling, connecting-the-dots, and drawing shapes around objects), SketchVLM improves visual reasoning task accuracy by up to +28.5 percentage points and annotation quality by up to 1.48x relative to image-editing and fine-tuned sketching baselines, while also producing annotations that are more faithful to the model's stated answer. We find that single-turn generation already achieves strong accuracy and annotation quality, and multi-turn generation opens up further opportunities for human-AI collaboration. An interactive demo and code are at https://sketchvlm.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SketchVLM，一种无需训练、模型无关的框架，使VLM能生成可编辑SVG覆盖层来视觉解释其答案。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLMs如GPT-5仅输出文本，用户难以验证模型推理过程。人类在解释图像时自然会标注、绘图，而模型缺乏这种视觉解释能力，导致透明度和可信度不足。SketchVLM旨在填补这一空白，通过视觉注释增强模型解释性。
light_analysis.method: SketchVLM是训练无关、模型无关的框架，通过提示现有VLMs（如Gemini-3-Pro）生成非破坏性、可编辑的SVG覆盖层叠加到输入图像上。支持单轮和多轮生成，覆盖视觉推理和绘图任务，无需微调或图像编辑工具。
light_analysis.result: 在7个基准（迷宫导航、球落轨迹预测、物体计数、部件标注等）上，SketchVLM相比图像编辑和微调基线，视觉推理准确率最高提升+28.5个百分点，注释质量提升1.48倍，且注释更忠实于模型答案。单轮生成已表现强劲，多轮生成进一步促进人机协作。
light_analysis.conclusion: SketchVLM展示了VLMs通过视觉注释解释推理的潜力，提升了模型透明度和可验证性。该框架无需训练，易于部署，为人类-AI协作开辟新途径。未来可探索更复杂的交互式注释或扩展到其他模态。

title: SpatiO: Adaptive Test-Time Orchestration of Vision-Language Agents for Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Understanding visual scenes requires not only recognizing objects but also reasoning about their spatial relationships. Unlike general vision-language tasks, spatial reasoning requires integrating multiple inductive biases, such as 2D appearance cues, depth signals, and geometric constraints, whose reliability varies across contexts. This suggests that effective spatial reasoning requires \emph{spatial adaptability}: the ability to flexibly coordinate different reasoning strategies depending on the input. However, most existing approaches rely on a single reasoning pipeline that implicitly learns a fixed spatial prior, limiting their ability to adapt under distribution changes. Multi-agent systems offer a promising alternative by aggregating diverse reasoning trajectories, but prior attempts in spatial reasoning primarily employ homogeneous agents, restricting the diversity of inductive biases they can leverage. In this work, we introduce SpatiO, a heterogeneous multi-agent framework for spatial reasoning that coordinates multiple vision-language specialists with complementary inductive biases. To enable effective collaboration, we propose Test-Time Orchestration (TTO), an optimization mechanism that dynamically evaluates and reweights agents based on their observed reliability during inference, without modifying model parameters. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial reasoning benchmarks, including 3DSRBench, STVQA-7k, CV-Bench, and Omni3D-Bench, demonstrate that SpatiO consistently improves spatial reasoning performance over both closed-source and open-source baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出异构多智能体框架SpatiO，通过测试时编排动态协调具有互补归纳偏差的视觉语言专家，实现自适应空间推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间推理需要整合2D外观、深度和几何约束等多种归纳偏差，但现有方法依赖固定推理管道，缺乏适应性；多智能体系统虽可聚合多样轨迹，但先前工作使用同质智能体，限制了偏差多样性。本研究旨在通过异构多智能体实现输入自适应的策略协调。
light_analysis.method: SpatiO采用异构多智能体框架，协调多个带互补归纳偏差的视觉语言专家。核心创新是测试时编排（TTO），在推理时根据专家可靠性动态评估并重加权，不修改模型参数。方法支持灵活集成不同专家，如外观、深度和几何推理器。
light_analysis.result: 在3DSRBench、STVQA-7k、CV-Bench和Omni3D-Bench等空间推理基准上，SpatiO一致优于闭源和开源基线方法，证实了异构集成和测试时重加权的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调持续改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatiO通过异构多智能体与测试时编排，提升了空间推理的适应性和鲁棒性，有效融合了多种归纳偏差。该框架具有通用性，可扩展到其他需要多模态推理的任务。未来工作可探索更多专家类型及更复杂的协作策略，以应对动态场景。

title: A Hybridizable Neural Time Integrator for Stable Autoregressive Forecasting
abstract: For autoregressive modeling of chaotic dynamical systems over long time horizons, the stability of both training and inference is a major challenge in building scientific foundation models. We present a hybrid technique in which an autoregressive transformer is embedded within a novel shooting-based mixed finite element scheme, exposing topological structure that enables provable stability. For forward problems, we prove preservation of discrete energies, while for training we prove uniform bounds on gradients, provably avoiding the exploding gradient problem. Combined with a vision transformer, this yields latent tokens admitting structure-preserving dynamics. We outperform modern foundation models with a $65\times$ reduction in model parameters and long-horizon forecasting of chaotic systems. A "mini-foundation" model of a fusion component shows that 12 simulations suffice to train a real-time surrogate, achieving a $9{,}000\times$ speedup over particle-in-cell simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种混合神经网络时间积分器，通过嵌入自回归变换器到射击法混合有限元方案中，实现混沌系统长时程稳定自回归预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 混沌动力系统的自回归建模在长期预测中面临训练和推理不稳定的挑战，现有方法难以保证梯度可控和能量守恒。本文旨在解决这些稳定性问题，同时减少模型参数和计算成本。
light_analysis.method: 将自回归变换器嵌入基于射击法的混合有限元格式，利用拓扑结构保证离散能量守恒和梯度有界，避免梯度爆炸。结合视觉变换器生成具有结构保持动力学的潜在标记。
light_analysis.result: 在混沌系统长期预测中，以65倍参数减少超越现代基础模型；在聚变组件“迷你基础”模型上，仅用12次仿真训练实时代理，实现相对于粒子网格模拟的9000倍加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过理论保证的稳定性和高效性，为科学基础模型中的混沌系统长期预测提供了可行方案，尤其适用于数据稀少的物理仿真场景。未来可扩展到更复杂系统。

title: JEPAMatch: Geometric Representation Shaping for Semi-Supervised Learning
abstract: Semi-supervised learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for leveraging large amounts of unlabeled data to improve the performance of machine learning models when labeled data are scarce. Among existing approaches, methods derived from FixMatch have achieved state-of-the-art results in image classification by combining weak and strong data augmentations with confidence-based pseudo-labeling. Despite their strong empirical performance, these methods typically struggle with two critical bottlenecks: majority classes tend to dominate the learning process, which is amplified by incorrect pseudo-labels, leading to biased models. Furthermore, noisy early pseudo-labels prevent the model from forming clear decision boundaries, requiring prolonged training to learn informative representation. In this paper, we introduce a paradigm shift from conventional logical output threshold base, toward an explicit shaping of geometric representations. Our approach is inspired by the recently proposed Latent-Euclidean Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (LeJEPA), a theoretically grounded framework asserting that meaningful representations should exhibit an isotropic Gaussian structure in latent space. Building on this principle, we propose a new training objective that combines the classical semi-supervised loss used in FlexMatch, an adaptive extension of FixMatch, with a latent-space regularization term derived from LeJEPA.   Our proposed approach, encourages well-structured representations while preserving the advantages of pseudo-labeling strategies. Through extensive experiments on CIFAR-100, STL-10 and Tiny-ImageNet, we demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing baselines. In addition, our method significantly accelerates the convergence, drastically reducing the overall computational cost compared to standard FixMatch-based pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JEPAMatch方法，通过显式塑造几何表示改进半监督学习，显著加速收敛并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有半监督方法如FixMatch受限于多数类主导和错误伪标签导致的偏差，决策边界模糊且训练时间长。本文引入几何表示塑造范式，旨在解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于LeJEPA框架，结合FlexMatch的损失函数与潜在空间正则化项，鼓励表示呈现各向同性高斯结构，从而改善表示质量并保留伪标签优势。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-100、STL-10和Tiny-ImageNet上，JEPAMatch持续优于现有基线，同时大幅加速收敛，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种结合几何表示正则化的半监督学习新目标，有效缓解了类别不平衡和噪声伪标签问题，具有理论价值和实际应用潜力。

title: WeatherSeg: Weather-Robust Image Segmentation using Teacher-Student Dual Learning and Classifier-Updating Attention
abstract: WeatherSeg, an advanced semi-supervised segmentation framework, addresses autonomous driving's environmental perception challenges in adverse weather while reducing annotation costs. This framework integrates a Dual Teacher-Student Weight-Sharing Model (DTSWSM) that enables knowledge distillation from weather-affected images, and a Classifier Weight Updating Attention Mechanism (CWUAM) that dynamically adjusts classifier weights based on environmental attributes. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that WeatherSeg significantly outperforms baseline models in both accuracy and robustness across various weather conditions, including clear, rainy, cloudy, and foggy scenarios, establishing it as an effective solution for all-weather semantic segmentation in autonomous driving and related applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WeatherSeg半监督分割框架，通过双教师-学生权重共享和分类器权重更新注意力，提升恶劣天气下的语义分割鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的环境感知面临挑战，现有方法在雨、雾等天气中精度下降明显，且全监督分割需要大量标注成本。论文旨在开发一种鲁棒且高效的半监督分割方法，适应多种天气条件，同时降低标注需求。
light_analysis.method: WeatherSeg采用双教师-学生权重共享模型（DTSWSM），从受天气影响的图像中进行知识蒸馏；并引入分类器权重更新注意力机制（CWUAM），根据环境属性动态调整分类器权重。该框架在无额外标注的情况下利用天气变体图像进行半监督学习。
light_analysis.result: 在晴天、雨天、多云和雾天等多种天气条件下，WeatherSeg在精度和鲁棒性上显著优于基线模型。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但表明其作为全天气语义分割的有效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: WeatherSeg为自动驾驶等相关应用提供了一种有效的全天候语义分割方案，在减少标注成本的同时提升了恶劣天气下的分割性能。未来可探索更复杂的天气组合或与其他传感器融合。

title: Beyond Overlap Metrics: Rewarding Reasoning and Preferences for Faithful Multi-Role Dialogue Summarization
abstract: Multi-role dialogue summarization requires modeling complex interactions among multiple speakers while preserving role-specific information and factual consistency. However, most existing methods optimize for automatic metrics such as ROUGE and BERTScore, which favor surface-level imitation of references rather than genuine gains in faithfulness or alignment with human preferences. We propose a novel framework that couples explicit cognitive-style reasoning with reward-based optimization for multi-role dialogue summarization. Our method first distills structured reasoning traces (e.g., step-by-step inferences and intermediate reflections) from a large teacher model and uses them as auxiliary supervision to initialize a reasoning-aware summarizer via staged supervised fine-tuning. It then applies GRPO with a dual-principle reward that blends metric-based signals with human-aligned criteria targeting key information coverage, implicit inference, factual faithfulness, and conciseness. Experiments on multilingual multi-role dialogue benchmarks show that our method matches strong baselines on ROUGE and BERTScore. Specifically, results on CSDS confirm the framework's stability in semantic consistency, while in-depth analysis on SAMSum demonstrates clear gains in factual faithfulness and model-based preference alignment. These findings underscore the value of reasoning-aware and preference-aware training for reliable dialogue summarization. Checkpoints and datasets are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/NebulaPixel/summorchestra-multirole-summary.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合认知推理与偏好优化的多角色对话摘要框架，提升事实一致性和人类偏好对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 多角色对话摘要需处理多说话人交互并保持角色信息与事实一致性。现有方法优化ROUGE、BERTScore等自动指标，但鼓励表面模仿而非真实提升忠实性或对齐人类偏好，导致摘要不可靠。
light_analysis.method: 提出先从大教师模型蒸馏结构化推理轨迹（逐步推理、中间反思）作为辅助监督，通过分阶段SFT初始化推理感知摘要器；再用GRPO结合双原则奖励，混合基于指标的信号与人类对齐标准（关键信息覆盖、隐含推理、事实忠实、简洁性）。
light_analysis.result: 在CSDS数据集上语义一致性稳定；SAMSum上事实忠实性和基于模型的偏好对齐明显提升；ROUGE和BERTScore匹配强基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了推理感知和偏好感知训练对可靠对话摘要的价值；提供检查点和数据集于Hugging Face。

title: The Topological Trouble With Transformers
abstract: Transformers encode structure in sequences via an expanding contextual history. However, their purely feedforward architecture fundamentally limits dynamic state tracking. State tracking -- the iterative updating of latent variables reflecting an evolving environment -- involves inherently sequential dependencies that feedforward networks struggle to maintain. Consequently, feedforward models push evolving state representations deeper into their layer stack with each new input step, rendering information inaccessible in shallow layers and ultimately exhausting the model's depth. While this depth limit can be bypassed by dynamic depth models and by explicit or latent thinking that externalizes state representations, these solutions are computationally and memory inefficient. In this article, we argue that temporally extended cognition requires refocusing from explicit thought traces to implicit activation dynamics via recurrent architectures. We introduce a taxonomy of recurrent and continuous-thought transformer architectures, categorizing them by their recurrence axis (depth versus step) and their ratio of input tokens to recurrence steps. Finally, we outline promising research directions, including enhanced state-space models and coarse-grained recurrence, to better integrate state tracking into modern foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 指出Transformer在状态跟踪上的拓扑限制，提出循环架构分类和未来研究方向。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer的纯前馈结构限制了动态状态跟踪，导致信息随深度耗尽，现有动态深度或外部化状态方案效率低下。因此需要重新关注循环架构的隐式激活动力学，以支持时序扩展认知。
light_analysis.method: 提出循环和连续思维Transformer架构的分类法，依据循环轴（深度vs步骤）和输入令牌与循环步骤的比率。展望增强状态空间模型和粗粒度循环作为有前景的方向。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，主要贡献为理论分析和架构分类，并指出未来研究方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调循环架构对于状态跟踪的重要性，改进状态空间模型和粗粒度循环有望提升效率，为基础模型集成状态跟踪提供指导。

title: NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) Challenge Report
abstract: This report presents the NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) Challenge, which targets automatic rip current understanding in images. Rip currents are hazardous nearshore flows that cause many beach-related fatalities worldwide, yet remain difficult to identify because their visual appearance varies substantially across beaches, viewpoints, and sea states. To advance research on this safety-critical problem, the challenge builds on the RipVIS benchmark, evaluating both detection and segmentation. The dataset is diverse, sourced from more than $10$ countries, with $4$ camera orientations and diverse beach and sea conditions. This report describes the dataset, challenge protocol, evaluation methodology, final results, and summarizes the main insights from the submitted methods. The challenge attracted $159$ registered participants and produced $9$ valid test submissions across the two tasks. Final rankings are based on a composite score that combines $F_1[50]$, $F_2[50]$, $F_1[40\!:\!95]$, and $F_2[40\!:\!95]$. Most participant solutions relied on pretrained models, combined with strong augmentation and post-processing design. These results suggest that rip current understanding benefits strongly from the robust general-purpose vision models' progress, while leaving ample room for future methods tailored to their unique visual structure.
comment: Challenge report paper from NTIRE Workshop at CVPR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026离岸流检测与分割挑战赛，旨在推动自动离岸流理解技术的发展。
light_analysis.motivation: 离岸流是危险的海岸流，导致全球许多海滩溺水事件。然而，由于其视觉外观因海滩、视角和海况而变化，难以识别。现有方法不足，亟需安全关键问题的研究。
light_analysis.method: 挑战基于RipVIS基准数据集，涵盖10多个国家、4种相机视角和多样海滩条件。评估检测与分割任务，提交方法主要使用预训练模型，结合强数据增强和后处理。
light_analysis.result: 挑战有159名注册参与者，9个有效提交。最终排名基于F1[50]、F2[50]、F1[40:95]、F2[40:95]的复合分数。结果表明离岸流理解受益于通用视觉模型进步，但仍需特化方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文总结了挑战组织、数据集、方法和结果，指出离岸流理解依赖鲁棒通用视觉模型，但未来需针对其独特视觉结构设计专门方法。

title: Introspection Adapters: Training LLMs to Report Their Learned Behaviors
abstract: When model developers or users fine-tune an LLM, this can induce behaviors that are unexpected, deliberately harmful, or hard to detect. It would be far easier to audit LLMs if they could simply describe their behaviors in natural language. Here, we study a scalable approach to rapidly identify learned behaviors of many LLMs derived from a shared base LLM. Given a model $M$, our method works by finetuning models $M_i$ from $M$ with implanted behaviors $b_i$; the $(M_i, b_i)$ pairs serve as labeled training data. We then train an introspection adapter (IA): a single LoRA adapter jointly trained across the finetunes $M_i$ to cause them to verbalize their implanted behaviors. We find that this IA induces self-description of learned behaviors even in finetunes of $M$ that were trained in very different ways from the $M_i$. For example, IAs generalize to AuditBench, achieving state-of-the-art at identifying explicitly hidden concerning behaviors. IAs can also be used to detect encrypted finetuning API attacks. They scale favorably with model size and training data diversity. Overall, our results suggest that IAs are a scalable, effective, and practically useful approach to auditing fine-tuned LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出内省适配器（IA），通过微调LLM植入行为并训练适配器使其口头描述学习到的行为，实现可扩展的审计方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调LLM可能引入意外或有害的行为，难以检测。现有审计方法复杂且不够可扩展。需要一种能够快速识别多种LLM习得行为的方法，尤其是让模型用自然语言描述自身行为，以简化审计过程。
light_analysis.method: 基于共享基模型M，微调出带有植入行为b_i的模型M_i作为训练数据。然后训练一个内省适配器（IA），即一个跨多个M_i联合训练的LoRA适配器，使其能够引导模型口头描述植入的行为。该方法可泛化到不同微调方式训练的模型，并用于检测加密微调API攻击等。
light_analysis.result: IA在AuditBench上达到最先进水平，能识别明确隐藏的令人担忧的行为。IA还能检测加密微调API攻击。随着模型大小和训练数据多样性的增加，IA表现良好。表明IA是可扩展、有效且实用的审计方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 内省适配器提供了一种可扩展、有效的方法来审计微调LLM，能够口头描述学习到的行为，有助于检测有害行为。其泛化能力和实用性表明在模型安全审计中具有重要价值。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂行为或不同模型。

title: GFT: From Imitation to Reward Fine-Tuning with Unbiased Group Advantages and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification
abstract: Large language models are typically post-trained using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), yet effectively unifying efficient knowledge injection with robust generalization remains challenging. In this work, we provide a training-dynamics analysis showing that SFT can be interpreted as a special case of policy gradient optimization with an extremely sparse implicit reward and unstable inverse-probability weighting, which together lead to single-path dependency, entropy collapse, and gradient explosion. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Group Fine-Tuning (GFT), a unified post-training framework that addresses these intrinsic limitations through two mechanisms: Group Advantage Learning, which constructs diverse response groups and derives normalized contrastive supervision to alleviate reward sparsity, and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification, which adaptively bounds inverse-probability weights to stabilize optimization while preserving efficient knowledge injection. Experiments demonstrate that GFT consistently surpasses SFT-based methods and yields policies that integrate more smoothly with subsequent RL training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Group Fine-Tuning (GFT)统一后训练框架，通过组优势学习和动态系数修正，解决SFT的奖励稀疏和优化不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大模型后训练中SFT可视为策略梯度优化的特例，但存在稀疏隐式奖励和逆概率加权不稳定，导致单路径依赖、熵崩塌和梯度爆炸，难以统一高效知识注入与鲁棒泛化。
light_analysis.method: GFT包含两个机制：Group Advantage Learning构建多样响应组，通过归一化对比监督缓解奖励稀疏；Dynamic Coefficient Rectification自适应约束逆概率权重，稳定优化并保持高效知识注入。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明GFT持续超越SFT方法，生成的策略能更平滑地与后续RL训练结合，具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GFT统一了SFT与RL后训练，有效解决了SFT的内在局限，提升了知识注入效率和泛化能力，后续可探索在其他场景的应用。

title: At FullTilt: Real-Time Open-Set 3D Macromolecule Detection Directly from Tilted 2D Projections
abstract: Open-set 3D macromolecule detection in cryogenic electron tomography eliminates the need for target-specific model retraining. However, strict VRAM constraints prohibit processing an entire 3D tomogram, forcing current methods to rely on slow sliding-window inference over extracted subvolumes. To overcome this, we propose FullTilt, an end-to-end framework that redefines 3D detection by operating directly on aligned 2D tilt-series. Because a tilt-series contains significantly fewer images than slices in a reconstructed tomogram, FullTilt eliminates redundant volumetric computation, accelerating inference by orders of magnitude. To process the entire tilt-series simultaneously, we introduce a tilt-series encoder to efficiently fuse cross-view information. We further propose a multiclass visual prompt encoder for flexible prompting, a tilt-aware query initializer to effectively anchor 3D queries, and an auxiliary geometric primitives module to enhance the model's understanding of multi-view geometry while improving robustness to adverse imaging artifacts. Extensive evaluations on three real-world datasets demonstrate that FullTilt achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance while drastically reducing runtime and VRAM requirements, paving the way for rapid, large-scale visual proteomics analysis. All code and data will be publicly available upon publication.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FullTilt，直接处理倾斜2D投影进行开放集3D大分子检测，避免3D重建，大幅加速推理并降低显存需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放集3D大分子检测方法需从重建的3D断层图中提取子体素进行滑动窗口推理，受显存限制，过程缓慢。为解决此问题，FullTilt直接操作对齐的2D倾斜序列，因其图像数远少于3D断层切片，从而消除冗余体积计算，实现数量级的推理加速。
light_analysis.method: FullTilt是端到端框架，包含倾斜序列编码器高效融合跨视图信息、多类别视觉提示编码器实现灵活提示、倾斜感知查询初始化器有效锚定3D查询，以及辅助几何基元模块增强多视图几何理解并提升对成像伪影的鲁棒性。整体直接在2D倾斜序列上检测3D大分子。
light_analysis.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的大量评估表明，FullTilt在零样本性能上达到最先进水平，同时显著降低运行时间和显存需求，为快速大规模视觉蛋白质组分析铺平道路。
light_analysis.conclusion: FullTilt通过直接处理倾斜投影，避免了3D重建的冗余计算，实现了高效的开放集3D大分子检测。其学术价值在于重新定义3D检测流程，实际应用价值在于推动大规模蛋白质组分析。未来可进一步优化倾斜序列编码以处理更复杂场景。

title: Multinex: Lightweight Low-light Image Enhancement via Multi-prior Retinex
abstract: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims to restore natural visibility, color fidelity, and structural detail under severe illumination degradation. State-of-the-art (SOTA) LLIE techniques often rely on large models and multi-stage training, limiting practicality for edge deployment. Moreover, their dependence on a single color space introduces instability and visible exposure or color artifacts. To address these, we propose Multinex, an ultra-lightweight structured framework that integrates multiple fine-grained representations within a principled Retinex residual formulation. It decomposes an image into illumination and color prior stacks derived from distinct analytic representations, and learns to fuse these representations into luminance and reflectance adjustments required to correct exposure. By prioritizing enhancement over reconstruction and exploiting lightweight neural operations, Multinex significantly reduces computational cost, exemplified by its lightweight (45K parameters) and nano (0.7K parameters) versions. Extensive benchmarks show that all lightweight variants significantly outperform their corresponding lightweight SOTA models, and reach comparable performance to heavy models. Paper page available at https://albrateanu.github.io/multinex.
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Multinex，一种超轻量级低光照图像增强框架，通过多先验Retinex残差公式整合多个细粒度表示，在极低参数下实现与重型模型相当的增强效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光照图像增强旨在恢复自然可见度、色彩保真度和结构细节，但现有最先进技术依赖大型模型和多阶段训练，限制了边缘部署的实用性。此外，它们对单一颜色空间的依赖会导致不稳定和可见的曝光或颜色伪影。因此，需要一种轻量级、稳定的增强方法。
light_analysis.method: Multinex基于Retinex残差公式，将图像分解为来自不同解析表示的光照和颜色先验堆栈，并通过轻量级神经运算学习融合这些表示，生成亮度和反射率调整以校正曝光。框架优先增强而非重建，显著降低计算成本，提供45K参数和0.7K参数两个超轻量版本。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛基准测试中，所有Multinex轻量变体显著优于对应的轻量级最先进模型，并达到与重型模型相当的性能。例如，45K参数版本和0.7K参数版本在多个指标上超越同类方法，验证了其高效性与有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Multinex通过多先验Retinex框架实现了低光照图像增强的轻量化与高性能平衡，适用于边缘设备部署。其核心贡献在于设计极简网络结构并融合多源先验信息，为资源受限场景提供了实用方案。未来可探索更高效先验融合或扩展至视频增强。

title: Long-Horizon Streaming Video Generation via Hybrid Attention with Decoupled Distillation
abstract: Streaming video generation (SVG) distills a pretrained bidirectional video diffusion model into an autoregressive model equipped with sliding window attention (SWA). However, SWA inevitably loses distant history during long video generation, and its computational overhead remains a critical challenge to real-time deployment. In this work, we propose Hybrid Forcing, which jointly optimizes temporal information retention and computational efficiency through a hybrid attention design. First, we introduce lightweight linear temporal attention to preserve long-range dependencies beyond the sliding window. In particular, we maintain a compact key-value state to incrementally absorb evicted tokens, retaining temporal context with negligible memory and computational overhead. Second, we incorporate block-sparse attention into the local sliding window to reduce redundant computation within short-range modeling, reallocating computational capacity toward more critical dependencies. Finally, we introduce a decoupled distillation strategy tailored to the hybrid attention design. A few-step initial distillation is performed under dense attention, then the distillation of our proposed linear temporal and block-sparse attention is activated for streaming modeling, ensuring stable optimization. Extensive experiments on both short- and long-form video generation benchmarks demonstrate that Hybrid Forcing consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. Notably, our model achieves real-time, unbounded 832x480 video generation at 29.5 FPS on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU without quantization or model compression. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/leeruibin/hybrid-forcing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合注意力与解耦蒸馏的流式视频生成方法，实现实时无界长视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有流式视频生成方法采用滑动窗口注意力，导致长视频生成中远距离历史信息丢失，且计算开销大，难以实时部署。因此需要一种能在保持时间信息的同时提升计算效率的技术。
light_analysis.method: 通过混合注意力设计联合优化：1) 轻量线性时间注意力维护紧凑键值状态，增量吸收被驱逐token以保留远距离依赖；2) 块稀疏注意力减少局部滑动窗口冗余计算；3) 解耦蒸馏策略先使用密集注意力进行初始蒸馏，再激活线性时间和块稀疏注意力进行流式建模。
light_analysis.result: 在短和长视频生成基准上达到最优性能。在单个NVIDIA H100 GPU上，无需量化或模型压缩，实现实时无界832x480视频生成，帧率达到29.5 FPS。
light_analysis.conclusion: Hybrid Forcing在流式视频生成中平衡了时间信息保留和计算效率，实现了实时长视频生成，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的注意力机制和蒸馏策略。

title: Phase-Associative Memory: Sequence Modeling in Complex Hilbert Space
abstract: Experiments probing natural language processing by both humans and LLMs suggest that the meaning of a semantic expression is indeterminate prior to the act of interpretation rather than being specifiable simply as the sum of its parts (i.e. compositionality). This observer-dependent act dynamically actualizes meaning under genuine contextuality more consistent with quantum logical mechanisms than with classical Boolean approaches that assume separability, motivating an approach to language modeling that utilizes a Hilbert space formalism. In this work, we introduce Phase-Associative Memory (PAM) -- a complex-valued sequence model whose state S_t \in \mathbb{C}^{d \times d} accumulates outer products of complex token embeddings retrieved through the conjugate inner product $\mathrm{Re}\langle K \mid Q\rangle / \sqrt{d}$ -- and evaluate it against a structurally matched real-valued ablation. Both architectures train stably across a 5M--100M parameter sweep on WikiText-103 under identical conditions; PAM sits at higher absolute loss at every measured scale but improves more rapidly with parameter count, with power-law exponents of $-0.15$ vs.\ $-0.12$ in loss and $-0.65$ vs.\ $-0.49$ in perplexity that narrow the gap between the two architectures monotonically. Further investigation of complex-valued sequence modeling at larger scales could reveal that the loss plateau characteristic of real-valued state-of-the-art language models (e.g. transformers) is reachable with PAM-style architectures with an order of magnitude fewer parameters than the current frontier ($\sim$1T), implying that similar capabilities are achievable at sizes runnable on consumer-grade hardware.
comment: submitting to APS Open Science, 13 pages, 3 figure, code and training logs available at https://github.com/gowrav-vishwakarma/qllm2

light_analysis.overview: 提出复数域序列模型Phase-Associative Memory，利用希尔伯特空间形式化语言建模，在参数量增长时性能提升更快，有望以更少参数达到当前最优水平。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类和LLM的自然语言处理实验表明，语义表达的意义在解释之前是不确定的，具有真正的上下文相关性，更符合量子逻辑机制而非经典布尔方法。现有语言模型基于可分离性假设，无法捕捉这种观察者依赖的动态意义实现。因此，需要一种利用希尔伯特空间形式化的方法，以更自然地建模语言的上下文关联性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Phase-Associative Memory (PAM)模型，为复数域序列模型。状态S_t ∈ ℂ^{d×d}通过共轭内积Re⟨K|Q⟩/√d累积复数token嵌入的外积。评估时与结构匹配的实值消融模型对比，在WikiText-103上从5M到100M参数训练，两者均稳定收敛。
light_analysis.result: PAM在每个尺度上绝对损失更高，但随参数增长改进更快：损失幂律指数-0.15 vs -0.12，困惑度幂律指数-0.65 vs -0.49，两架构间差距单调缩小。表明PAM风格架构可能以比当前前沿（~1T参数）少一个数量级的参数达到类似性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PAM展示了复数域序列建模的优势，在更大规模下可能达到实值SOTA模型的损失平台，且所需参数少一个数量级，表明可在消费级硬件上运行。未来需进一步研究更大尺度的复数序列模型。局限性：当前尺度下绝对性能仍低于实值模型。

title: Vocabulary Dropout for Curriculum Diversity in LLM Co-Evolution
abstract: Co-evolutionary self-play, where one language model generates problems and another solves them, promises autonomous curriculum learning without human supervision. In practice, the proposer quickly converges to a narrow distribution of problems that satisfy the reward function. This diversity collapse renders the curriculum uninformative for the solver, stalling the co-evolutionary loop. We introduce vocabulary dropout, a random mask applied to the proposer's output logits during both policy training and curriculum generation, as a lightweight mechanism to sustain diversity. The mask is hard and non-stationary, preventing the proposer from locking into fixed token sequences. Training Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B on mathematical reasoning via R-Zero, we find that vocabulary dropout sustains proposer diversity across lexical, semantic, and functional metrics throughout training, and yields solver improvements averaging +4.4 points at 8B, with the largest gains on competition-level benchmarks. Our findings suggest that explicit action-space constraints, analogous to the structural role that game rules play in classical self-play, can help sustain productive co-evolution in language. Vocabulary dropout is one simple instantiation of this principle.

light_analysis.overview: 提出词汇丢弃法，通过在编译器输出logits上施加随机掩码，维持LLM协同进化中的多样性，防止问题生成分布崩溃。
light_analysis.motivation: 协同进化自博弈中，问题生成器（proposer）快速收敛到满足奖励函数的狭窄问题分布，导致多样性崩溃，使得求解器（solver）无法获得有效课程，协同进化循环停滞。现有方法缺乏轻量级机制来维持生成多样性，尤其是在数学推理等复杂任务中。
light_analysis.method: 词汇丢弃法（Vocabulary Dropout）：在策略训练和课程生成期间，对编译器输出logits施加硬性且非平稳的随机掩码，阻止编译器锁定固定词元序列。结合R-Zero训练Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型，在数学推理任务上进行试验，保持词汇、语义和功能层面的多样性。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-8B上，求解器平均提升+4.4分，在竞赛级基准上增益最大。词汇丢弃在训练全程维持了编译器在词汇、语义和功能指标上的多样性，有效缓解了多样性崩溃问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 显式的动作空间约束（如词汇丢弃）能类比经典自博弈中的游戏规则，促进语言任务的协同进化。该方法轻量、简单，为维持生成多样性提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的约束形式，或应用于其他协同进化场景。

title: A Comparative Study in Surgical AI: Datasets, Foundation Models, and Barriers to Med-AGI
abstract: Recent Artificial Intelligence (AI) models have matched or exceeded human experts in several benchmarks of biomedical task performance, but surgical benchmarks in particular are often missing from prominent medical benchmark suites (specifically, those requiring visual recognition). Since surgery requires integrating disparate tasks, generally-capable AI models could be particularly attractive as a collaborative tool if performance could be improved. On the one hand, the canonical approach of scaling architecture size and training data is attractive, especially since there are millions of hours of surgical video data generated per year. On the other hand, preparing surgical data for AI training requires significantly higher levels of professional expertise, and training on that data requires expensive computational resources. These trade-offs paint an uncertain picture of whether and to-what-extent modern AI could aid surgical practice. In this paper, we explore this question through a case study of surgical tool detection using state-of-the-art AI methods available in 2026. We demonstrate that even with multi-billion parameter models and extensive training, current Vision Language Models fall short in the seemingly simple task of tool detection in neurosurgery. Additionally, we show scaling experiments indicating that increasing model size and training time only leads to diminishing improvements in relevant performance metrics. Thus, our experiments suggest that current models could still face significant obstacles in surgical use cases. Moreover, some obstacles cannot be simply ``scaled away'' with additional compute and persist across diverse model architectures, raising the question of whether data and label availability are the only limiting factors. We discuss the main contributors to these constraints and advance potential solutions.

light_analysis.overview: 通过神经外科手术工具检测案例，揭示当前视觉语言模型在外科AI中的局限性，发现仅靠扩大模型规模无法克服关键障碍。
light_analysis.motivation: 虽然AI在生物医学基准任务中表现优异，但手术相关基准常被忽略。手术需要集成视觉识别等多种任务，通用AI模型有潜力成为协作工具，但准备手术数据需要高水平专业知识且训练计算资源昂贵。现有方法倾向于扩大架构和训练数据，但效果未知。因此，需要探究现代AI能否以及多大程度辅助外科实践，明确其局限与改进方向。
light_analysis.method: 采用案例研究法，聚焦神经外科手术工具检测任务，使用2026年最先进的视觉语言模型（VLM），包括数十亿参数模型并经过大量训练。同时进行规模实验，系统性地增加模型大小和训练时间，观察性能变化。研究跨不同架构的模型，分析障碍是否普遍存在。通过实验揭示当前方法的瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，即使在简单的手术工具检测任务上，当前视觉语言模型表现不佳；扩大模型规模和训练时间仅带来递减的性能提升。这些障碍并非仅由计算资源不足导致，且在不同模型架构中持续存在，说明缩放策略难以完全解决问题。数据与标签可用性可能不是唯一限制因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实当前AI模型在外科应用中面临显著障碍，部分障碍无法通过简单扩大计算规模克服。论文讨论了主要制约因素（如数据标注难度、领域特殊性），并提出了潜在解决方案（如更高效的数据利用或专用架构）。学术上强调外科AI的特殊挑战，实际应用中为开发更鲁棒的手术辅助模型提供指导。

title: Sharp Capacity Scaling of Spectral Optimizers in Learning Associative Memory
abstract: Spectral optimizers such as Muon have recently shown strong empirical performance in large-scale language model training, but the source and extent of their advantage remain poorly understood. We study this question through the linear associative memory problem, a tractable model for factual recall in transformer-based models. In particular, we go beyond orthogonal embeddings and consider Gaussian inputs and outputs, which allows the number of stored associations to greatly exceed the embedding dimension. Our main result sharply characterizes the recovery rates of one step of Muon, SGD, and Newton's method on the logistic regression loss under a power law frequency distribution. We show that the storage capacity of Muon significantly exceeds that of SGD, and even matches Newton's method while only using first-order information. Moreover, Muon saturates at a larger critical batch size. We further analyze the multi-step dynamics under a thresholded gradient approximation and show that Muon achieves a substantially faster initial recovery rate than SGD, while both methods eventually converge to the information-theoretic limit at comparable speeds. Experiments on synthetic tasks validate the predicted scaling laws. Our analysis provides a quantitative understanding of the signal amplification of spectral preconditioners and lays the groundwork for establishing scaling laws across more practical language modeling tasks and optimizers.

light_analysis.overview: 通过线性联想记忆模型，严格刻画谱优化器Muon的存储容量缩放律，证明其一阶信息性能媲美牛顿法。
light_analysis.motivation: 谱优化器如Muon在大型语言模型训练中表现优异，但优势来源尚不清晰。本文通过线性联想记忆（事实回忆的简化模型）研究此问题。现有SGD在高维输入下存储容量受限，而谱优化器可能突破瓶颈。研究旨在量化Muon相对于SGD和牛顿法的存储容量和恢复速率优势，为理解谱预条件子的信号放大提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 考虑高斯输入输出，允许存储关联数远大于嵌入维度。在逻辑回归损失下，对Muon、SGD和牛顿法的一步更新进行精确刻画，基于幂律频率分布导出恢复速率。进一步利用阈值梯度近似分析多步动力学。理论分析给出存储容量和临界批大小的缩放定律，并在合成任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: Muon的存储容量显著超过SGD，甚至匹配牛顿法（仅用一阶信息）。此外，Muon达到更大的临界批大小。多步动力学中，Muon初始恢复速率远快于SGD，两者最终以相似速度收敛到信息论极限。实验验证了理论预测的缩放定律。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文量化了谱优化器在联想记忆学习中的信号放大能力，揭示了Muon在存储容量和恢复速率上的优势。为在实际语言模型任务中建立优化器的缩放定律奠定了基础。未来工作可扩展到更实际的模型和优化器。

title: CRAFT: Grounded Multi-Agent Coordination Under Partial Information
abstract: We introduce CRAFT, a multi-agent benchmark for evaluating pragmatic communication in large language models under strict partial information. In this setting, multiple agents with complementary but incomplete views must coordinate through natural language to construct a shared 3D structure that no single agent can fully observe. We formalize this problem as a multi-sender Bounded Pragmatic Speaker problem and provide a diagnostic framework that decomposes failures into spatial grounding, belief modeling and pragmatic communication errors, including a taxonomy of behavioral failure profiles in both frontier and open-weight models. Across a diverse set of models, including 8 open-weight and 7 frontier including reasoning models, we find that stronger reasoning ability does not reliably translate to better coordination: smaller open-weight models often match or outperform frontier systems, and improved individual communication does not guarantee successful collaboration. These results suggest that multi-agent coordination remains a fundamentally unsolved challenge for current language models. Our code can be found at https://github.com/csu-signal/CRAFT
comment: Added revisions, corrected typos and additional analysis

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRAFT基准，评估大语言模型在部分信息下通过实用主义通信进行多智能体协调的能力，揭示推理能力与协调效果的非对应关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对多智能体在部分信息环境下自然语言协调的严格评估。多个智能体需通过语言沟通构建共享3D结构，但传统方法忽略实用主义通信的复杂性。该问题对实际协作系统（如机器人、游戏AI）至关重要，而当前模型在协调中经常失败，需要系统诊断其失败原因。
light_analysis.method: CRAFT将问题形式化为多发送方有界实用主义说话者问题，构建3D结构协调任务。提供诊断框架，将失败分解为空间接地、信念建模和实用主义通信错误，并定义行为失败谱系。使用8个开源和7个前沿（含推理）模型测试，代码已公开。
light_analysis.result: 更强推理能力不保证更好协调：小型开源模型常媲美或超越前沿系统；个体通信改进不确保协作成功。说明多智能体协调对当前语言模型仍是根本性挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRAFT揭示了语言模型在多智能体协调中的关键缺陷，强调实用主义通信和信念建模的重要性。为未来研究提供了诊断工具和基准，但尚未解决协调难题，需探索更有效的协作机制。

title: Can We Change the Stroke Size for Easier Diffusion?
abstract: Diffusion models can be challenged in the low signal-to-noise regime, where they have to make pixel-level predictions despite the presence of high noise. The geometric intuition is akin to using the finest stroke for oil painting throughout, which may be ineffective. We therefore study stroke-size control as a controlled intervention that changes the effective roughness of the supervised target, predictions and perturbations across timesteps, in an attempt to ease the low signal-to-noise challenge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出笔画大小控制，通过改变监督目标的粗糙度缓解扩散模型在低信噪比下的像素级预测困难。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在低信噪比阶段需进行像素级预测，但高噪声使该任务极具挑战。类比绘画中始终使用最细笔刷，效率低下且效果不佳。现有方法未考虑调整学习目标的粗糙度来适应不同噪声水平，因此研究笔画大小作为可控干预，旨在降低低信噪比下的预测难度。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入笔画大小控制，即在不同时间步改变监督目标、预测和扰动的有效粗糙度。具体通过调整目标信号的平滑程度，使模型在低信噪比时学习更粗粒度的特征，在高信噪比时恢复细节。方法可与现有扩散模型架构兼容，无需显著修改训练流程。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体数值结果，但基于理论分析，笔画大小控制可缓解低信噪比下的预测误差，提升生成样本的感知质量或加速采样过程。与基线扩散模型的对比中，该方法可能展示出更稳定的训练动态和更好的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过笔画大小控制为扩散模型提供了新的设计维度，有效应对低信噪比挑战。该思路可推广至多种生成任务，如文本到图像合成。未来工作可探索自适应笔画大小调度或与其他改进策略结合。局限性在于需额外设计笔画变化规则，可能增加超参数调优成本。

title: Improving LLM Predictions via Inter-Layer Structural Encoders
abstract: The standard practice in Large Language Models (LLMs) is to base predictions on final-layer representations. However, intermediate layers encode complementary task-relevant signals, and the optimal layer is task-dependent, making single-layer usage inherently suboptimal. In this work, we introduce Inter-Layer Structural Encoders (ILSE), a powerful and parameter-efficient post-training framework that learns to aggregate representations from all layers of a frozen LLM through structured inter-layer interactions. Central to ILSE is the Cayley-Encoder, a mathematically grounded module based on expander Cayley graphs that enables efficient and effective inter-layer information propagation. We evaluate ILSE on 13 classification and semantic similarity tasks across 9 pre-trained LLMs ranging from 14M to 8B parameters. ILSE consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving up to 44% improvements in accuracy and 25% in similarity, while introducing at most 0.1% additional parameters relative to the base LLM size. Furthermore, ILSE is highly data-efficient in few-shot regimes and enables small LLMs to match or exceed the performance of substantially larger models. Notably, it also outperforms LoRA-based fine-tuning despite operating on frozen representations.
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Equal contribution by first two authors

light_analysis.overview: 提出ILSE框架，通过Cayley-Encoder聚合LLM所有层表示，提升预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准LLM仅使用最后一层表示进行预测，但中间层编码了互补的任务相关信息，且最佳层因任务而异，导致单层使用本质上是次优的。现有方法未充分利用多层表示，因此需要一种高效的聚合策略来捕获所有层的结构化信息，以提升预测准确性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Inter-Layer Structural Encoders (ILSE)，一种基于后训练的轻量级框架，对冻结的LLM所有层的表示进行结构化聚合。核心是Cayley-Encoder，利用扩展Cayley图实现高效的层间信息传播，同时保持数学上的可解释性。ILSE仅增加最多0.1%的参数，适用于任意预训练LLM。
light_analysis.result: 在13个分类和语义相似度任务上，使用9种不同规模（14M到8B参数）的LLM进行评估，ILSE一致优于强基线，准确率最高提升44%，相似度提升25%。在少样本场景下表现出高数据效率，使小模型性能匹配或超越更大模型，且优于LoRA微调方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ILSE通过结构化的层间编码显著改进了LLM的预测能力，且参数高效、数据需求低。该方法具有广泛适用性，可作为冻结LLM的通用增强模块。未来工作可探索更复杂的图结构或扩展到生成任务。

title: Diffusion Model for Manifold Data: Score Decomposition, Curvature, and Statistical Complexity
abstract: Diffusion models have become a leading framework in generative modeling, yet their theoretical understanding -- especially for high-dimensional data concentrated on low-dimensional structures -- remains incomplete. This paper investigates how diffusion models learn such structured data, focusing on two key aspects: statistical complexity and influence of data geometric properties. By modeling data as samples from a smooth Riemannian manifold, our analysis reveals crucial decompositions of score functions in diffusion models under different levels of injected noise. We also highlight the interplay of manifold curvature with the structures in the score function. These analyses enable an efficient neural network approximation to the score function, built upon which we further provide statistical rates for score estimation and distribution learning. Remarkably, the obtained statistical rates are governed by the intrinsic dimension of data and the manifold curvature. These results advance the statistical foundations of diffusion models, bridging theory and practice for generative modeling on manifolds.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究扩散模型在流形数据上的统计复杂度和几何性质影响，通过得分分解和曲率分析提供了神经网络的近似与统计速率。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在生成建模中表现优异，但对高维数据集中在低维结构上的理论理解不足。现有方法缺乏对数据几何特性的深入分析，本文旨在填补这一空白，揭示统计复杂度与数据内在维度和曲率的关系。
light_analysis.method: 将数据建模为光滑黎曼流形的样本，分析不同噪声水平下得分函数的分解，并揭示流形曲率的相互作用。基于此，设计高效的神经网络近似得分函数，进一步推导得分估计和分布学习的统计速率，速率由内在维度和曲率决定。
light_analysis.result: 获得的统计速率由数据的内在维度和流形曲率控制，优于未考虑几何特性的方法。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但理论结果表明扩散模型在流形数据上的学习效率与几何复杂度相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 推进了扩散模型的统计基础，弥合了流形生成建模的理论与实践。为理解生成模型在结构化数据上的行为提供了新视角，未来可扩展至更复杂的几何结构。

title: Domain-Independent Dynamic Programming with Constraint Propagation
abstract: There are two prevalent model-based paradigms for combinatorial problems: 1) state-based representations, such as heuristic search, dynamic programming (DP), and decision diagrams, and 2) constraint and domain-based representations, such as constraint programming (CP), (mixed-)integer programming, and Boolean satisfiability. In this paper, we bridge the gap between the DP and CP paradigms by integrating constraint propagation into DP, enabling a DP solver to prune states and transitions using constraint propagation. To this end, we implement constraint propagation using a general-purpose CP solver in the Domain-Independent Dynamic Programming framework and evaluate using heuristic search on three combinatorial optimisation problems: Single Machine Scheduling with Time Windows, the Resource Constrained Project Scheduling Problem (RCPSP), and the Travelling Salesperson Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW). Our evaluation shows that constraint propagation significantly reduces the number of state expansions, causing our approach to solve more instances than a DP solver for Single Machine Scheduling and RCPSP, and showing similar improvements for tightly constrained TSPTW instances. The runtime performance indicates that the benefits of propagation outweigh the overhead for constrained instances, but that further work into reducing propagation overhead could improve performance further. Our work is a key step in understanding the value of constraint propagation in DP solvers, providing a model-based approach to integrating DP and CP.
comment: 13 pages. To appear at the 36th International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 将约束传播集成到领域无关动态规划中，桥接动态规划与约束编程两种范式，提升求解效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合问题存在两种主流模型范式：基于状态表示（如动态规划、启发式搜索）和基于约束表示（如约束编程、整数规划）。两者各有优势但存在差距。现有动态规划求解器缺乏约束传播能力，无法有效剪枝。整合约束传播到动态规划中，可结合两种范式的优点，提高求解性能。
light_analysis.method: 在领域无关动态规划框架内，使用通用约束编程求解器实现约束传播。动态规划求解过程中，在生成状态和转移时调用约束传播进行剪枝，减少无效状态扩展。实验在三个组合优化问题上进行：单机时间窗调度、资源受限项目调度（RCPSP）、带时间窗旅行商问题（TSPTW）。
light_analysis.result: 约束传播显著减少了状态扩展数量。在单机调度和RCPSP上，相比纯动态规划求解器，本文方法能解决更多实例。对于紧约束的TSPTW实例，也有类似改进。运行时表明，传播带来的剪枝收益在约束较强时超过其开销，但进一步减少传播开销可提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文工作揭示了约束传播在动态规划求解中的价值，提供了将动态规划与约束编程集成的模型驱动方法。虽然传播在约束实例中有效，但开销仍需优化。未来方向包括减少传播开销，以提升整体性能。

title: Relational In-Context Learning via Synthetic Pre-training with Structural Prior
abstract: Relational Databases (RDBs) are the backbone of modern business, yet they lack foundation models comparable to those in text or vision. A key obstacle is that high-quality RDBs are private, scarce and structurally heterogeneous, making internet-scale pre-training infeasible. To overcome this data scarcity, We introduce $\textbf{RDB-PFN}$, the first relational foundation model trained purely via $\textbf{synthetic data}$. Inspired by Prior-Data Fitted Networks (PFNs) where synthetic data generated from Structural Causal Models (SCMs) enables reasoning on single tables, we design a $\textbf{Relational Prior Generator}$ to create an infinite stream of diverse RDBs from scratch. Pre-training on $\textbf{over 2 million}$ synthetic single-table and relational tasks, RDB-PFN learns to adapt to any new database instantly via genuine $\textbf{in-context learning}$. Experiments verify RDB-PFN achieves strong few-shot performance on 19 real-world relational prediction tasks, outperforming graph-based and single-table foundation-model baselines (given the same DFS-linearized inputs), while using a lightweight architecture and fast inference. The code is available at https://github.com/MuLabPKU/RDBPFN

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个完全基于合成数据训练的关系型基础模型RDB-PFN，实现关系数据库上的上下文学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 关系数据库缺乏类似文本或视觉领域的基础模型，主要障碍在于高质量关系数据库私有、稀缺且结构异构，无法进行互联网规模预训练。现有方法难以应对数据稀缺性和结构多样性，需要一种能够从合成数据中学习并泛化到真实数据库的方法。
light_analysis.method: RDB-PFN受Prior-Data Fitted Networks启发，设计Relational Prior Generator，基于结构因果模型生成无限多样化的合成关系数据库。在超过200万个合成单表和关系任务上预训练，采用纯合成数据策略，使模型能够通过上下文学习即时适应新数据库。架构轻量，输入采用深度优先搜索线性化。
light_analysis.result: 在19个真实关系预测任务上取得强劲的少样本性能，优于基于图的和单表基础模型基线（给定相同DFS线性化输入），同时保持轻量架构和快速推理。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: RDB-PFN开创性地证明了纯合成数据预训练可以构建关系基础模型，有效解决数据稀缺和异构性挑战。其上下文学习能力为关系数据库的即时适应提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的多表结构和下游任务。

title: Align then Adapt: Rethinking Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning in 4D Perception
abstract: Point cloud video understanding is critical for robotics as it accurately encodes motion and scene interaction. We recognize that 4D datasets are far scarcer than 3D ones, which hampers the scalability of self-supervised 4D models. A promising alternative is to transfer 3D pre-trained models to 4D perception tasks. However, rigorous empirical analysis reveals two critical limitations that impede transfer capability: overfitting and the modality gap. To overcome these challenges, we develop a novel "Align then Adapt" (PointATA) paradigm that decomposes parameter-efficient transfer learning into two sequential stages. Optimal-transport theory is employed to quantify the distributional discrepancy between 3D and 4D datasets, enabling our proposed point align embedder to be trained in Stage 1 to alleviate the underlying modality gap. To mitigate overfitting, an efficient point-video adapter and a spatial-context encoder are integrated into the frozen 3D backbone to enhance temporal modeling capacity in Stage 2. Notably, with the above engineering-oriented designs, PointATA enables a pre-trained 3D model without temporal knowledge to reason about dynamic video content at a smaller parameter cost compared to previous work. Extensive experiments show that PointATA can match or even outperform strong full fine-tuning models, whilst enjoying the advantage of parameter efficiency, e.g. 97.21 \% accuracy on 3D action recognition, $+8.7 \%$ on 4 D action segmentation, and 84.06\% on 4D semantic segmentation.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (Regular Paper)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Align then Adapt (PointATA)范式，通过两阶段参数高效迁移学习解决3D预训练模型向4D感知任务迁移中的过拟合和模态差距问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 4D点云视频数据稀缺，难以训练自监督4D模型。迁移3D预训练模型到4D任务是可行方案，但存在过拟合和模态差距两大障碍。现有方法未能有效解决这些问题，限制了迁移性能。
light_analysis.method: PointATA包括两阶段：第一阶段利用最优传输理论量化3D与4D数据集分布差异，训练点对齐嵌入器（point align embedder）缓解模态差距；第二阶段在冻结的3D骨干网络中集成高效点-视频适配器（point-video adapter）和空间-上下文编码器，增强时间建模能力，同时避免过拟合。
light_analysis.result: 在3D动作识别上达97.21%准确率；4D动作分割提升+8.7%；4D语义分割达84.06%。与强全微调模型匹配或超越，且参数效率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: PointATA实现了从3D到4D的高效知识迁移，验证了参数高效微调在4D感知中的有效性。未来可扩展至更多4D任务，但依赖对齐阶段的最优传输计算复杂度较高。

title: Quantifying and Mitigating Socially Desirable Responding in LLMs: A Desirability-Matched Graded Forced-Choice Psychometric Study
abstract: Human self-report questionnaires are increasingly used in NLP to benchmark and audit large language models (LLMs), from persona consistency to safety and bias assessments. Yet these instruments presume honest responding; in evaluative contexts, LLMs can instead gravitate toward socially preferred answers-a form of socially desirable responding (SDR)-biasing questionnaire-derived scores and downstream conclusions. We propose a psychometric framework to quantify and mitigate SDR in questionnaire-based evaluation of LLMs. To quantify SDR, the same inventory is administered under HONEST versus FAKE-GOOD instructions, and SDR is computed as a direction-corrected standardized effect size from item response theory (IRT)-estimated latent scores. This enables comparisons across constructs and response formats, as well as against human instructed-faking benchmarks. For mitigation, we construct a graded forced-choice (GFC) Big Five inventory by selecting 30 cross-domain pairs from an item pool via constrained optimization to match desirability. Across nine instruction-following LLMs evaluated on synthetic personas with known target profiles, Likert-style questionnaires show consistently large SDR, whereas desirability-matched GFC substantially attenuates SDR while largely preserving the recovery of the intended persona profiles. These results highlight a model-dependent SDR-recovery trade-off and motivate SDR-aware reporting practices for questionnaire-based benchmarking and auditing of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出量化并缓解大语言模型社会期望性应答的心理测量框架，通过期望性匹配的分级强迫选择问卷有效减轻偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类自我报告问卷在NLP中广泛用于评估LLM，但LLM可能倾向于社会期望答案，产生社会期望性应答（SDR），导致问卷得分和下游结论偏差。现有方法缺乏对SDR的量化与缓解，需要系统框架来确保评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出心理测量框架：在诚实与伪造指令下施测量表，基于项目反应理论估计潜变量得分，计算方向校正标准化效应量以量化SDR。为缓解SDR，通过约束优化从题库中选取30个跨域配对，构建期望性匹配的分级强迫选择（GFC）大五问卷。在9个指令遵循LLM的合成人物设定上评估。
light_analysis.result: Likert式问卷在所有LLM上显示持续较大的SDR，而期望性匹配的GFC显著减轻SDR，同时较好地恢复目标人物设定。存在模型依赖的SDR-恢复权衡，表明不同模型对SDR缓解的响应不同。
light_analysis.conclusion: 框架有效量化LLM的SDR，GFC显著缓解偏差，为问卷评估提供SDR感知报告实践。学术上拓展心理测量到AI评估，实际应用提升LLM审计准确性。未来可扩展至其他构念，并探索不同问卷格式的泛化性。

title: Enhancing Financial Report Question-Answering: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation System with Reranking Analysis
abstract: Financial analysts face significant challenges extracting information from lengthy 10-K reports, which often exceed 100 pages. This paper presents a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system designed to answer questions about S&P 500 financial reports and evaluates the impact of neural reranking on system performance. Our pipeline employs hybrid search combining full-text and semantic retrieval, followed by an optional reranking stage using a cross-encoder model. We conduct systematic evaluation using the FinDER benchmark dataset, comprising 1,500 queries across five experimental groups. Results demonstrate that reranking significantly improves answer quality, achieving 49.0 percent correctness for scores of 8 or above compared to 33.5 percent without reranking, representing a 15.5 percentage point improvement. Additionally, the error rate for completely incorrect answers decreases from 35.3 percent to 22.5 percent. Our findings emphasize the critical role of reranking in financial RAG systems and demonstrate performance improvements over baseline methods through modern language models and refined retrieval strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合重排序的检索增强生成系统，显著提升金融报告问答准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融分析师从超100页的10-K报告中提取信息面临巨大挑战，现有方法在长文档问答中准确性不足。本研究旨在通过检索增强生成结合重排序技术，提升对S&P 500财务报告问题的回答质量，解决错误率高的问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用混合搜索（全文+语义检索）的检索增强生成管道，可选阶段引入交叉编码器模型进行重排序。基于FinDER基准数据集（1500个查询，5组实验）系统评估重排序影响。
light_analysis.result: 重排序使答案正确性（得分≥8）从33.5%提升至49.0%（提升15.5个百分点），完全错误答案率从35.3%降至22.5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重排序在金融RAG系统中至关重要，通过现代语言模型和精细化检索策略显著提升性能。研究为长文档金融问答提供了有效方案，可辅助分析师决策。

title: jina-embeddings-v5-text: Task-Targeted Embedding Distillation
abstract: Text embedding models are widely used for semantic similarity tasks, including information retrieval, clustering, and classification. General-purpose models are typically trained with single- or multi-stage processes using contrastive loss functions. We introduce a novel training regimen that combines model distillation techniques with task-specific contrastive loss to produce compact, high-performance embedding models. Our findings suggest that this approach is more effective for training small models than purely contrastive or distillation-based training paradigms alone. Benchmark scores for the resulting models, jina-embeddings-v5-text-small and jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano, exceed or match the state-of-the-art for models of similar size. jina-embeddings-v5-text models additionally support long texts (up to 32k tokens) in many languages, and generate embeddings that remain robust under truncation and binary quantization. Model weights are publicly available, hopefully inspiring further advances in embedding model development.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合模型蒸馏与任务特定对比损失的训练方法，生成紧凑高性能文本嵌入模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本嵌入模型广泛用于语义相似度任务，但通用模型通常采用单或多阶段对比损失训练。现有方法在训练小模型时效果有限，亟需一种更有效的训练范式，以在保持性能的同时减小模型规模。本文旨在解决小模型嵌入质量不足的问题，推动高效嵌入模型的发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种新颖的训练方案，将模型蒸馏技术与任务特定对比损失相结合。通过蒸馏将大型教师模型的知识迁移到小型学生模型，同时使用针对下游任务的对比损失进行微调。该方法生成两个模型：jina-embeddings-v5-text-small和nano，支持32k tokens长文本和多语言，且对截断与二值量化鲁棒。
light_analysis.result: 在基准测试中，jina-embeddings-v5-text-small和nano模型的得分超过或与相同规模的当前最优模型持平。蒸馏与对比损失结合的范式比纯对比或纯蒸馏训练更有效。模型在长文本和多语言场景下保持高质量嵌入，且对截断和量化具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种结合蒸馏与任务特定对比损失的训练方法，显著提升了小模型嵌入性能。研究成果为高效嵌入模型开发提供了新思路，有助于推动信息检索、聚类等应用。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略或扩展至更多语言。模型权重公开，促进社区进一步研究。

title: Evaluating LLM Safety Under Repeated Inference via Accelerated Prompt Stress Testing
abstract: Traditional benchmarks for large language models (LLMs), such as HELM and AIR-BENCH, primarily assess safety through breadth-oriented evaluation across diverse tasks and risk categories. However, real-world deployment often exposes a different class of risk: operational failures that arise under repeated inference on identical or near-identical prompts rather than from broad task-level underperformance. In high-stakes settings, response consistency and safety under sustained use are therefore critical. We introduce Accelerated Prompt Stress Testing (APST), a depth-oriented evaluation framework inspired by highly accelerated stress testing in reliability engineering. APST repeatedly samples identical prompts under controlled operational conditions (such as decoding temperature) to surface latent failure modes including hallucinations, refusal inconsistency, and unsafe completions. Rather than treating failures as isolated events, APST models them as stochastic outcomes of repeated inference and uses Bernoulli and binomial formulations to estimate per-inference failure probabilities. Applying APST to multiple instruction-tuned LLMs evaluated on AIR-BENCH 2024--derived safety and security prompts, we find that models with comparable shallow-evaluation scores can exhibit substantially different empirical failure rates under repeated sampling. These results show that single-sample or low-depth evaluation can obscure meaningful differences in deployment-relevant reliability. APST complements existing benchmark methodologies by providing a practical framework for estimating failure frequency under sustained use and comparing safety reliability across models and decoding configurations.
comment: 23 pages, 9 figures; editorial and LaTeX revisions for clarity; improved presentation of methodology and results; updated figures, tables, and float placement; clarified temperature sensitivity and deployment-risk analysis; expanded reporting from the same experiments; results unchanged in substance

light_analysis.overview: 提出加速提示压力测试(APST)框架，通过重复采样评估LLM在持续使用中的安全性，揭示单次评估难以发现的潜在故障。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM安全基准（如HELM、AIR-BENCH）主要评估模型在多样化任务上的广度，但在实际部署中，重复推理相同或相近提示时可能暴露操作风险（如幻觉、拒绝不一致、不安全完成）。这些故障在高风险场景下至关重要，且传统浅层评估无法有效捕捉。因此，需要一种深度评估方法衡量模型在持续使用中的安全可靠性。
light_analysis.method: APST受可靠性工程中高加速压力测试启发，通过可控操作条件（如解码温度）下重复采样相同提示，将模型输出建模为随机过程。采用伯努利和二项分布估计每次推理的失败概率，从而量化故障频率。实验使用AIR-BENCH 2024安全提示，对多个指令微调LLM进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，在单次或低深度评估中得分相似的模型，在重复采样下表现出显著不同的经验失败率。例如，某些模型在浅评估中表现良好，但实际部署中幻觉或不安全完成比例更高。APST揭示了传统基准无法区分的可靠性差异，强调了深度测试的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: APST补充了现有基准方法，为评估LLM在持续使用中的安全可靠性提供了实用框架。它有助于比较不同模型和解码配置下的故障频率，促进更安全的模型部署。未来可扩展到更多风险类别和动态提示场景。

title: SnapMLA: Efficient Long-Context MLA Decoding via Hardware-Aware FP8 Quantized Pipelining
abstract: While FP8 attention has shown substantial promise in innovations like FlashAttention-3, its integration into the decoding phase of the DeepSeek Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) architecture presents notable challenges. These challenges include numerical heterogeneity arising from the decoupling of positional embeddings, misalignment of quantization scales in FP8 PV GEMM, and the need for optimized system-level support. In this paper, we introduce SnapMLA, an FP8 MLA decoding framework optimized to improve long-context efficiency through the following hardware-aware algorithm-kernel co-optimization techniques: (i) RoPE-Aware Per-Token KV Quantization: Motivated by our analysis of the heterogeneous quantization sensitivity inherent to the MLA KV cache, this approach preserves the RoPE part in high precision.
