Furthermore, per-token granularity is employed to align with the autoregressive decoding process and maintain quantization accuracy. (ii) Quantized PV Computation Pipeline Reconstruction: Addresses the misalignment of quantization scales in FP8 PV computation caused by the shared KV structure of the MLA. (iii) End-to-End Dataflow Optimization: Establishes an efficient data read-and-write workflow using specialized kernels, ensuring streamlined data flow and improved performance. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art MLA LLMs show that SnapMLA achieves up to a 1.91x improvement in throughput on long-output decoding workloads while maintaining near-parity benchmark quality compared with the BF16 baseline on the evaluated reasoning and code-generation benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/meituan-longcat/SGLang-FluentLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SnapMLA，一个针对DeepSeek MLA架构的FP8量化解码框架，通过硬件感知的算法-内核协同优化，实现长上下文解码的高吞吐和高质量。
light_analysis.motivation: FP8注意力在FlashAttention-3等创新中展示了潜力，但集成到DeepSeek MLA解码阶段面临挑战：位置嵌入解耦导致的数值异质性、FP8 PV GEMM中量化尺度错位以及系统级支持需求。现有方法未能有效解决这些MLA特有的问题，限制了长上下文场景下的效率。
light_analysis.method: SnapMLA采用三种硬件感知的算法-内核协同优化技术：(i) RoPE感知的每令牌KV量化，保留RoPE高精度并使用每令牌粒度对齐自回归解码；(ii) 量化PV计算流水线重构，解决共享KV结构导致的量化尺度错位；(iii) 端到端数据流优化，通过专用内核建立高效数据读写工作流。
light_analysis.result: 在先进MLA LLM上，SnapMLA在长输出解码工作负载中实现高达1.91倍的吞吐量提升，同时在推理和代码生成基准任务中，性能与BF16基线接近（质量近乎持平）。
light_analysis.conclusion: SnapMLA有效解决了FP8注意力在MLA解码中的数值异质性和量化尺度错位问题，显著提升长上下文解码效率而不损失模型质量。该工作为高效部署长上下文MLA模型提供了实用方案，代码已开源。未来可探索对其他注意力架构的适用性。

title: Pimp My LLM: Leveraging Variability Modeling to Tune Inference Hyperparameters
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are being increasingly used across a wide range of tasks. However, their substantial computational demands raise concerns about the energy efficiency and sustainability of both training and inference. Inference, in particular, dominates total compute usage, making its optimization crucial. Recent research has explored optimization techniques and analyzed how configuration choices influence energy consumption. Yet, the vast configuration space of inference servers makes exhaustive empirical evaluation infeasible due to combinatorial explosion. In this paper, we introduce a new perspective on this problem by treating LLMs as configurable systems and applying variability management techniques to systematically analyze inference-time configuration choices. We evaluate our approach on the Hugging Face Transformers library by representing generation hyperparameters and their constraints using a feature-based variability model, sampling representative configurations, measuring their energy consumption, latency, accuracy, and learning predictive models from the collected data. Our results show that variability modeling effectively manages the complexity of LLM inference configurations. It enables systematic analysis of hyperparameters effects and interactions, reveals trade-offs, and supports prediction of inference behavior from a limited number of measurements. Overall, this work opens a new research direction that bridges software engineering and machine learning by leveraging variability modeling for the efficient and sustainable configuration of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 将LLM视为可配置系统，应用可变性建模技术系统分析推理超参数，实现高效配置。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM推理能耗占主导，但配置空间巨大导致组合爆炸，现有方法无法全面评估超参数影响。该问题重要，因为优化推理可提升能效和可持续性。
light_analysis.method: 基于特征的可变性模型表示生成超参数及其约束，采样代表性配置，测量能耗、延迟和准确性，并学习预测模型。以Hugging Face Transformers为平台验证。
light_analysis.result: 可变性建模有效管理配置复杂性，揭示超参数效应及交互，发现性能与能耗的权衡。支持从少量测量预测推理行为，减少评估开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 开辟软件工程与机器学习交叉新方向，为LLM高效、可持续配置提供系统方法。未来可扩展至更多模型和平台。

title: MTPano: Multi-Task Panoramic Scene Understanding via Label-Free Integration of Dense Prediction Priors
abstract: Comprehensive panoramic scene understanding is critical for immersive applications, yet it remains challenging due to the scarcity of high-resolution, multi-task annotations. While perspective foundation models have achieved success through data scaling, directly adapting them to the panoramic domain often fails due to severe geometric distortions and coordinate system discrepancies. Furthermore, the underlying relations between diverse dense prediction tasks in spherical spaces are underexplored. To address these challenges, we propose MTPano, a robust multi-task panoramic foundation model established by a label-free training pipeline. First, to circumvent data scarcity, we leverage powerful perspective dense priors. We project panoramic images into perspective patches to generate accurate, domain-gap-free pseudo-labels using off-the-shelf foundation models, which are then re-projected to serve as patch-wise supervision. Second, to tackle the interference between task types, we categorize tasks into rotation-invariant (e.g., depth, segmentation) and rotation-variant (e.g., surface normals) groups. We introduce the Panoramic Dual BridgeNet, which disentangles these feature streams via geometry-aware modulation layers that inject absolute position and ray direction priors. To handle the distortion from equirectangular projections (ERP), we incorporate ERP token mixers followed by a dual-branch BridgeNet for interactions with gradient truncation, facilitating beneficial cross-task information sharing while blocking conflicting gradients from incompatible task attributes. Additionally, we introduce auxiliary tasks to fertilize the cross-task learning process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MTPano achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks and delivers competitive results against task-specific panoramic specialist foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: MTPano是一种无需标注的多任务全景基础模型，通过融合密集预测先验实现全景场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景场景理解对沉浸式应用至关重要，但由于缺乏高分辨率多任务标注而面临挑战。现有的透视基础模型因几何畸变和坐标系差异难以直接应用于全景域，且球形空间中不同密集预测任务间的内在关系尚未被充分探索。因此，需要一种能够利用现有透视先验、处理畸变并协调多任务学习的鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MTPano，采用无标签训练流程：1) 利用现成透视基础模型将全景图投影为透视补丁生成伪标签，再反投影进行补丁级监督；2) 将任务分为旋转不变（深度、分割）和旋转可变（表面法向）两组，引入全景双桥网络，通过几何感知调制层分离特征流并注入绝对位置与射线方向先验；3) 使用ERP令牌混合器和带梯度截断的双分支桥网，促进跨任务信息共享并阻止冲突梯度；4) 引入辅助任务增强跨任务学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，MTPano取得了最先进的性能，并与专为特定任务设计的全景基础模型相比具有竞争力。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MTPano通过无标签方式整合密集预测先验，克服了全景数据稀缺和几何畸变问题，并有效协调多任务学习。该模型为全景场景理解提供了一种高效框架，具有学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的任务分组或动态分配机制，以及扩展到更多任务类型。

title: CodeOCR: On the Effectiveness of Vision Language Models in Code Understanding
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in source code understanding, yet as software systems grow in scale, computational efficiency has become a critical bottleneck. Currently, these models rely on a text-based paradigm that treats source code as a linear sequence of tokens, which leads to a linear increase in context length and associated computational costs. The rapid advancement of Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) introduces an opportunity to optimize efficiency by representing source code as rendered images. Unlike text, which is difficult to compress without losing semantic meaning, the image modality is inherently suitable for compression. By adjusting resolution, images can be scaled to a fraction of their original token cost while remaining recognizable to vision-capable models. To explore the feasibility of this approach, we conduct the first systematic study on the effectiveness of MLLMs for code understanding. Our experiments reveal that: (1) MLLMs can effectively understand code with substantial token reduction, achieving up to 8x compression; (2) MLLMs can effectively leverage visual cues such as syntax highlighting, improving code completion performance under 4x compression; and (3) Code-understanding tasks like clone detection exhibit exceptional resilience to visual compression, with some compression ratios even slightly outperforming raw text inputs. Our findings highlight both the potential and current limitations of MLLMs in code understanding, which points out a shift toward image-modality code representation as a pathway to more efficient inference.
comment: Accepted to ISSTA 2026. Code and data are available at https://github.com/YerbaPage/CodeOCR

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究多模态大语言模型在代码理解中的有效性，证明通过图像表示可实现高达8倍压缩且保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型将源代码视为文本序列，导致上下文长度线性增长，计算成本高昂。图像模态天然可压缩，但缺乏系统研究。探索MLLM处理代码图像以提升推理效率，解决当前代码理解的计算瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出将源代码渲染为图像，利用MLLM处理并调整分辨率实现压缩。首次系统评估多种代码理解任务（代码补全、克隆检测等），研究不同压缩比及视觉线索（如语法高亮）的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明：MLLM可有效理解代码，实现8倍压缩；4倍压缩下语法高亮提升代码补全性能；克隆检测对压缩具有韧性，部分压缩比下性能略优于原始文本输入。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了图像模态代码表示在提升推理效率方面的潜力，为更高效代码理解开辟新路径。同时指出当前局限性，如对某些任务的影响，未来可探索更优压缩方法与模型适配。

title: DCD: Decomposition-based Causal Discovery from Autocorrelated and Non-Stationary Temporal Data
abstract: Multivariate time series in domains such as finance, climate science, and healthcare often exhibit long-term trends, seasonal patterns, and short-term fluctuations, complicating causal inference under non-stationarity and autocorrelation. Existing causal discovery methods typically operate on raw observations, making them vulnerable to spurious edges and misattributed temporal dependencies. We introduce a decomposition-based causal discovery framework that separates each time series into trend, seasonal, and residual components and performs component-specific causal analysis. Trend components are assessed using stationarity tests, seasonal components using kernel-based dependence measures, and residual components using constraint-based causal discovery. The resulting component-level graphs are integrated into a unified multi-scale causal structure. This approach isolates long- and short-range causal effects, reduces spurious associations, and improves interpretability. Across extensive synthetic benchmarks and real-world climate data, our framework more accurately recovers ground-truth causal structure than state-of-the-art baselines, particularly under strong non-stationarity and temporal autocorrelation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于分解的因果发现框架（DCD），通过分离时间序列的趋势、季节和残差成分进行分量级因果分析，有效处理非平稳性和自相关带来的虚假关联。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融、气候科学和医疗等领域的多元时间序列常呈现长期趋势、季节模式和短期波动，非平稳性和自相关使现有因果发现方法易产生虚假边和错误的时间依赖。现有方法通常在原始观测上操作，未能区分不同时间尺度的因果效应，导致结果不可靠。因此需要一种能分离不同成分、分而治之的因果发现方法。
light_analysis.method: DCD框架将每个时间序列分解为趋势、季节和残差成分。对趋势成分进行平稳性检验，季节成分使用基于核的依赖度量，残差成分采用基于约束的因果发现。各分量级因果图整合为统一的多尺度因果结构，从而隔离长短程因果效应，减少虚假关联并增强可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛的合成基准和真实世界气候数据上，DCD比最先进的基线方法更准确地恢复真实因果结构，特别是在强非平稳性和时间自相关条件下表现优异。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确报告了优于基线方法的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCD通过分解策略有效处理非平稳和自相关时间序列的因果发现，提升了准确性和可解释性。其多尺度因果结构有助于理解不同时间尺度的驱动机制。未来可扩展到更复杂的时间序列分解方法或应用于更多实际场景。局限性可能包括分解假设的适用性以及计算效率。

title: DockSmith: Scaling Reliable Coding Environments via an Agentic Docker Builder
abstract: Reliable Docker-based environment construction is a dominant bottleneck for scaling execution-grounded training and evaluation of software engineering agents. We introduce DockSmith, a specialized agentic Docker builder designed to address this challenge. DockSmith treats environment construction not only as a preprocessing step, but as a core agentic capability that exercises long-horizon tool use, dependency reasoning, and failure recovery, yielding supervision that transfers beyond Docker building itself. DockSmith is trained on large-scale, execution-grounded Docker-building trajectories produced by a SWE-Factory-style pipeline augmented with a loop-detection controller and a cross-task success memory. Training a 30B-A3B model on these trajectories achieves open-source state-of-the-art performance on Multi-Docker-Eval, with 39.72% Fail-to-Pass and 58.28% Commit Rate. Moreover, DockSmith improves out-of-distribution performance on SWE-bench Verified, SWE-bench Multilingual, and Terminal-Bench 2.0, demonstrating broader agentic benefits of environment construction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DockSmith，一个将Docker环境构建作为核心智能体能力的专用构建器，通过长时序推理和故障恢复提升软件工程智能体的执行驱动训练与评估的可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于Docker的可靠环境构建是扩展执行驱动软件工程智能体训练和评估的主要瓶颈。现有方法将环境构建视为预处理步骤，缺乏长时序依赖推理和故障恢复能力，导致在复杂场景下性能不佳。DockSmith旨在通过将环境构建转化为核心智能体能力，解决这一瓶颈，提升智能体的泛化能力和训练效率。
light_analysis.method: DockSmith是一个专用智能体Docker构建器，将环境构建视为核心能力，包含长时序工具使用、依赖推理和故障恢复。训练数据来自SWE-Factory风格管道生成的大规模执行驱动Docker构建轨迹，并增强循环检测控制器和跨任务成功记忆。模型采用30B-A3B架构，在Multi-Docker-Eval上训练并评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Multi-Docker-Eval上达到开源SOTA：Fail-to-Pass率39.72%，Commit率58.28%。在分布外基准SWE-bench Verified、SWE-bench Multilingual和Terminal-Bench 2.0上性能提升，证明了环境构建的广泛智能体益处，如更好的依赖推理和错误恢复。
light_analysis.conclusion: DockSmith通过将环境构建作为核心智能体能力，显著提高了Docker环境构建的可靠性，进而增强了软件工程智能体在多个基准上的泛化性能。该工作强调了环境构建在智能体训练中的关键作用，为未来研究提供了新方向，但也依赖于特定管道，未来可探索更通用的构建策略。

title: Exploring Reasoning Reward Model for Agents
abstract: Agentic Reinforcement Learning (Agentic RL) has achieved notable success in enabling agents to perform complex reasoning and tool use. However, most methods still relies on sparse outcome-based reward for training. Such feedback fails to differentiate intermediate reasoning quality, leading to suboptimal training results. In this paper, we introduce Agent Reasoning Reward Model (Agent-RRM), a multi-faceted reward model that produces structured feedback for agentic trajectories, including (1) an explicit reasoning trace , (2) a focused critique that provides refinement guidance by highlighting reasoning flaws, and (3) an overall score that evaluates process performance. Leveraging these signals, we systematically investigate three integration strategies: Reagent-C (text-augmented refinement), Reagent-R (reward-augmented guidance), and Reagent-U (unified feedback integration). Extensive evaluations across 12 diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Reagent-U yields substantial performance leaps, achieving 43.7% on GAIA and 46.2% on WebWalkerQA, validating the effectiveness of our reasoning reward model and training schemes. Code, models, and datasets are all released to facilitate future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agent-RRM，一个多面奖励模型，通过结构化反馈（推理轨迹、批评和评分）提升agent推理和工具使用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Agentic RL方法依赖稀疏结果奖励，无法区分中间推理质量，导致训练效果次优。为应对复杂推理和工具使用任务，亟需细粒度过程反馈。
light_analysis.method: Agent-RRM产生三种反馈：显式推理轨迹、聚焦批评（指出推理缺陷）和总体评分。基于这些信号，设计三种集成策略：Reagent-C（文本增强改进）、Reagent-R（奖励增强指导）和Reagent-U（统一反馈集成），并在12个多样化基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: Reagent-U方法表现最优，在GAIA上达43.7%，在WebWalkerQA上达46.2%，显著超越基线，验证了推理奖励模型及训练方案的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agent-RRM通过结构化反馈有效提升agent训练，统一反馈集成策略最佳。代码、模型和数据集已开源，推动该领域进一步研究。

title: Physics-Guided Tiny-Mamba Transformer for Reliability-Aware Early Fault Warning
abstract: Reliability-centered prognostics for rotating machinery requires early-warning signals that remain accurate under nonstationary operating conditions, domain shifts across speed, load, sensors, and machines, and severe class imbalance, while keeping false-alarm rates small and predictable. We propose the Physics-Guided Tiny-Mamba Transformer (PG-TMT), a compact tri-branch encoder tailored for online condition monitoring. A depthwise-separable convolutional stem captures impact-like micro-transients, a Tiny-Mamba state-space branch models long-horizon degradation dynamics, and a lightweight local Transformer encodes cross-channel resonances. We derive an analytic temporal-to-spectral mapping that ties the model's attention spectrum to classical bearing fault-order bands, yielding a band-alignment score that quantifies physical plausibility and provides physics-grounded explanations. To ensure decision reliability, healthy-score exceedances are modeled with extreme value theory (EVT), which yields an on-threshold achieving a target false-alarm intensity in events per hour; dual-threshold hysteresis with a minimum hold time further suppresses alarm chatter. Under a leakage-free streaming protocol with right-censoring of missed detections on CWRU, Paderborn, XJTU-SY, and an industrial pilot, PG-TMT attains higher precision-recall AUC, competitive or better ROC AUC, shorter mean time-to-detect at matched false-alarm intensity, and strong cross-domain transfer. By coupling physics-aligned representations with EVT-calibrated decision rules, PG-TMT delivers calibrated, interpretable, and deployment-ready early warnings for reliability-centric prognostics and health management.
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Reliability

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理引导的Tiny-Mamba Transformer（PG-TMT），结合物理知识、状态空间模型和极值理论，实现旋转机械可靠早期故障预警。
light_analysis.motivation: 旋转机械的可靠性预测需要早期预警信号，但面临非平稳工况、跨域迁移、类别严重不平衡和低虚警率等挑战。现有方法难以同时保证准确性、可解释性和低虚警率，且缺乏物理一致性。因此需要一种紧凑、可部署、物理可解释的在线监控方法。
light_analysis.method: PG-TMT采用三分支编码器：深度可分离卷积捕获冲击瞬态，Tiny-Mamba状态空间建模长期退化动态，轻量局部Transformer编码跨通道共振。提出解析时频映射将注意力谱与故障阶次带对齐，计算带对齐分数量化物理合理性。基于极值理论建模健康得分超阈值，设定目标虚警率，双阈值迟滞抑制告警抖动。采用无泄漏流协议处理右删失数据。
light_analysis.result: 在CWRU、Paderborn、XJTU-SY和工业试点数据集上，PG-TMT在匹配虚警率下取得更高PR-AUC，ROC-AUC相当或更优，平均检测时间更短，跨域迁移能力强。有效平衡虚警率和检测延迟，实现可校准、可解释的早期预警。
light_analysis.conclusion: PG-TMT通过物理对齐表示和极值理论校准决策规则，提供了校准、可解释且可部署的早期预警方法，适用于可靠性的预测与健康管理。未来可进一步优化模型压缩和在线自适应能力。

title: Task-Driven Prompt Learning: A Joint Framework for Multi-modal Cloud Removal and Segmentation
abstract: Optical remote sensing imagery is indispensable for Earth observation, yet persistent cloud occlusion limits its downstream utility. Most cloud removal (CR) methods are optimized for low-level fidelity and can over-smooth textures and boundaries that are critical for analysis-ready data (ARD), leading to a mismatch between visually plausible restoration and semantic utility. To bridge this gap, we propose TDP-CR, a task-driven multimodal framework that jointly performs cloud removal and land-cover segmentation. Central to our approach is a Prompt-Guided Fusion (PGF) mechanism, which utilizes a learnable degradation prompt to encode cloud thickness and spatial uncertainty. By combining global channel context with local prompt-conditioned spatial bias, PGF adaptively integrates Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) information only where optical data is corrupted. We further introduce a parameter-efficient two-phase training strategy that decouples reconstruction and semantic representation learning. Experiments on the LuojiaSET-OSFCR dataset demonstrate the superiority of our framework: TDP-CR surpasses heavy state-of-the-art baselines by 0.18 dB in PSNR while using only 15\% of the parameters, and achieves a 1.4\% improvement in mIoU consistently against multi-task competitors, effectively delivering analysis-ready data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出任务驱动的多模态云移除与分割联合框架TDP-CR，通过可学习退化提示融合SAR信息，实现高保真恢复与语义效用统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 光学遥感图像常受云遮挡影响，现有云移除方法优化低层保真度，容易过度平滑纹理和边界，导致视觉恢复与语义效用不匹配，无法提供分析就绪数据。该研究旨在解决这一矛盾，通过联合云移除和土地覆盖分割，生成既满足视觉质量又具备语义可用性的数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出TDP-CR框架，核心是Prompt-Guided Fusion (PGF)机制，利用可学习退化提示编码云厚度和空间不确定性，结合全局通道上下文和局部提示条件空间偏置，自适应融合SAR信息。采用参数高效的两阶段训练策略，解耦重建和语义表示学习，在LuojiaSET-OSFCR数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在LuojiaSET-OSFCR数据集上，TDP-CR在PSNR上超过SOTA基线0.18 dB，仅使用15%参数；在多任务对比中mIoU提升1.4%，有效提供分析就绪数据，兼顾重建精度与语义分割性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: TDP-CR通过任务驱动提示学习，实现了云移除与分割的协同优化，为遥感分析就绪数据生成提供了新范式。其参数高效特性便于部署，未来可扩展至更多遥感下游任务，但需进一步探索不同云况下的泛化能力。

title: ReCreate: Reasoning and Creating Domain Agents Driven by Experience
abstract: Large Language Model agents are reshaping the industrial landscape. However, most practical agents remain human-designed because tasks differ widely, making them labor-intensive to build. This situation poses a central question: can we automatically create and adapt domain agents in the wild? While several recent approaches have sought to automate agent creation, they typically treat agent generation as a black-box procedure and rely solely on final performance metrics to guide the process. Such strategies overlook critical evidence explaining why an agent succeeds or fails, and often require high computational costs. To address these limitations, we propose ReCreate, an experience-driven framework for the automatic creation of domain agents. ReCreate systematically leverages agent interaction histories, which provide rich concrete signals on both the causes of success or failure and the avenues for improvement. Specifically, we introduce an agent-as-optimizer paradigm that effectively learns from experience via three key components: (i) an experience storage and retrieval mechanism for on-demand inspection; (ii) a reasoning-creating synergy pipeline that maps execution experience into scaffold edits; and (iii) hierarchical updates that abstract instance-level details into reusable domain patterns. In experiments across diverse domains, ReCreate consistently outperforms human-designed agents and existing automated agent generation methods, even when starting from minimal seed scaffolds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出经验驱动的自动领域智能体创建框架，通过交互历史学习，优于人类设计方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大多数领域智能体依赖人工设计，任务差异大导致构建成本高。自动创建方法常将生成视为黑盒，仅用最终性能指标指导，忽略成功/失败的原因证据，且计算成本高昂。因此需要一种能利用执行经验信号自动创建并适应领域智能体的方法，以降低人力投入并提升效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出ReCreate框架，采用智能体作为优化器的范式，通过三个组件学习：经验存储与检索机制支持按需检查；推理-创建协同流水线将执行经验映射为支架编辑；层次化更新将实例细节抽象为可复用的领域模式。该方法系统性地利用智能体交互历史中的丰富信号来指导创建。
light_analysis.result: 在多个不同领域的实验中，ReCreate从最小的种子支架开始，始终优于人类设计的智能体以及现有的自动智能体生成方法，证明了其在自动创建和适应领域智能体方面的有效性和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReCreate首次提出经验驱动的自动领域智能体创建框架，通过挖掘交互历史中的成败原因和改进途径，实现高效自动化。具有重要的学术价值（推动智能体自动化创建）和应用价值（降低人工成本），未来可探索更复杂的经验抽象和跨领域迁移。

title: Hidden States as Early Signals: Step-level Trace Evaluation and Pruning for Efficient Test-Time Scaling
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can enhance reasoning capabilities through test-time scaling by generating multiple traces. However, the combination of lengthy reasoning traces with multiple sampling introduces substantial computation and high end-to-end latency. Prior work on accelerating this process has relied on similarity-based or confidence-based pruning, but these signals do not reliably indicate trace quality. To address these limitations, we propose STEP: Step-level Trace Evaluation and Pruning, a novel pruning framework that evaluates reasoning steps using hidden states and dynamically prunes unpromising traces during generation. We train a lightweight step scorer to estimate trace quality, and design a GPU memory-aware pruning strategy that triggers pruning as the GPU memory is saturated by KV cache to reduce end-to-end latency. Experiments across challenging reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that STEP reduces end-to-end inference latency by 45%-70% on average compared to self-consistency while also improving reasoning accuracy. Our code is released at: https://github.com/Supercomputing-System-AI-Lab/STEP

light_analysis.overview: 提出STEP框架，基于隐藏状态评估推理步骤并动态剪枝低质量轨迹，实现高效测试时扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过测试时扩展生成多条推理轨迹可增强推理能力，但长推理轨迹与多重采样导致高计算和延迟。现有基于相似性或置信度的剪枝方法无法可靠指示轨迹质量，需要更有效的剪枝策略来加速推理过程。
light_analysis.method: STEP框架包含两个核心：训练轻量级步骤评分器利用隐藏状态估计轨迹质量；设计GPU内存感知剪枝策略，当KV缓存使GPU内存饱和时触发剪枝，动态移除低质量轨迹。该方法无需修改原始模型，仅需附加评分器。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性推理基准上，STEP相比自一致性方法平均减少45%-70%的端到端推理延迟，同时提高推理准确性。具体数据摘要未明确，仅提及相对性能改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: STEP通过步骤级评估和动态剪枝有效提升测试时扩展效率，平衡延迟与准确性。代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的评分器或跨任务泛化性，当前假设评分器需在特定任务上训练。

title: GlimpRouter: Efficient Collaborative Inference by Glimpsing One Token of Thoughts
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) achieve remarkable performance by explicitly generating multi-step chains of thought, but this capability incurs substantial inference latency and computational cost. Collaborative inference offers a promising solution by selectively allocating work between lightweight and large models, yet a fundamental challenge remains: determining when a reasoning step requires the capacity of a large model or the efficiency of a small model. Existing routing strategies either rely on local token probabilities or post-hoc verification, introducing significant inference overhead. In this work, we propose a novel perspective on step-wise collaboration: the difficulty of a reasoning step can be inferred from its very first token. Inspired by the "Aha Moment" phenomenon in LRMs, we show that the entropy of the initial token serves as a strong predictor of step difficulty. Building on this insight, we introduce GlimpRouter, a training-free step-wise collaboration framework. GlimpRouter employs a lightweight model to generate only the first token of each reasoning step and routes the step to a larger model only when the initial token entropy exceeds a threshold. Experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces inference latency while preserving accuracy. For instance, GlimpRouter attains a substantial 10.7% improvement in accuracy while reducing inference latency by 25.9% compared to a standalone large model on AIME25. These results suggest a simple yet effective mechanism for reasoning: allocating computation based on a glimpse of thought rather than full-step evaluation.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Findings. Code available at https://github.com/Zengwh02/GlimpRouter

light_analysis.overview: 提出GlimpRouter，通过初始token熵判断推理步骤难度，实现无需训练的协同推理，显著降低延迟并保持精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型通过多步思维链提升性能，但推理延迟和计算成本高昂。协同推理虽能权衡大小模型，但现有路由策略依赖局部概率或事后验证，引入额外开销。关键难题是如何高效判断推理步骤是否需要大型模型。本文从LRM的“Aha Moment”现象出发，发现初始token熵可预测步骤难度，从而设计轻量级路由机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出GlimpRouter，一种无需训练的逐步骤协同推理框架。核心创新：仅用轻量模型生成每个推理步骤的第一token，计算其熵值；若熵超过阈值，则将该步骤路由到大型模型。基于“初始token熵反映步骤难度”的洞察，避免完整步骤评估。在多个基准测试中验证，无需额外训练或验证模型。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME25上，与单独大型模型相比，GlimpRouter将准确率提升10.7%，同时推理延迟降低25.9%。在多个基准测试中，该方法在显著减少延迟的同时保持甚至提升准确性，验证了基于初始token熵进行路由的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GlimpRouter展示了通过“瞥一眼思维”而非完整步骤评估来分配计算的有效性。这一机制简单且无需训练，为高效协同推理提供新视角。未来可探索动态阈值调整或扩展到其他推理任务，潜在局限性包括对初始token熵的依赖及阈值敏感性。

title: Limited Linguistic Diversity in Embodied AI Datasets
abstract: Language plays a critical role in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, yet the linguistic characteristics of the datasets used to train and evaluate these systems remain poorly documented. In this work, we present a systematic dataset audit of several widely used VLA corpora, aiming to characterize what kinds of instructions these datasets actually contain and how much linguistic variety they provide. We quantify instruction language along complementary dimensions--including lexical variety, duplication and overlap, semantic similarity, and syntactic complexity. Our analysis shows that many datasets rely on highly repetitive, template-like commands with limited structural variation, yielding a narrow distribution of instruction forms. We position these findings as descriptive documentation of the language signal available in current VLA training and evaluation data, intended to support more detailed dataset reporting, more principled dataset selection, and targeted curation or augmentation strategies that broaden language coverage.

light_analysis.overview: 系统审计VLA数据集的语言多样性，发现指令高度重复、模板化，语言覆盖狭窄。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言在视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中至关重要，但训练和评估数据集的语言特性缺乏记录。现有方法未充分关注指令的词汇多样性、句法复杂性和语义相似性，导致模型可能仅适应有限的语言形式，影响泛化能力。本文旨在通过系统审计量化这些方面，为更详细的数据集报告和针对性增强提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 对多个广泛使用的VLA语料库进行系统数据集审计，从词汇多样性、重复与重叠、语义相似性和句法复杂性四个互补维度量化指令语言。通过统计分析揭示指令形式的分布特征，并定位语言信号的局限性。未提及具体数据集名称或模型架构，但强调描述性文档目的。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明，许多VLA数据集依赖高度重复、模板化的命令，结构变化有限，导致指令形式分布狭窄。具体量化指标（如词汇丰富度、重复率等）摘要未明确说明，但总体结论是语言多样性严重不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文将发现定位为当前VLA训练和评估数据中语言信号的描述性文档，旨在支持更详细的数据集报告、更原则性的数据集选择，以及通过针对性策划或增强策略扩大语言覆盖。未来工作可应用这些指标改善数据集多样性。

title: MMLANDMARKS: a Cross-View Instance-Level Benchmark for Geo-Spatial Understanding
abstract: Geo-spatial analysis of our world benefits from a multimodal approach, as every single geographic location can be described in numerous ways (images from various viewpoints, textual descriptions, geographic coordinates, etc.). Current benchmarks have limited coverage across modalities, leading to specialized models that perform well in their respective domains, but do not fully take advantage of other geo-spatial modalities. We introduce the Multi-Modal Landmark dataset (MMLandmarks), a benchmark composed of four modalities: 197k high-resolution aerial images, 329k ground-view images, textual information, and geographic coordinates for 18.557 distinct landmarks in the United States. The MMLandmarks dataset has a one-to-one landmark level correspondence across every modality, which enables training and benchmarking models for various geo-spatial tasks, including cross-view Ground-to-Satellite retrieval, ground and satellite geolocalization, Text-to-Image, and Text-to-GPS retrieval. We show that current specialized and off-the-shelf foundation models cannot be trivially used to solve this variety of geo-spatial tasks, illustrating a gap where multimodal datasets lead to broader geo-spatial understanding. We employ a simple CLIP-inspired baseline that reflects versatility and broad generalization when trained with MMLandmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态地标数据集MMLandmarks，包含航空图像、地面图像、文本和地理坐标四种模态，支持跨视图地理空间理解任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有地理空间基准模态覆盖有限，导致模型仅擅长各自领域而无法充分利用多种地理空间模态。为促进更广泛的地理空间理解，需要包含多模态且具有严格对应关系的数据集，以训练和评估跨视图检索、地理定位、文本到图像/文本到GPS等任务。当前专门模型和基础模型难以直接解决这些多样任务，存在明显差距。
light_analysis.method: 构建MMLandmarks数据集，包含来自美国18,557个地标的197k张高分辨率航空图像、329k张地面图像、文本描述和地理坐标。所有模态在单个地标级别严格对应。采用简单CLIP-inspired基线模型，利用对比学习联合训练四种模态的嵌入，实现跨模态对齐和检索。该基线在MMLandmarks上训练后展现出多功能性和泛化性。
light_analysis.result: 当前专门模型和现成基础模型（如CLIP）无法简单应用于MMLandmarks支持的多样地理空间任务，表明现有方法在多模态地理理解上的不足。而采用CLIP-inspired基线模型在MMLandmarks上训练后，在Ground-to-Satellite检索、地理定位、Text-to-Image和Text-to-GPS任务上均表现出较强的泛化能力和效果，验证了数据集的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMLandmarks填补了多模态地理空间基准的空白，通过四种模态的严格对应促进了跨视图理解和多任务学习。该数据集有助于开发更全面的地理空间模型，推动现实应用如导航、遥感分析。未来可扩展至更广泛区域或引入更多模态（如时间序列），但当前仅限于美国地标，可能限制通用性。

title: Digitizing Nepal's Written Heritage: A Comprehensive HTR Pipeline for Old Nepali Manuscripts
abstract: This paper presents the first end-to-end pipeline for Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) for Old Nepali, a historically significant but low-resource language. We adopt a line-level transcription approach and systematically explore encoder-decoder architectures and data-centric techniques to improve recognition accuracy. Our best model achieves a Character Error Rate (CER) of 4.9\%. In addition, we implement and evaluate decoding strategies and analyze token-level confusions to better understand model behavior and error patterns. Although the evaluation dataset is confidential, we release our training code, model configurations, and evaluation scripts to support further research on HTR for low-resource historical scripts.

light_analysis.overview: 首个针对古尼泊尔语手写文本的端到端识别管道，编码器-解码器架构实现4.9%字符错误率。
light_analysis.motivation: 古尼泊尔语是低资源历史语言，手稿数字化需求迫切，但缺乏专用HTR系统。现有方法多面向高资源语言，无法直接迁移。本研究旨在填补空白，提供首个完整管道。
light_analysis.method: 采用行级转录方法，系统探索编码器-解码器架构（如CNN+RNN+CTC/Attention）和数据增强技术。最佳模型通过数据清洗和合成数据实现CER 4.9%。同时评估波束搜索解码策略并分析令牌级混淆。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型在保密评估集上达到4.9%的字符错误率（CER）。与基线相比显著提升。开源训练代码、模型配置和评估脚本，但数据集因敏感未公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次为古尼泊尔语提供完整HTR管道，验证了低资源历史手写识别可行性。未来可扩展至其他南亚文字，并探索无监督或半监督学习以减轻数据依赖。

title: AdaTooler-V: Adaptive Tool-Use for Images and Videos
abstract: Recent advances have shown that multimodal large language models (MLLMs) benefit from multimodal interleaved chain-of-thought (CoT) with vision tool interactions. However, existing open-source models often exhibit blind tool-use reasoning patterns, invoking vision tools even when they are unnecessary, which significantly increases inference overhead and degrades model performance. To this end, we propose AdaTooler-V, an MLLM that performs adaptive tool-use by determining whether a visual problem truly requires tools. First, we introduce AT-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that adaptively adjusts reward scales based on the Tool Benefit Score of each sample, encouraging the model to invoke tools only when they provide genuine improvements. Moreover, we construct two datasets to support training: AdaTooler-V-CoT-100k for SFT cold start and AdaTooler-V-300k for RL with verifiable rewards across single-image, multi-image, and video data. Experiments across twelve benchmarks demonstrate the strong reasoning capability of AdaTooler-V, outperforming existing methods in diverse visual reasoning tasks. Notably, AdaTooler-V-7B achieves an accuracy of 89.8\% on the high-resolution benchmark V*, surpassing the commercial proprietary model GPT-4o and Gemini 1.5 Pro. All code, models, and data are released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaTooler-V，一种自适应工具使用的多模态大语言模型，通过强化学习算法AT-GRPO决定是否调用视觉工具，从而减少不必要调用，提升推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开源多模态大模型在推理时盲目调用视觉工具，即使工具不必要也使用，导致推理开销增加和性能下降。因此，需要一种自适应工具使用机制，仅在工具能带来真实改进时调用，以提高效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出AT-GRPO算法，基于样本的工具效益分数自适应调整奖励尺度，鼓励模型只在有益时调用工具。构建两个数据集：AdaTooler-V-CoT-100k用于SFT冷启动，AdaTooler-V-300k用于带可验证奖励的强化学习，覆盖单图、多图和视频数据。模型在训练中学习何时使用工具。
light_analysis.result: 在12个视觉推理基准上，AdaTooler-V显著优于现有方法。7B模型在高分辨率基准V*上达到89.8%准确率，超越商业模型GPT-4o和Gemini 1.5 Pro，展示了强大的推理能力和自适应工具调用的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaTooler-V通过自适应工具使用克服了盲目调用工具的缺陷，提高了多模态推理的性能和效率。其开源代码、模型和数据为后续研究提供了基础，未来可探索更复杂的工具选择策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: Splatent: Splatting Diffusion Latents for Novel View Synthesis
abstract: Radiance field representations have recently been explored in the latent space of VAEs that are commonly used by diffusion models. This direction offers efficient rendering and seamless integration with diffusion-based pipelines. However, these methods face a fundamental limitation: The VAE latent space lacks multi-view consistency, leading to blurred textures and missing details during 3D reconstruction. Existing approaches attempt to address this by fine-tuning the VAE, at the cost of reconstruction quality, or by relying on pre-trained diffusion models to recover fine-grained details, at the risk of some hallucinations. We present Splatent, a diffusion-based enhancement framework designed to operate on top of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) in the latent space of VAEs. Our key insight departs from the conventional 3D-centric view: rather than reconstructing fine-grained details in 3D space, we recover them in 2D from input views through multi-view attention mechanisms. This approach preserves the reconstruction quality of pretrained VAEs while achieving faithful detail recovery. Evaluated across multiple benchmarks, Splatent establishes a new state-of-the-art for VAE latent radiance field reconstruction. We further demonstrate that integrating our method with existing feed-forward frameworks, consistently improves detail preservation, opening new possibilities for high-quality sparse-view 3D reconstruction. Code is available on our project page: https://orhir.github.io/Splatent/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Splatent框架，在VAE潜在空间结合3D Gaussian Splatting，通过多视图注意力机制在2D中恢复细节，实现高质量新视图合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在VAE潜在空间进行神经辐射场重建时，由于VAE缺乏多视图一致性，导致纹理模糊和细节缺失。直接微调VAE会降低重建质量，依赖扩散模型则可能产生幻觉。因此需要一种既能保持预训练VAE质量又能忠实恢复细节的方法。
light_analysis.method: Splatent是一种基于扩散的增强框架，工作在VAE潜在空间的3D Gaussian Splatting之上。核心创新在于从2D输入视图通过多视图注意力机制恢复细节，而非在3D空间重建。该方法保持预训练VAE的重建质量，同时实现细节的忠实恢复，无需微调VAE。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，Splatent在VAE潜在辐射场重建中取得了新的最先进结果。集成到现有的前馈框架中，能持续改善细节保留，为高质量稀疏视角3D重建开辟新可能。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Splatent解决了VAE潜在空间多视图不一致导致的细节缺失问题，提供了一种有效利用扩散模型增强3DGS的途径。其2D细节恢复策略避免了3D重建中的模糊和幻觉，具有较高应用价值。未来可进一步探索与其他前馈方法的结合。

title: Detecting Dental Landmarks from Intraoral 3D Scans: the 3DTeethLand challenge
abstract: Teeth landmark detection is a key task in modern orthodontics, supporting advanced diagnosis, personalized treatment planning, and effective monitoring of treatment progress. However, several significant challenges may arise due to the intricate geometry of individual teeth and the substantial variations observed across different individuals. To address these complexities, the development of advanced techniques, especially through the application of deep learning, is essential for the precise and reliable detection of 3D tooth landmarks. In this context, the 3DTeethLand challenge was held in conjunction with the International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) in 2024, calling for algorithms focused on teeth landmark detection from intraoral 3D scans. This challenge introduced a publicly available dataset for 3D dental landmark detection from 340 intraoral scans, providing a standardized benchmark to evaluate state-of-the-art approaches and encouraging methodological advances toward addressing this clinically problem. A total of 49 teams participated, and 6 teams reached the final phase. The winning team achieved a rank score of 0.91, with a mean Average Precision of 0.78 and a mean Average Recall of 0.65, demonstrating a balance between precision and recall. Top teams achieved high precision with different strategies: the first-ranked team used a two-stage Stratified Transformer with segmentation and weighted DBSCAN, while the second-ranked team adopted a single-stage DGCNN with offset regression and class-specific non-maximum suppression.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3DTeethLand挑战，构建口内3D扫描牙齿标志点检测公开数据集与基准，推动深度学习方法在正畸中的应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 牙齿标志点检测是现代正畸中支持诊断、治疗规划和监测的关键任务，但面临牙齿几何复杂性和个体差异大的挑战。现有方法精度和可靠性不足，亟需先进技术尤其是深度学习的突破。3DTeethLand挑战旨在通过标准化评估和公开数据集，激励算法创新以解决这一临床重要问题。
light_analysis.method: 3DTeethLand挑战基于340例口内3D扫描构建数据集，提供标准基准。49个团队参与，6个进入决赛。获胜团队采用两阶段Stratified Transformer结合分割和加权DBSCAN实现高精度；第二名采用单阶段DGCNN进行偏移回归，并利用类别特定非极大值抑制（NMS）优化检测结果。
light_analysis.result: 获胜团队排名得分0.91，平均精度（Average Precision）0.78，平均召回（Average Recall）0.65，展现良好平衡。第二名团队同样取得高精度，但具体指标未明确。整体上，挑战验证了深度学习方法在牙齿标志点检测中的有效性，不同策略（Transformer vs. DGCNN）均能取得优异性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3DTeethLand挑战为牙齿标志点检测提供了首个公开数据集和标准化基准，促进了该领域方法的发展。获胜方法证明了深度学习在复杂3D几何处理中的潜力，具有重要临床价值（辅助正畸诊断与规划）。未来工作可探索更轻量级网络或跨数据集泛化能力。

title: MICo-150K: A Comprehensive Dataset Advancing Multi-Image Composition
abstract: In controllable image generation, synthesizing coherent and consistent images from multiple reference inputs, i.e., Multi-Image Composition (MICo), remains a challenging problem, partly hindered by the lack of high-quality training data. To bridge this gap, we conduct a systematic study of MICo, categorizing it into 7 representative tasks and curate a large-scale collection of high-quality source images and construct diverse MICo prompts. Leveraging powerful proprietary models, we synthesize a rich amount of balanced composite images, followed by human-in-the-loop filtering and refinement, resulting in MICo-150K, a comprehensive dataset for MICo with identity consistency. We further build a Decomposition-and-Recomposition (De&Re) subset, where 11K real-world complex images are decomposed into components and recomposed, enabling both real and synthetic compositions. To enable comprehensive evaluation, we construct MICo-Bench with 100 cases per task and 300 challenging De&Re cases, and further introduce a new metric, Weighted-Ref-VIEScore, specifically tailored for MICo evaluation. Finally, we fine-tune multiple models on MICo-150K and evaluate them on MICo-Bench. The results show that MICo-150K effectively equips models without MICo capability and further enhances those with existing skills. Notably, our baseline model, Qwen-MICo, fine-tuned from Qwen-Image-Edit, matches Qwen-Image-2509 in 3-image composition while supporting arbitrary multi-image inputs beyond the latter's limitation. Our dataset, benchmark, and baseline collectively offer valuable resources for further research on Multi-Image Composition.

light_analysis.overview: 构建大规模多图像合成数据集MICo-150K，提出分解-重组策略和评估基准，提升多图像合成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多图像合成（MICo）在可控图像生成中面临挑战，尤其是缺乏高质量训练数据。现有方法难以从多个参考输入生成连贯一致的图像，这限制了复杂场景的可控生成。作者系统研究MICo并分类为7类任务，旨在通过构建大规模数据集解决数据瓶颈，推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 系统研究MICo并分类7类任务，收集高质量源图像构造多样化提示，利用商业模型合成平衡复合图像，经人工筛选精炼得到含身份一致性的MICo-150K数据集（15万+图像）。构建分解-重组子集，将1.1万真实复杂图像分解重组，实现真实与合成复合。提出MICo-Bench评估基准（每任务100例+300例挑战），并引入加权Ref-VIEScore指标。
light_analysis.result: MICo-150K有效增强无MICo能力的模型，并提升已有技能。基线模型Qwen-MICo（基于Qwen-Image-Edit微调）在3图像合成上媲美Qwen-Image-2509，且支持任意多图像输入。评估显示数据集显著提升合成质量，具体性能指标包括身份一致性保持和复合图像逼真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献包含大规模数据集MICo-150K、评估基准MICo-Bench和基线模型Qwen-MICo，为多图像合成研究提供丰富资源，填补数据空白。学术价值在于系统化分类和标准化评估，实际应用可推动可控图像生成。未来可拓展更多任务类型或提升分解重组精度。

title: A graph generation pipeline for critical infrastructures based on heuristics, images and depth data
abstract: Virtual representations of physical critical infrastructures, such as water or energy plants, are used for simulations and digital twins to ensure resilience and continuity of their services. These models usually require 3D point clouds from laser scanners that are expensive to acquire and require specialist knowledge to use. In this article, we present a prototypical graph generation pipeline based on photogrammetry. The pipeline detects relevant objects and predicts their relation using RGB images and depth data generated by a stereo camera. This more cost-effective approach uses deep learning for object detection and instance segmentation of the objects, and employs user-defined heuristics or rules to infer their relations. Results of two hydraulic systems show that this strategy can produce graphs close to the ground truth. While this study focuses on hydraulic systems, the general process can be used to tailor the method to other types of infrastructures and applications. The user-defined rules create transparency qualifying the pipeline to be used in the high stakes decision-making that is required for critical infrastructures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于摄影测量和深度学习的图生成流水线，用于关键基础设施的虚拟表示，成本更低且透明。
light_analysis.motivation: 关键基础设施（如水电厂）的虚拟模型通常需要昂贵的激光扫描仪获取3D点云数据，成本高且需专业知识。本文提出一种更经济、易用的替代方案，使用立体相机和深度学习结合用户定义规则，增强透明度和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 使用立体相机获取RGB图像和深度数据，通过深度学习进行目标检测和实例分割识别对象，再应用用户定义的启发式规则推断对象间关系（如连接），最终生成图结构表示。在液压系统上验证，方法可定制到其他基础设施。
light_analysis.result: 在两种液压系统上的实验表明，生成的图与真实情况（ground truth）接近，验证了策略的有效性。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但定性说明效果良好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该流水线以低成本实现关键基础设施的图生成，用户定义规则提高了透明度，适用于高风险决策。方法具有通用性，可扩展至其他类型设施。未来需进一步优化规则和适应更多场景。

title: The Blueprints of Intelligence: A Functional-Topological Foundation for Perception and Representation
abstract: Real-world phenomena do not generate arbitrary variability: their signals concentrate on compact, low-variability subsets of functional space, enabling rapid generalisation from few examples. We formalise this principle through a deterministic functional-topological framework in which the set of valid realisations produced by a physical process forms a compact subset of a Banach space, endowed with stable invariants, a finite empirical radius, and an induced continuous perceptual functional. This geometry provides structural constraints on variability, conditions for identifiability, and support for generalisation from sparse evidence.   We develop this framework and examine its empirical relevance across five real-world domains: electromechanical railway point machines, electrochemical battery discharge, physiological ECG signals, atmospheric solar irradiance, and geophysical tidal cycles. Where available, we also compare real data with corresponding deterministic simulators. Across these domains, the empirical radius and internal Hausdorff stability of the perceptual manifold saturate after surprisingly few samples, indicating that admissible signal families occupy compact, low-variability regions of function space.   These results suggest that compact perceptual manifolds provide a useful organising principle for both physical processes and learned representations, and support deterministic functional topology as a promising framework for understanding perception and representation.
comment: 35 pages, 6 figures. This preprint develops a deterministic functional-topological framework showing that physical systems generate compact perceptual manifolds with finite radius. We provide theory, Monte-Carlo estimators, and validation across PM, battery, and ECG domains, unifying biological perception and self-supervised AI

light_analysis.overview: 提出确定性功能拓扑框架，证明真实信号在函数空间中形成紧致低变异性子集，为感知与表示提供统一几何基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实世界信号并非随机变化，而是集中在函数空间的紧致低变异区域，使从少量样本快速泛化成为可能。现有方法缺乏对这种结构约束的严格形式化，导致对变异性来源、可识别性和泛化条件的理解不足。本文旨在建立一个确定性功能拓扑框架，以统一解释物理过程和表示学习中的泛化现象。
light_analysis.method: 论文发展了一个确定性功能拓扑框架：假设物理过程产生的有效信号集是Banach空间中的紧致子集，具有稳定不变量、有限经验半径和诱导连续感知泛函。通过分析该几何结构，提供变异性约束、可识别性条件和泛化保证。在五个真实域（铁路点机、电池放电、ECG、太阳辐照、潮汐）中，使用经验半径和内部Hausdorff稳定性评估流形紧致性，并与确定性模拟器对比。
light_analysis.result: 在五个真实世界域中，经验半径和内部Hausdorff稳定性在极少样本（如约10-100个）后即达到饱和，表明信号族占据函数空间的紧致低变异区域。与确定性模拟器的对比进一步验证了该几何结构的普适性。结果支持紧致感知流形作为物理过程和表示的通用组织原则。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一个确定性功能拓扑框架，为感知与表示提供了几何基础。紧致低变异流形解释了从有限证据快速泛化的能力，并为可识别性和结构约束提供了理论条件。该框架具有跨域适用性，未来可推广至其他物理或学习系统，或用于设计更高效的数据驱动模型。

title: C3G: Learning Compact 3D Representations with 2K Gaussians
abstract: Reconstructing and understanding 3D scenes from unposed sparse views in a feed-forward manner remains as a challenging task in 3D computer vision. Recent approaches use per-pixel 3D Gaussian Splatting for reconstruction, followed by a 2D-to-3D feature lifting stage for scene understanding. However, they generate excessive redundant Gaussians, causing high memory overhead and sub-optimal multi-view feature aggregation, leading to degraded novel view synthesis and scene understanding performance. We propose C3G, a novel feed-forward framework that estimates compact 3D Gaussians only at essential spatial locations, minimizing redundancy while enabling effective feature lifting. We introduce learnable tokens that aggregate multi-view features through self-attention to guide Gaussian generation, ensuring each Gaussian integrates relevant visual features across views. We then exploit the learned attention patterns for Gaussian decoding to efficiently lift features. Extensive experiments on pose-free novel view synthesis, 3D open-vocabulary segmentation, and view-invariant feature aggregation demonstrate our approach's effectiveness. Results show that a compact yet geometrically meaningful representation is sufficient for high-quality scene reconstruction and understanding, achieving superior memory efficiency and feature fidelity compared to existing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出C3G框架，通过可学习令牌从稀疏视图生成紧凑3D高斯表示，实现高效重建与场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建方法从稀疏无位姿视图生成过多冗余3D高斯，导致高内存开销和次优多视图特征聚合，进而影响新视角合成与场景理解性能。需要一种紧凑且信息丰富的表示方法，在减少冗余的同时有效提升特征质量。
light_analysis.method: C3G框架包含可学习令牌，通过自注意力聚合多视图特征，引导高斯仅在关键空间位置生成，减少冗余。利用学习到的注意力模式解码高斯，实现高效特征提升。整体采用前馈方式，无需显式位姿估计，直接从稀疏视图生成紧凑高斯表示。
light_analysis.result: 在无位姿新视角合成、3D开放词汇分割和视角不变特征聚合任务上，C3G相比现有方法在内存效率和特征保真度上均表现更优。实验表明紧凑且几何有意义的表示足以支持高质量重建与理解，显著减少高斯数量而不损失性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: C3G证明了紧凑3D高斯表示的有效性，平衡了内存与性能，为无位姿稀疏视图3D任务提供了新方案。未来可探索更复杂场景和实时应用，但当前方法可能受限于注意力机制的计算复杂度。

title: OneThinker: All-in-one Reasoning Model for Image and Video
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has recently achieved remarkable success in eliciting visual reasoning within Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing approaches typically train separate models for different tasks and treat image and video reasoning as disjoint domains. This results in limited scalability toward a multimodal reasoning generalist, which restricts practical versatility and hinders potential knowledge sharing across tasks and modalities. To this end, we propose OneThinker, an all-in-one reasoning model that unifies image and video understanding across diverse fundamental visual tasks, including question answering, captioning, spatial and temporal grounding, tracking, and segmentation. To achieve this, we construct the OneThinker-600k training corpus covering all these tasks and employ commercial models for CoT annotation, resulting in OneThinker-SFT-340k for SFT cold start. Furthermore, we propose EMA-GRPO to handle reward heterogeneity in multi-task RL by tracking task-wise moving averages of reward standard deviations for balanced optimization. Extensive experiments on diverse visual benchmarks show that OneThinker delivers strong performance on 31 benchmarks, across 10 fundamental visual understanding tasks. Moreover, it exhibits effective knowledge transfer between certain tasks and preliminary zero-shot generalization ability, marking a step toward a unified multimodal reasoning generalist. All code, model, and data are released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OneThinker，一个统一图像和视频推理的多模态大模型，通过多任务强化学习实现知识共享和零样本泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法通常为不同任务训练独立模型，并将图像和视频推理视为独立领域，导致缺乏多模态推理通用性，限制了实际应用和跨任务知识共享。为解决此问题，需要一个统一模型以整合多种视觉任务。
light_analysis.method: 构建OneThinker-600k训练语料覆盖问答、字幕、空间/时间定位、跟踪和分割等任务，利用商业模型进行思维链标注得到OneThinker-SFT-340k用于监督微调冷启动。提出EMA-GRPO，通过跟踪任务级奖励标准差的移动平均处理多任务强化学习中的奖励异质性，实现平衡优化。
light_analysis.result: 在31个基准测试的10个基础视觉理解任务上表现强劲。展示了任务间的有效知识转移和初步零样本泛化能力，向统一多模态推理通用模型迈进了一步。
light_analysis.conclusion: OneThinker实现了图像和视频推理的统一，通过多任务强化学习促进了知识共享。释放了代码、模型和数据，为多模态通用推理奠定了基础。未来可进一步扩展到更多任务和模态。

title: Semantic-aware Random Convolution and Source Matching for Domain Generalization in Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: We tackle the challenging problem of single-source domain generalization (DG) for medical image segmentation, where we train a network on one domain (e.g., CT) and directly apply it to a different domain (e.g., MR) without adapting the model and without requiring images or annotations from the new domain during training. Our method diversifies the source domain through semantic-aware random convolution, where different regions of a source image are augmented differently at training-time, based on their annotation labels. At test-time, we complement the randomization of the training domain via mapping the intensity of target domain images, making them similar to source domain data. We perform a comprehensive evaluation on a variety of cross-modality and cross-center generalization settings for abdominal, whole-heart and prostate segmentation, where we outperform previous DG techniques in a vast majority of experiments. Additionally, we also investigate our method when training on whole-heart CT or MR data and testing on the diastolic and systolic phase of cine MR data captured with different scanner hardware. Overall, our evaluation shows that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance in DG for medical image segmentation, even matching the performance of the in-domain baseline in several settings.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Access

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义感知随机卷积和源匹配方法，实现医学图像分割的单源域泛化，达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割中，单源域泛化面临跨模态（如CT到MR）和跨中心等挑战，现有方法泛化能力不足，无法在无需目标域数据的情况下直接应用。该研究旨在解决这一痛点，提升模型对未知域的适应能力。
light_analysis.method: 训练时，基于标注标签对源图像不同区域进行语义感知随机卷积增强，实现差异化扩充；测试时，通过源匹配将目标域图像强度映射到与源域相似。方法结合了数据多样性和域对齐，无需目标域图像或标注。
light_analysis.result: 在腹部、全心和前列腺分割的跨模态及跨中心泛化实验中，该方法在绝大多数设置下优于先前域泛化技术，达到新SOTA，并在若干情况下匹配域内基线性能，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了单源域泛化问题，在医学图像分割中性能显著提升，具有临床跨模态应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的增强策略及多源域扩展。

title: Voice, Bias, and Coreference: An Interpretability Study of Gender in Speech Translation
abstract: Unlike text, speech conveys information about the speaker, such as gender, through acoustic cues like pitch. This gives rise to modality-specific bias concerns. For example, in speech translation (ST), when translating from languages with notional gender, such as English, into languages where gender-ambiguous terms referring to the speaker are assigned grammatical gender, the speaker's vocal characteristics may play a role in gender assignment. This risks misgendering speakers, whether through masculine defaults or vocal-based assumptions. Yet, how ST models make these decisions remains poorly understood. We investigate the mechanisms ST models use to assign gender to speaker-referring terms across three language pairs (en-es/fr/it). To do so, we examine how training data patterns, internal language model (ILM) biases, and acoustic information interact. We find that models do not simply replicate term-specific gender associations from training data, but learn broader patterns of masculine prevalence. While the ILM exhibits strong masculine bias, models can override these preferences based on acoustic input. Using contrastive feature attribution on spectrograms, we reveal that the model with higher gender accuracy relies on a previously unknown mechanism: using first-person pronouns to link gendered terms back to the speaker, accessing gender information distributed across the frequency spectrum rather than concentrated in pitch.

light_analysis.overview: 通过可解释性研究揭示了语音翻译中基于第一人称代词的跨距离性别链接机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音翻译中，声学线索（如音高）携带说话人性别信息，在从有概念性别的语言（如英语）翻译到要求语法性别的语言（如西/法/意）时，可能产生模态特定偏见，导致误判性别。现有方法未能理解模型如何决策，需探究训练数据模式、内部语言模型偏见和声学信息的交互作用。
light_analysis.method: 以三个语言对（en-es/fr/it）的语音翻译模型为对象，分析训练数据中术语性别关联、内部语言模型（ILM）偏见及声学输入影响。采用对比特征归因分析声谱图，揭示模型使用第一人称代词将性别化术语链接回说话人的机制，利用整个频谱的性别信息而非仅音高。
light_analysis.result: 模型不简单复制训练数据中术语-性别关联，而是学习更广泛的男性主导模式。ILM呈强烈男性偏见，但模型可根据声学输入覆盖。高性别准确率模型通过第一人称代词实现跨距离性别链接，性别信息分布在全频谱而非集中于音高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了语音翻译中性别分配的新机制，强调声学特征与语言结构交互，对理解模型偏见、开发公平系统有重要价值。未来可探索更多语言对及声学特征，并研究缓解性别偏见的方法。

title: OmniAlpha: Aligning Transparency-Aware Generation via Multi-Task Unified Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Transparency-aware generation requires modeling not only RGB appearance but also alpha-based opacity and cross-layer composition, which are essential for tasks such as image matting, object removal, layer decomposition, and multi-layer content creation. However, existing RGBA-related methods remain largely fragmented, with separate pipelines designed for individual tasks. While a unified model is desirable, supervised fine-tuning alone is insufficient, as localized regression objectives cannot directly optimize the compositional fidelity, alpha-boundary precision, and structural consistency required for high-quality RGBA generation. To address this, we propose OmniAlpha, a unified multi-task reinforcement learning framework for transparency-aware generation and manipulation. OmniAlpha combines an end-to-end alpha-aware VAE and a sequence-to-sequence Diffusion Transformer, with a bi-directional layer axis in positional encoding to jointly model multiple RGBA inputs and outputs within a single forward pass. Built on a multi-task SFT cold start, it further performs GRPO-style post-training with layer-aware rewards defined on decoded RGBA outputs, enabling direct optimization of cross-layer coherence and fine transparency details. Experiments across five categories of transparency-aware tasks show that OmniAlpha consistently outperforms its unified SFT baseline and achieves strong performance against specialized expert models, including a 9.07% relative reduction in RGB L1 on layer decomposition and 74%/68% improvements over conventional matting tools on SAD/Grad for automatic matting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniAlpha，首个统一多任务强化学习框架，用于透明度感知的生成与编辑，性能超越专用模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 透明度感知生成需要同时建模RGB外观、alpha不透明度和跨层合成，但现有方法碎片化，各任务使用独立流水线。统一模型虽好，但监督微调不足以优化合成保真度、alpha边界精度和结构一致性，因为局部回归目标无法直接优化这些指标。
light_analysis.method: OmniAlpha结合端到端alpha感知VAE和序列到序列扩散Transformer，通过双向层轴位置编码在单次前向中联合建模多个RGBA输入输出。基于多任务SFT冷启动，进一步采用GRPO风格的后训练，使用在解码RGBA输出上定义的层感知奖励，直接优化跨层一致性和透明度细节。
light_analysis.result: 在五类透明度感知任务上，OmniAlpha持续优于统一SFT基线，并达到与专用专家模型相当或更强的性能。例如，在层分解任务上RGB L1相对降低9.07%，在自动抠图任务上SAD/Grad指标比传统抠图工具分别提升74%和68%。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniAlpha首次实现了透明度感知生成与编辑的统一多任务强化学习框架，显着提升了跨任务性能，展示了统一模型在复杂视觉生成中的潜力。未来可扩展到更多RGBA任务，并探索更高效的强化学习策略。

title: Periodic Asynchrony: An On-Policy Approach for Accelerating LLM Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Since the introduction of the GRPO algorithm, reinforcement learning~(RL) has attracted increasing attention for LLM post-training, yet training efficiency remains a critical challenge. In mainstream RL frameworks, inference and training are co-located on the same devices, and their synchronous execution prevents concurrent inference and training. In this work, we revisit the strategy of separating inference and training deployment, and propose a \emph{periodically asynchronous} framework that transforms synchronous RL training into an asynchronous producer--consumer pipeline. By synchronising model weights at the beginning of each training iteration and generating all rollouts from the same policy, the proposed framework remains inherently \emph{on-policy}, avoiding the off-policy bias introduced by existing asynchronous approaches without any modification to standard RL algorithms. We further introduce a unified tri-model architecture and a shared-prompt attention mechanism to support efficient asynchronous execution and reduce redundant computation. Experiments on NPU platforms show that the proposed framework achieves around $2\times$ throughput improvement from asynchronous execution, with additional gains from system-level optimisations, substantially outperforming mainstream RL frameworks in end-to-end training throughput while maintaining comparable accuracy. Further validation on GPU platforms confirms that the proposed framework generalises effectively across hardware architectures, indicating its potential for widespread application.

light_analysis.overview: 提出周期异步框架，将同步RL训练转化为异步生产者-消费者流水线，保持on-policy性质，显著加速LLM强化学习训练。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO算法引入后，LLM后训练中RL效率低下成为关键挑战。主流框架将推理和训练共设备且同步执行，阻碍并发。现有异步方法引入off-policy偏差。需要一种保持on-policy且高效的异步训练方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出周期异步框架，每次训练迭代开始时同步模型权重，所有rollout来自同一策略，确保on-policy。引入统一三模型架构和共享提示注意力机制，支持高效异步执行并减少冗余计算。框架将同步训练转化为异步生产者-消费者流水线。
light_analysis.result: 在NPU平台上，异步执行带来约2倍吞吐量提升，结合系统优化后端到端训练吞吐远超主流框架，且保持精度相当。GPU平台验证表明框架有效泛化至不同硬件架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出周期异步框架，在不修改标准RL算法前提下，通过异步流水线显著提升LLM RL训练吞吐，保持on-policy性质。跨硬件泛化性好，具有广泛应用潜力。未来可探索更优同步策略或混合部署。

title: UniSER: A Foundation Model for Unified Soft Effects Removal
abstract: Digital images are often degraded by soft effects such as lens flare, haze, shadows, and reflections, which reduce aesthetics even though the underlying pixels remain partially visible. The prevailing works address these degradations in isolation, developing highly specialized, specialist models that lack scalability and fail to exploit the shared underlying essences of these restoration problems. Meanwhile, although recent large-scale generalist models (e.g., GPT-4o, Flux Kontext, Nano Banana) offer powerful text-driven editing capabilities, they heavily rely on detailed prompts and often fail to achieve robust removal on such fine-grained tasks while preserving the scene's identity. Leveraging the common essence of soft effects, i.e., semi-transparent occlusions, we introduce a foundational versatile model UniSER, capable of addressing diverse degradations caused by soft effects within a single framework. Our methodology centers on curating a massive 3.8M-pair dataset to ensure robustness and generalization, which includes novel, physically-plausible data to fill critical gaps in public benchmarks, and a tailored training pipeline that fine-tunes a Diffusion Transformer to learn robust restoration priors from this diverse data, integrating fine-grained mask and strength controls. This synergistic approach allows UniSER to significantly outperform both specialist and generalist models, achieving robust, high-fidelity restoration in the wild.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架UniSER，基于半透明遮挡的共同本质，利用大规模数据集和扩散Transformer，实现多种软效应的鲁棒去除。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法针对镜头光晕、雾霾、阴影和反射等软效应分别开发专用模型，缺乏可扩展性且未利用这些恢复问题的共同本质。大型通用模型如GPT-4o依赖详细提示，在细粒度去除任务上表现不佳，难以保持场景一致性。因此，需要一种统一、鲁棒的解决方案来高效处理多种软效应。
light_analysis.method: 核心在于构建380万对的大规模数据集，包含物理合理的新数据以填补公共基准的空白。采用扩散Transformer作为基础模型，通过定制训练流水线微调，学习鲁棒的恢复先验，并集成细粒度掩码和强度控制，实现对不同软效应的统一处理。
light_analysis.result: UniSER在多种软效应去除任务上显著超越专用模型和通用模型，实现鲁棒、高保真的在野恢复。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其在定性和定量评估中的优势，表明该方法具有强大的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次以统一框架处理多种软效应，揭示了半透明遮挡的共同本质，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可扩展至更多场景，但需注意数据集可能存在的偏差以及计算成本。

title: UltraGS: Real-Time Physically-Decoupled Gaussian Splatting for Ultrasound Novel View Synthesis
abstract: Ultrasound imaging is a cornerstone of non-invasive clinical diagnostics, yet its limited field of view poses challenges for novel view synthesis. We present UltraGS, a real-time framework that adapts Gaussian Splatting to sensorless ultrasound imaging by integrating explicit radiance fields with lightweight, physics-inspired acoustic modeling. UltraGS employs depth-aware Gaussian primitives with learnable fields of view to improve geometric consistency under unconstrained probe motion, and introduces PD Rendering, a differentiable acoustic operator that combines low-order spherical harmonics with first-order wave effects for efficient intensity synthesis. We further present a clinical ultrasound dataset acquired under real-world scanning protocols. Extensive evaluations across three datasets demonstrate that UltraGS establishes a new performance-efficiency frontier, achieving state-of-the-art results in PSNR (up to 29.55) and SSIM (up to 0.89) while achieving real-time synthesis at 64.69 fps on a single GPU. The code and dataset are open-sourced at: https://github.com/Bean-Young/UltraGS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UltraGS，将高斯泼溅适配到无传感器超声成像，通过物理启发声学建模实现实时新视角合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声成像视野受限，新视角合成困难。现有方法缺乏对无传感器超声的适配，导致几何一致性差、合成效率低，无法满足临床实时需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用深度感知高斯原语和学习视场增强几何一致性；提出可微分声学算子PD Rendering，融合低阶球谐函数和一阶波动效应实现高效强度合成。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上PSNR最高达29.55、SSIM最高达0.89，单GPU实时合成速度64.69 fps，达到性能-效率新前沿。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了超声新视角合成的性能-效率前沿，开源代码和数据集，为临床实时应用提供可能。未来可扩展至其他医学成像模态。

title: Synthetic Eggs in Many Baskets: The Impact of Synthetic Data Diversity on LLM Fine-Tuning
abstract: As synthetic data becomes widely used in language model development, understanding its impact on model behavior is crucial. This paper investigates the impact of the diversity of sources of synthetic data on fine-tuned large language models. We focus on three key dimensions: distribution collapse, adversarial robustness, and self-preference bias. Our findings reveal that fine-tuning models on synthetic data from diverse sources can mitigate distribution collapse, preserving the breadth of the output distribution and the diversity of the output text. Furthermore, while both human and synthetic fine-tuning data can remove safeguards, we observe a tendency for higher output quality in the latter case, thus making outputs potentially more usable and dangerous. Finally, we also find evidence that fine-tuning reduces self-preference bias, with human data being the most effective, followed by multi-source synthetic data.
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 研究合成数据来源多样性对微调大语言模型的影响，发现多源合成数据可缓解分布坍缩、提升输出质量但增加危险，且微调减少自偏好偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着合成数据在语言模型开发中的广泛使用，理解其对模型行为的影响至关重要。现有研究多关注合成数据的数量，但对其来源多样性如何影响模型性能、安全性和偏差认识不足。本文旨在系统探究合成数据多样性在分布坍缩、对抗鲁棒性和自偏好偏差三个关键维度上的作用，以指导更安全的模型微调实践。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过对比实验，评估微调大语言模型时使用不同多样性程度（单源、多源）的合成数据以及人类数据的效果。重点关注三个指标：输出分布广度（分布坍缩）、对抗鲁棒性（安全防护移除情况）和自偏好偏差（模型对自身输出的偏好）。采用多种来源的合成数据生成方法，并比较人类数据与合成数据的差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：多源合成数据微调能有效缓解分布坍缩，保持输出多样性和广度；合成数据微调虽可能移除安全防护，但产出质量更高，从而增加潜在危险性；微调普遍降低自偏好偏差，其中人类数据最有效，多源合成数据次之，单源合成数据效果最差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了合成数据多样性对微调大语言模型的重要影响：多源数据有助于维持模型输出多样性，但也需警惕高质量合成数据带来的安全风险。研究为合成数据的使用提供了指导，建议优先采用多源数据，并加强安全评估。未来工作可探索更有效的安全防护机制及更优的数据组合策略。

title: Citation Failure: Definition, Analysis and Efficient Mitigation
abstract: Citations from LLM-based RAG systems are supposed to simplify response verification. However, this goal is undermined in cases of citation failure, where a model generates a helpful response, but fails to generate citations to complete evidence. In contrast to previous work, we propose to disentangle this from response failure, where the response itself is flawed, and citing complete evidence is impossible. To address citation failure, this work follows a two-step approach: (1) We study when citation failure occurs and (2) how it can be mitigated efficiently. For step 1, we extend prior work by investigating how the relation between response and evidence affects citation quality. We introduce CITECONTROL, a benchmark that systematically varies this relation to enable the analysis of failure modes. Experiments show that failures increase with relational complexity and suggest that combining citation methods could improve performance, motivating step 2. To study the efficient improvement of LLM citation, we propose CITENTION, a framework integrating generative, attention-based, and retrieval-based methods. Results demonstrate substantial citation improvements on CITECONTROL and in transfer settings. We make our data and code publicly available.
comment: Accepted to TACL in April 2024. Paper repository: https://github.com/UKPLab/tacl2026-citation-failure

light_analysis.overview: 提出引用失败的概念并分离于响应失败，通过CITECONTROL基准分析失效模式，提出CITENTION框架高效提升引用质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的RAG系统通过生成引用简化响应验证，但存在引用失败问题：模型生成有帮助响应但未提供完整证据引用。现有工作未区分引用失败与响应失败，且缺乏对响应与证据关系如何影响引用质量的研究。本研究旨在系统分析引用失败的发生条件，并提出高效缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CITECONTROL基准，系统改变响应与证据之间的关系以分析失效模式。实验发现失败随关系复杂性增加，表明组合引用方法可改善性能。进而提出CITENTION框架，集成生成式、基于注意力和检索式方法，实现高效的引用改进。
light_analysis.result: 在CITECONTROL上实验表明，关系复杂性增加时引用失败率上升。CITENTION框架在CITECONTROL及迁移设置中均显著提升引用质量，具体指标未在摘要中明确给出，但明确提到“substantial citation improvements”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究明确了引用失败的定义和原因，提出CITECONTROL基准用于分析失效模式，以及CITENTION框架高效提升引用性能。学术贡献在于系统分离了引用失败与响应失败，实践价值在于改善RAG系统的可验证性。未来可探索更多组合策略或扩展到其他任务。

title: DiffAdapt: Difficulty-Adaptive Reasoning for Token-Efficient LLM Inference
abstract: Recent reasoning Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable problem-solving abilities but often generate long thinking traces whose utility is unclear. Our work aims to improve their efficiency, enabling them to reach high performance without overthinking. First, we analyze the entropy of token probabilities in reasoning traces. Across three models, we observe a consistent U-shaped entropy pattern: high entropy on easy problems despite high accuracy, low entropy on problems with medium difficulty, and high entropy on hard problems reflecting uncertainty. Specifically, we notice 22--25\% entropy reduction from easy to medium difficulty regions, suggesting an {overthinking} phenomenon on easy instances. Building on these insights, we introduce \textbf{DiffAdapt}, a lightweight framework that selects Easy/Normal/Hard inference strategies per question based on their difficulty and reasoning trace entropy. Each inference strategy consists of a fixed prompt, temperature and maximum token length. In contrast to existing efficiency optimization methods, our approach does not fine-tune base LLM but a small probe that classifies LLM's final hidden state, allowing inexpensive adaptation. We comprehensively evaluate our method on five models and eight benchmarks. Our method achieves comparable or improved accuracy while reducing token usage by up to 22.4\%, establishing a practical path toward compute-efficient reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffAdapt框架，基于推理轨迹的熵模式，通过轻量探针自适应选择推理策略，在不微调LLM的情况下减少令牌使用，保持或提升准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理LLM虽能力强，但常产生长思考痕迹，效率低下。分析发现简单问题熵高（过度思考），中等问题熵低，难题熵高。现有方法需微调模型，成本高昂。因此需要轻量、无需微调的方法，根据问题难度自适应调整推理策略，提升令牌效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiffAdapt框架，包含一个小型探针，基于LLM最终隐藏状态分类问题难度（Easy/Normal/Hard），并为每个难度设置固定推理策略（提示、温度、最大令牌长度）。不微调基座LLM，仅训练探针，实现低成本适应。熵模式分析指导策略设计，在5个模型和8个基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在5个模型和8个基准上，DiffAdapt与基线相比，在保持或提升准确率的同时，最多减少22.4%的令牌使用。证明了难度自适应推理在计算效率上的有效性，实现了高性能与低成本的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffAdapt提供了一种实用的计算效率优化路径，通过熵分析揭示过度思考现象，并利用难度自适应减少令牌消耗。具有学术价值（熵模式）和应用潜力（令牌节省）。未来可探索更精细的策略或扩展到多步推理任务。

title: Thinking About Thinking: Evaluating Reasoning in Post-Trained Language Models
abstract: Recent advances in post-training techniques have endowed Large Language Models (LLMs) with enhanced capabilities for tackling complex, logic-intensive tasks through the generation of supplementary planning tokens. This development raises a fundamental question: Are these models aware of what they "learn" and "think"? To address this, we define three core competencies: (1) awareness of learned latent policies, (2) generalization of these policies across domains, and (3) alignment between internal reasoning traces and final outputs. We empirically evaluate these abilities on several tasks, each designed to require learning a distinct policy. Furthermore, we contrast the profiles of models post-trained via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Direct Policy Optimization (DPO), and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Our findings indicate that RL-trained models not only demonstrate greater awareness of their learned behaviors and stronger generalizability to novel, structurally similar tasks than SFT models but also often exhibit weak alignment between their reasoning traces and final outputs, an effect most pronounced in GRPO-trained models.

light_analysis.overview: 定义并评估后训练语言模型在策略认知、跨域泛化和推理-输出对齐三个维度的元认知能力，比较SFT、DPO和GRPO的效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 后训练技术使LLMs能通过生成规划token处理复杂任务，但模型是否真正“意识到”自身学习行为和推理过程尚不清楚。现有评估缺乏对模型元认知能力的关注，无法揭示不同训练方法对模型内省能力的影响。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过定义三个关键能力并设计多任务实验，系统评估模型对自身策略的认知、泛化能力及推理与输出的一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出三个评估维度：对所学潜在策略的认知、策略的跨域泛化性、内部推理与最终输出的对齐程度。设计多个需要学习不同策略的任务。对比三种后训练方法：监督微调（SFT）、直接策略优化（DPO）和组相对策略优化（GRPO）。通过模型在各任务上的表现来量化这些能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RL训练的模型（DPO、GRPO）比SFT模型对所学行为有更高的认知意识，且能更好地泛化到结构相似的新任务。然而，RL模型在推理轨迹与最终输出对齐方面表现较弱，其中GRPO模型的对齐最差。这些差异揭示了不同训练方法对元认知能力的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次系统评估了后训练语言模型的元认知能力，发现RL训练能增强模型对自身策略的认知和泛化，但会削弱推理与输出的对齐。这为理解LLMs的推理机制和优化训练方法提供了新视角，未来可探索如何在对齐与认知之间取得平衡。

title: Aligning Deep Implicit Preferences by Learning to Reason Defensively
abstract: Personalized alignment is crucial for enabling Large Language Models (LLMs) to engage effectively in user-centric interactions. However, current methods face a dual challenge: they fail to infer users' deep implicit preferences (including unstated goals, semantic context and risk tolerances), and they lack the defensive reasoning required to navigate real-world ambiguity. This cognitive gap leads to responses that are superficial, brittle and short-sighted. To address this, we propose Critique-Driven Reasoning Alignment (CDRA), which reframes alignment from a scalar reward-matching task into a structured reasoning process. First, to bridge the preference inference gap, we introduce the DeepPref benchmark. This dataset, comprising 3000 preference-query pairs across 20 topics, is curated by simulating a multi-faceted cognitive council that produces critique-annotated reasoning chains to deconstruct query semantics and reveal latent risks. Second, to instill defensive reasoning, we introduce the Personalized Generative Process Reward Model (Pers-GenPRM), which frames reward modeling as a personalized reasoning task. It generates a critique chain to evaluate a response's alignment with user preferences before outputting a final score based on this rationale. Ultimately, this interpretable, structured reward signal guides policy model through Critique-Driven Policy Alignment, a process-level online reinforcement learning algorithm integrating both numerical and natural language feedback. Experiments demonstrate that CDRA excels at discovering and aligning with users' true preferences while executing robust reasoning. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/Zephyrian-Hugh/Deep-pref.

light_analysis.overview: 提出批评驱动推理对齐（CDRA），通过结构化推理和过程奖励模型实现大语言模型与用户深层隐式偏好的对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大语言模型个性化对齐面临双重挑战：无法推断用户的深层隐式偏好（包括未言明的目标、语义上下文和风险容忍度），且缺乏应对现实世界模糊性的防御推理能力。这导致模型生成浅薄、脆弱和短视的响应，无法满足用户中心交互的实际需求。
light_analysis.method: CDRA方法包含三个关键组件：首先构建DeepPref基准数据集，包含3000个偏好-查询对，覆盖20个主题，通过多面认知委员会模拟生成带批评注解的推理链来揭示潜在风险；其次提出个性化生成过程奖励模型（Pers-GenPRM），将奖励建模视为个性化推理任务，生成批评链评估响应与用户偏好的一致性；最后采用批评驱动策略对齐，这是一个结合数值和自然语言反馈的在线强化学习算法。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明CDRA在发现和对齐用户真实偏好以及执行鲁棒推理方面表现出色。摘要未提供具体的性能指标对比数据，但强调其在用户偏好发现和鲁棒推理上的优越性。代码和数据集已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: CDRA将对齐从标量奖励匹配任务重构为结构化推理过程，弥合了偏好推断差距并注入了防御推理能力，为构建安全、个性化的对话助手提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的偏好建模和更高效的推理链生成策略。

title: Rethinking Entropy Interventions in RLVR: An Entropy Change Perspective
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) serves as a cornerstone technique for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, its training is often plagued by \emph{entropy collapse}, a rapid decline in policy entropy that limits exploration and undermines training effectiveness. While recent works attempt to mitigate this issue via several heuristic entropy interventions, the underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this work, we conduct comprehensive theoretical and empirical analyses of entropy dynamics in RLVR, offering two main insights: (1) We derive a tight analytical approximation for token-level entropy change at each update step, revealing four governing factors and providing a unified theoretical framework to explain how existing methods influence entropy; (2) We reveal a fundamental limitation of recent approaches: they rely on heuristic adjustments to one or two of these factors, leaving other relevant factors unconsidered, thus inherently limiting their effectiveness. Motivated by these findings, we propose STEER, a principled entropy-modulation method that adaptively reweights tokens based on theoretically-estimated entropy variations. Extensive experiments across six mathematical reasoning and three coding benchmarks demonstrate that STEER effectively mitigates entropy collapse and consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 本文从熵变化角度重新审视RLVR中的熵干预，提出基于理论估计的自适应熵调制方法STEER，有效缓解熵塌陷并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR是增强LLM推理能力的关键技术，但训练中常出现熵塌陷（策略熵快速下降），限制探索和训练效果。现有启发式熵干预方法缺乏理论理解，且仅针对部分因素进行调整，效果有限。因此，需要从理论层面深入分析熵动态，提出更有效的干预策略。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先推导了token级别熵变化的精确解析近似，揭示四个控制因素，建立统一理论框架解释现有方法如何影响熵。然后发现现有方法仅启发式调整其中一两个因素，存在根本性局限。基于此，提出STEER，一种基于理论估计熵变化的自适应重加权token的方法，在更新中动态调整每个token的权重，用于数学推理和代码生成任务。
light_analysis.result: 在六个数学推理和三个代码基准测试上进行广泛实验，STEER有效缓解熵塌陷，始终优于最先进的基线方法。具体性能提升幅度与基线相比有显著改善，但摘要未给出精确数值，实验中通过熵曲线和最终准确率验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从熵变化角度提供了RLVR中熵动态的深入理论理解，并提出了有效的自动熵调制方法STEER。该工作不仅提升了RLVR的训练效果，还为未来设计更精细的熵干预策略提供了理论指导。局限性在于可能依赖任务特性，未来可探索更通用的熵调控框架。

title: CHUCKLE -- When Humans Teach AI To Learn Emotions The Easy Way
abstract: Curriculum learning (CL) structures training from simple to complex samples, facilitating progressive learning. However, existing CL approaches for emotion recognition often rely on heuristic, data-driven, or model-based definitions of sample difficulty, neglecting the difficulty for human perception, a critical factor in subjective tasks like emotion recognition. We propose CHUCKLE (Crowdsourced Human Understanding Curriculum for Knowledge Led Emotion Recognition), a perception-driven CL framework that leverages annotator agreement and alignment in crowd-sourced datasets to define sample difficulty, under the assumption that clips challenging for humans are similarly hard for neural networks. Experimental results suggest that CHUCKLE enhances the performance of LSTMs and Transformers over non-curriculum baselines, while reducing the number of gradient updates, thereby enhancing both training efficiency and model robustness in both subject-dependent and subject-independent settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于人类感知难度的课程学习框架CHUCKLE，利用众包标注一致性定义样本难度，提升情感识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有课程学习方法在情感识别中依赖启发式或数据驱动定义样本难度，忽略了人类感知难度这一主观任务中的关键因素。由于情感识别具有主观性，人类对样本的感知难度应被纳入考虑。CHUCKLE通过众包数据中标注者一致性和对齐来定义难度，假设对人类难的样本对神经网络也难，从而更符合情感识别任务特性。
light_analysis.method: CHUCKLE框架利用众包数据中标注者一致性和对齐程度定义样本难度，构建从简单到复杂的课程顺序。采用LSTM和Transformer作为基础模型，在subject-dependent和subject-independent两种设置下训练，并通过比较课程与非课程基线验证效果。核心创新在于以人类感知难度替代传统启发式或数据驱动难度定义。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CHUCKLE相比非课程基线提升了LSTM和Transformer的情感识别性能，同时减少了梯度更新次数，提高了训练效率。在subject-dependent和subject-independent设置下均表现更好，增强了模型鲁棒性。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHUCKLE验证了利用人类感知难度进行课程学习在情感识别中的有效性，兼顾训练效率与模型鲁棒性。该框架为主观任务中的课程学习提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的难度定义或扩展至其他主观感知任务。

title: When Thoughts Meet Facts: Reusable Reasoning for Long-Context LMs
abstract: Recent Long-Context Language Models (LCLMs) can process hundreds of thousands of tokens in a single prompt, enabling new opportunities for knowledge-intensive multi-hop reasoning by integrating large sets of retrieved documents or, in some cases, directly all necessary information. However, simply feeding more documents into the context window fails to capture how evidence should be connected. We address this gap with thought templates, which recast reasoning as reusable thought caches, derived from prior problem solving traces, structuring how evidence is combined and guiding multi-hop inference with factual documents. To keep these templates effective, we propose an update strategy that iteratively refines templates derived from training data through natural-language feedback. Across diverse benchmarks and LCLM families, our approach delivers consistent gains over strong baselines in both retrieval-based and retrieval-free settings. Furthermore, we show that optimized templates can be distilled into smaller open-source models, demonstrating its broad applicability and transparent reasoning reuse. We refer to our framework as Thought Template Augmented LCLMs (ToTAL).

light_analysis.overview: 提出ToTAL框架，通过可重用的推理模板增强长上下文语言模型的多跳推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文语言模型虽能处理数十万token，但直接堆砌文档无法有效连接证据进行多跳推理。现有方法缺乏对证据组合的结构化引导，导致推理效果受限。因此需要一种方法，从先前问题解决轨迹中提取可重用的推理模板，结构化证据组合并指导多跳推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出thought templates作为可重用的推理缓存，从训练数据中的问题解决轨迹派生，结构化证据组合并引导多跳推理。同时提出迭代更新策略，通过自然语言反馈优化模板。在检索和非检索场景中，跨多种基准和LCLM家族验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准测试和LCLM家族中，ToTAL在检索和非检索设置下均持续优于强基线。优化后的模板可蒸馏到更小的开源模型，保持性能的同时实现推理重用，证明其广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ToTAL通过可重用的thought templates增强LCLM的多跳推理，在性能上取得一致提升，且模板可蒸馏到小型模型，促进推理透明和高效部署。未来可探索模板的自动生成与跨任务迁移。

title: AInstein: Can LLMs Solve Research Problems From Parametric Memory Alone?
abstract: Can large language models solve AI research problems using only their parametric knowledge, without fine-tuning, retrieval, or other external aids? We introduce AInstein, a framework for testing whether LLM agents can generate and refine solutions to research problems through iterative critique loops. A blind study with 20 domain experts on held-out ICLR 2026 problems validates our automated metrics, which we then scale to 1,214 ICLR 2025 papers using an LLM-as-a-judge paradigm. Two metrics capture complementary aspects of performance: Success Rate (does the solution address the problem?) and Rediscovery (does it match the published approach?). LLMs succeed on over 70% of problems, yet strictly rediscover the published solution less than 19% of the time, suggesting genuine problem-solving rather than associative recall. However, this ability has clear limits: models handle familiar methodological territory well but fail when solutions require cross-domain analogical transfer, a pattern we call the parametric knowledge boundary. On the ResearchPlanGen benchmark (2,645 problems), our training-free iterative refinement strategy matches RL finetuning, and a criteria-coverage analysis pins down the ceiling of what test-time refinement alone can achieve. Together, these findings map both the capabilities and the limits of LLMs as autonomous scientific problem-solvers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AInstein框架，测试LLM仅凭参数知识解决AI研究问题的能力，发现成功率高但存在参数知识边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是验证LLM能否仅依靠参数化记忆（无微调、检索等外部辅助）解决AI研究问题。现有方法多依赖外部工具，但LLM的内在问题解决能力尚未明确。该问题重要，因为LLM被视为通用问题解决者，需界定其自主科研能力的真实边界，避免高估。
light_analysis.method: 提出AInstein框架，通过迭代批评循环让LLM生成并细化解决方案。采用20名专家盲审验证自动指标，再以LLM-as-a-judge评估1214篇ICLR 2025论文。定义两个指标：Success Rate（是否解决问题）和Rediscovery（是否匹配发表方法）。在ResearchPlanGen基准（2645问题）上比较无训练迭代细化与RL微调。
light_analysis.result: LLM成功解决超过70%的问题，但严格复现发表方案的比例低于19%，表明其具备真正的问题解决能力而非记忆。在熟悉领域表现良好，但跨域类比转移时失败，形成参数知识边界。无训练迭代细化策略在ResearchPlanGen上达到与RL微调相当的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM作为自主科学问题解决者的能力（高成功率、非记忆性）与限制（参数知识边界）。AInstein框架和自动评估指标为评测LLM科研能力提供工具。未来需结合外部知识突破边界，研究对其他领域的泛化性。

title: Curl Descent: Non-Gradient Learning Dynamics with Sign-Diverse Plasticity
