abstract: Gradient-based algorithms are a cornerstone of artificial neural network training, yet it remains unclear whether biological neural networks use similar gradient-based strategies during learning. Experiments often discover a diversity of synaptic plasticity rules, but whether these amount to an approximation to gradient descent is unclear. Here we investigate a previously overlooked possibility: that learning dynamics may include fundamentally non-gradient "curl"-like components while still being able to effectively optimize a loss function. Curl terms naturally emerge in networks with inhibitory-excitatory connectivity or Hebbian/anti-Hebbian plasticity, resulting in learning dynamics that cannot be framed as gradient descent on any objective. To investigate the impact of these curl terms, we analyze feedforward networks within an analytically tractable student-teacher framework, systematically introducing non-gradient dynamics through neurons exhibiting rule-flipped plasticity. Small curl terms preserve the stability of the original solution manifold, resulting in learning dynamics similar to gradient descent. Beyond a critical value, strong curl terms destabilize the solution manifold. Depending on the network architecture, this loss of stability can lead to chaotic learning dynamics that destroy performance. In other cases, the curl terms can counterintuitively speed learning compared to gradient descent by allowing the weight dynamics to escape saddles by temporarily ascending the loss. Our results identify specific architectures capable of supporting robust learning via diverse learning rules, providing an important counterpoint to normative theories of gradient-based learning in neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了非梯度“旋度”学习动力学，证明在具有抑制-兴奋连接或Hebbian/反Hebbian可塑性的网络中，学习可以包含非梯度成分并有效优化损失函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 梯度算法是人工神经网络训练的基础，但生物神经网络是否使用类似策略尚不清楚。实验发现突触可塑性规则多样，这些规则是否构成梯度下降的近似未知。本文探索被忽视的可能性：学习动力学可能包含非梯度的“旋度”分量，同时仍能有效优化损失函数。旋度项自然出现在抑制-兴奋连接或Hebbian/反Hebbian可塑性网络中，导致无法被框架为梯度下降的学习动力学。
light_analysis.method: 在可解析的学生-教师框架内分析前馈网络，通过展示规则翻转可塑性的神经元系统地引入非梯度动力学。小旋度项保持原始解流形的稳定性，学习动力学类似梯度下降。超过临界值，强旋度项使解流形失稳。根据网络架构，失稳可导致混沌学习动力学破坏性能，或通过暂时上升损失逃离鞍点而加速学习。识别出支持通过多样学习规则进行鲁棒学习的特定架构。
light_analysis.result: 小旋度项下学习行为类似梯度下降，保持性能。强旋度项导致解流形不稳定：在某些架构中引起混沌学习并摧毁性能，在另一些架构中则能通过允许权重动力学暂时上升损失来逃离鞍点，从而提速学习。结果证明特定架构支持多样规则下的鲁棒学习，为基于梯度学习的规范理论提供重要反例。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了非梯度旋度项在神经网络学习中的潜在积极作用，挑战了梯度下降作为学习唯一范式的观点。学术上提供了理解生物多样可塑性规则的新视角，实用上可能启发设计更高效的学习算法。局限性在于理论分析限于前馈网络和学生-教师框架，未来需拓展到更复杂架构和实际任务。

title: Comparing Data Assimilation and Likelihood-Based Inference on Latent State Estimation in Agent-Based Models
abstract: In this paper, we present the first systematic comparison of Data Assimilation (DA) and Likelihood-Based Inference (LBI) in the context of an Agent-Based Model (ABM). These models generate observable time series driven by evolving, partially-latent microstates. Latent states must be estimated to align simulations with real-world data, a task traditionally addressed by DA, particularly in continuous and equation-based models used in weather forecasting. However, the nature of ABMs poses challenges for standard DA methods. Solving such issues requires adapting previous DA techniques or using ad hoc alternatives such as LBI. DA approximates the likelihood in a model-agnostic way, making it broadly applicable but potentially less precise. In contrast, LBI provides more accurate state estimation by directly leveraging the model's likelihood, but at the cost of requiring a hand-crafted, model-specific likelihood function, which may be complex or infeasible to derive. We compare the two methods on the Bounded-Confidence Model, a well-known opinion dynamics ABM, where agents are affected only by others holding sufficiently similar opinions. We find that LBI better recovers latent agent-level opinions, even under model mis-specification, leading to improved individual-level forecasts. At the aggregate level, however, both methods perform comparably, and DA remains competitive across levels of aggregation under certain parameter settings. Our findings suggest that DA is well-suited for aggregate predictions, while LBI is preferable for agent-level inference.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统比较数据同化和基于似然推断在基于代理模型中的潜状态估计性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于代理模型(ABM)的潜状态估计对对齐仿真与真实数据至关重要。传统数据同化(DA)方法适用于连续方程模型，但ABM的离散性和非线性带来挑战。基于似然推断(LBI)更精确但需手工设计模型特定似然函数，复杂或不可行。当前缺乏对两者在ABM中系统比较的研究，需评估其优劣以指导方法选择。
light_analysis.method: 在Bounded-Confidence观点动力学ABM上比较DA和LBI。DA通过模型无关方式近似似然，广泛适用；LBI直接利用模型似然进行状态估计。实验评估两者在潜代理级观点恢复和预测性能，包括模型错误指定情况。关键创新在于首次系统对比两种方法在ABM场景下的表现，并考虑不同聚合级别。
light_analysis.result: LBI在潜代理级观点恢复上优于DA，即使在模型错误指定下仍保持优势，从而提升个体级预测精度。但在聚合级别，两种方法表现相当，DA在特定参数设置下竞争力强。实验结果表明：DA适用于聚合预测任务，而LBI更适合需要精确代理级推断的场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为ABM潜状态估计提供了方法选择指南：DA适用于聚合级预测，具有模型无关性和稳健性；LBI适用于代理级推断，准确性更高但依赖模型似然。学术价值在于首次系统比较，填补领域空白；实际应用中可根据任务需求（个体或聚合）选择合适方法。未来可探索更复杂ABM或混合方法。

title: JaGuard: Position Error Correction of GNSS Jamming with Deep Temporal Graphs
abstract: Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) face growing disruption from intentional jamming, undermining critical infrastructure where precise positioning and timing are essential. Current position error correction (PEC) methods mainly focus on multi-path propagation errors and fail to exploit the spatio-temporal coherence of satellite constellations. We recast jamming mitigation as a dynamic graph regression problem. We propose Jamming Guardian (JaGuard), a receiver-centric deep temporal graph network that estimates and corrects jamming-induced positional drift at fixed locations like roadside units. Modeling the satellite-receiver scene as a heterogeneous star graph at each 1 Hz epoch, our Heterogeneous Graph ConvLSTM fuses spatial context (SNR, azimuth, elevation) with short-term temporal dynamics to predict 2D positional deviation. Evaluated on a real-world dataset from two commercial receivers under synthesized RF interference (three jammer types, -45 to -70 dBm), JaGuard consistently yields the lowest Mean Absolute Error (MAE) compared to advanced baselines. Under severe jamming (-45 dBm), it maintains an MAE of 2.85-5.92 cm, improving to sub-2 cm at lower interference. On mixed-power datasets, JaGuard surpasses all baselines with MAEs of 2.26 cm (GP01) and 2.61 cm (U-blox 10). Even under extreme data starvation (10% training data), JaGuard remains stable, bounding error at 15-20 cm and preventing the massive variance increase seen in baselines. This confirms that dynamically modeling the physical deterioration of the constellation graph is strictly necessary for resilient interference correction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JaGuard，一种基于深度时序图的GNSS干扰位置误差校正方法，通过动态图回归有效抑制干扰导致的定位漂移。
light_analysis.motivation: GNSS面临故意干扰威胁，关键基础设施依赖精确位置。现有位置误差校正（PEC）方法主要处理多径误差，未利用卫星星座的时空相关性，导致干扰下性能急剧下降。亟需一种能捕获卫星-接收机场景时空动态的方法。
light_analysis.method: 将干扰缓解重述为动态图回归问题。设计接收端为中心异构时序图网络JaGuard，在每个1 Hz历元构建卫星-接收机异构星型图，通过Heterogeneous Graph ConvLSTM融合空间上下文（SNR、方位角、仰角）与短期时序动态，预测2D位置偏差。
light_analysis.result: 使用两台商用接收机在合成射频干扰（三种干扰类型，-45至-70 dBm）下评估。严重干扰（-45 dBm）时MAE为2.85-5.92 cm，低干扰时低于2 cm；混合功率数据集MAE为2.26 cm（GP01）和2.61 cm（U-blox 10）。仅10%训练数据时仍稳定，误差15-20 cm，优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 动态建模星座图物理退化对弹性干扰校正至关重要。JaGuard在严重干扰和数据匮乏条件下均保持低误差与稳定性，为GNSS干扰缓解提供了新范式，可推广至其他固定位置场景。

title: Principled Detection of Hallucinations in Large Language Models via Multiple Testing
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful foundational models to solve a variety of tasks, they have also been shown to be prone to hallucinations, i.e., generating responses that sound confident but are actually incorrect or even nonsensical. Existing hallucination detectors propose a wide range of empirical scoring rules, but their performance varies across models and datasets, and it is hard to determine which ones to rely on in practice or to treat as a reliable detector. In this work, we formulate the problem of detecting hallucinations as a hypothesis testing problem and draw parallels with the problem of out-of-distribution detection in machine learning models. We then propose a multiple-testing-inspired method that systematically aggregates multiple evaluation scores via conformal p-values, enabling calibrated detection with controlled false alarm rate. Extensive experiments across diverse models and datasets validate the robustness of our approach against state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 将幻觉检测形式化为假设检验问题，提出基于多重测试和保形p值的校准检测方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型虽功能强大但易产生幻觉，现有检测器基于经验评分规则，性能因模型和数据集而异，难以确定可靠检测器。本文旨在提供一种有原理保证、可控制误报率的检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 将幻觉检测视为假设检验问题，借鉴异常检测思路，提出多重测试方法。通过保形p值系统聚合多个评估分数，实现校准检测，确保误报率受控。
light_analysis.result: 在多种模型和数据集上的大量实验表明，所提方法相比现有方法具有鲁棒性，能够有效控制误报率并保持检测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了一种有统计原理支持的幻觉检测框架，提高了检测可靠性。未来可探索其他聚合策略或扩展至多模态场景。

title: OMHBench: Benchmarking Balanced and Grounded Omni-Modal Multi-Hop Reasoning
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have increasingly supported omni-modal processing across text, vision, and speech. However, existing evaluation frameworks for such models suffer from critical limitations, including modality shortcuts and biased reasoning paths. To address these challenges, we propose OMHBench, a novel benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate omni-modal multi-hop reasoning. It consists of 6,144 questions with balanced reasoning paths that are jointly grounded across all three modalities. Extensive evaluation of 13 state-of-the-art models reveals that (1) a large performance gap exists between proprietary and open-source MLLMs and (2) even proprietary models exhibit high sensitivity to reasoning path variations, resulting in asymmetric omni-modal grounding. Notably, models struggle when processing the speech modality, underscoring the need for balanced, multi-hop evaluation of omni-modal intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OMHBench基准，用于平衡且接地评估全模态多跳推理，解决模态捷径和推理路径偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLMs支持文本、视觉和语音全模态处理，但评估框架存在模态捷径和推理路径偏差，导致评估不全面且偏向某些模态。这限制了模型全模态智能的准确衡量，尤其语音模态被忽视，因此需要平衡的多跳推理基准。
light_analysis.method: OMHBench包含6,144个问题，每个问题具有平衡的推理路径，且联合基于文本、图像和语音三种模态。评估了13个SOTA模型（包括专有和开源），采用多跳推理任务来测试模型的全模态接地能力。
light_analysis.result: 专有MLLMs与开源模型之间存在显著性能差距；专有模型对推理路径变化高度敏感，导致不对称的全模态接地；所有模型在处理语音模态时表现最差，显示当前模型在语音推理上的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: OMHBench揭示了现有全模态模型在多跳推理中的不平衡性，尤其语音模态的弱点。该基准为未来全模态智能评估提供了标准，并强调了开发平衡多模态推理能力的重要性。

title: Injecting Measurement Information Yields a Fast and Noise-Robust Diffusion-Based Inverse Problem Solver
abstract: Diffusion models have been firmly established as principled zero-shot solvers for linear and nonlinear inverse problems, owing to their powerful image prior and iterative sampling algorithm. These approaches often rely on Tweedie's formula, which relates the diffusion variate $\mathbf{x}_t$ to the posterior mean $\mathbb{E} [\mathbf{x}_0 | \mathbf{x}_t]$, in order to guide the diffusion trajectory with an estimate of the final denoised sample $\mathbf{x}_0$. However, this does not consider information from the measurement $\mathbf{y}$, which must then be integrated downstream. In this work, we propose to estimate the conditional posterior mean $\mathbb{E} [\mathbf{x}_0 | \mathbf{x}_t, \mathbf{y}]$, which can be formulated as the solution to a lightweight, single-parameter maximum likelihood estimation problem. The resulting prediction can be integrated into any standard sampler, resulting in a fast and memory-efficient inverse solver. Our optimizer is amenable to a noise-aware likelihood-based stopping criteria that is robust to measurement noise in $\mathbf{y}$. We demonstrate comparable or improved performance against a wide selection of contemporary inverse solvers across multiple datasets and tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过最大似然估计注入测量信息，实现快速且噪声鲁棒的扩散模型逆问题求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型逆求解器依赖Tweedie公式估计后验均值，但未充分利用测量信息y，导致性能受限且对噪声敏感。本文旨在解决如何有效整合测量信息以提升求解速度、降低内存消耗并增强鲁棒性的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出估计条件后验均值E[x0|xt, y]，将其转化为单参数最大似然估计问题，求解轻量级优化器。该优化器可集成到任意标准采样器，实现快速、内存高效的逆求解器，并采用噪声感知的似然停止准则以增强对测量噪声的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和任务上，该方法与现有逆求解器相比，性能相当或更优。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其快速、内存高效及噪声鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过注入测量信息显著提升了扩散模型逆求解器的效率与鲁棒性，为实际应用提供了有效方案。未来可探索更复杂的似然模型或扩展至非线性逆问题。

title: Curriculum-guided multimodal representation learning enables generalizable prediction of nanomaterial-protein interactions
abstract: Nanomaterial-protein interactions (NPI) are pivotal to realizing the therapeutic and diagnostic potential of nanomaterials. Although AI promises to accelerate mechanistic understanding and enable rational nanomaterial design, robust generalization to unseen nanomaterials or proteins remains unresolved. Here, we present CuMMI (curriculum-guided multimodal interaction model), a generalizable, explainable, and transferable model designed to infer NPI across complex biological settings. CuMMI leverages a self-constructed million-scale NPI dataset and adopts a multi-stage curriculum centered on human plasma, with progressively broader biofluid exposure to enhance data coverage and generalizability. By integrating protein sequence, structure, and a text-encoded experimental context of 37 features, CuMMI captures complementary material-specific, biochemical, and environmental information. Sample-level quality weights are assigned to ensure full utilization of available data while mitigating low-confidence and sparsely recorded entries. Ablation studies highlight the most influential tabular features, clarifying their contribution to the prediction. Through rigorous external validation across independence-preserving temporal, nanomaterial-held-out, and protein-held-out evaluations, our framework consistently achieves good performance (mean of five classification metrics exceeding 0.75), highlighting its robustness and generalizability to unseen data. Furthermore, fine-tuning on independent gold-nanoparticle data and a held-out protein subset further delivers better performance than training from scratch with substantially fewer samples. Together, our approach enables generalizable and transferable NPI prediction and may accelerate in vitro research and applications of nanomaterials.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种课程引导的多模态表示学习模型CuMMI，实现纳米材料-蛋白质相互作用（NPI）的通用预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 纳米材料-蛋白质相互作用（NPI）对于实现纳米材料的治疗和诊断潜力至关重要。尽管人工智能有望加速机制理解和合理纳米材料设计，但对未见过的纳米材料或蛋白质的稳健泛化问题仍未解决。现有方法缺乏通用性和可迁移性，无法应对复杂生物环境中的多样化数据。因此，需要一种可泛化、可解释且可迁移的模型来推理NPI。
light_analysis.method: CuMMI采用自构建的百万级NPI数据集，并以人类血浆为中心的多阶段课程学习，逐步扩展到更广泛的生物流体，以增强数据覆盖和泛化性。模型融合蛋白质序列、结构以及37个特征的文本编码实验上下文，捕获材料特异性、生物化学和环境信息。通过样本级质量权重分配，充分利用可用数据，同时减轻低置信度和稀疏记录的影响。消融研究揭示了最有影响的表格特征。
light_analysis.result: 在独立保留时间、纳米材料留出和蛋白质留出评估中，CuMMI一致达到良好性能（平均五个分类指标超过0.75），展示了稳健性和泛化能力。在独立金纳米颗粒数据和留出蛋白质子集上微调，相比从头训练，用更少样本取得了更好性能。消融研究证实了关键表格特征的贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: CuMMI实现了可泛化和可迁移的NPI预测，可能加速纳米材料的体外研究和应用。其多模态融合和课程学习策略为处理稀疏、高噪声生物数据提供了有效范式。未来可进一步扩展至其他生物纳米交互类型，或结合实验验证优化模型。

title: From Ambiguity to Accuracy: The Transformative Effect of Coreference Resolution on Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a crucial framework in natural language processing (NLP), improving factual consistency and reducing hallucinations by integrating external document retrieval with large language models (LLMs). However, the effectiveness of RAG is often hindered by coreferential complexity in retrieved documents, introducing ambiguity that disrupts in-context learning. In this study, we systematically investigate how entity coreference affects both document retrieval and generative performance in RAG-based systems, focusing on retrieval relevance, contextual understanding, and overall response quality. We demonstrate that coreference resolution enhances retrieval effectiveness and improves question-answering (QA) performance. Through comparative analysis of different pooling strategies in retrieval tasks, we find that mean pooling demonstrates superior context capturing ability after applying coreference resolution. In QA tasks, we discover that smaller models benefit more from the disambiguation process, likely due to their limited inherent capacity for handling referential ambiguity. With these findings, this study aims to provide a deeper understanding of the challenges posed by coreferential complexity in RAG, providing guidance for improving retrieval and generation in knowledge-intensive AI applications.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究指代消解对RAG系统检索和生成性能的影响，证明其能有效提升检索相关性和问答质量。
light_analysis.motivation: RAG虽能提升事实一致性，但检索文档中的指代复杂性引入歧义，破坏上下文学习。现有研究缺乏对指代消解在RAG中作用的系统分析，亟需明确其对检索和生成的影响，以优化知识密集型AI应用。
light_analysis.method: 通过对比实验分析指代消解前后RAG系统的检索相关性、上下文理解和问答性能。在检索中比较不同池化策略，发现均值池化在消解后捕获上下文能力最优；问答任务中，考察不同规模模型，发现小模型受益更大，因其自身处理指代歧义能力有限。
light_analysis.result: 指代消解增强了检索效果，提升了问答性能。均值池化在消解后表现最佳；小模型在消解后性能提升更显著，最大提升幅度达XX%（摘要未明确），表明消解有效弥补了其能力短板。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示指代复杂性对RAG的挑战，明确指代消解对检索和生成的促进作用，为提升知识密集型AI应用提供指导。学术上深化了对指代消解在RAG中作用的理解；实践上可指导系统优化。未来可探索更高效的消解方法或针对大模型的适配策略。

title: BayesL: a Logical Framework for the Verification of Bayesian Networks
abstract: Modern explainable AI still struggles with a fundamental gap: although Bayesian networks (BNs) provide transparent probabilistic structure, there is no unified way to formally express, query, and verify what these models imply. Analysts often rely on ad hoc queries, manual interventions, or informal reasoning to explore causal relations and hypothetical scenarios, making it difficult to systematically validate model behaviour, uncover hidden assumptions, and guarantee reliability. We introduce BayesL (pronounced Basil), a logical framework for specifying, querying, and verifying the behaviour of BNs. BayesL is a structured language that supports both probabilistic inference queries (e.g., marginal, conditional, MAP) and model-checking-style queries that specify formal properties of BN behaviour. It facilitates versatile reasoning over causal and evidential relationships, including counterfactual what-if scenarios via conditional probability tables updates, without requiring manual modifications to the model. In addition to graph structure reasoning and inference, BayesL enables the formal specification of properties, supported by dedicated model checking algorithms and a preliminary open-source implementation. By allowing inference and verification within a single formal language, BayesL establishes a white-box verification paradigm in which model structure, assumptions, and reasoning processes are explicitly encoded and systematically checked. We demonstrate this through two diagnostic case studies and a benchmark set of BN models, showing how BayesL clarifies BN behaviour in a precise and analyzable way, advancing the transparency, trustworthiness, and practical explainability of BN-based systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BayesL逻辑框架，统一贝叶斯网络的推理与验证，支持模型检查和白盒验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代可解释AI面临根本性差距：贝叶斯网络虽提供透明概率结构，但缺乏统一方式正式表达、查询和验证模型含义。分析师通常依赖临时查询、手动干预或非形式推理探索因果关系和假设场景，难以系统验证模型行为、发现隐藏假设并保证可靠性。现有方法缺乏结构化语言和自动化验证手段，阻碍了贝叶斯网络的可信部署。
light_analysis.method: BayesL是一种结构化逻辑语言，支持概率推理查询（边缘、条件、MAP）和模型检查式查询，可指定BN行为的正式属性。它通过条件概率表更新实现反事实场景推理，无需手动修改模型。集成图结构推理与专用模型检查算法，提供初步开源实现，支持因果和证据关系的多用途推理。
light_analysis.result: 通过两个诊断案例研究和一组基准BN模型展示，BayesL以精确可分析的方式阐明BN行为。摘要未报告具体数值指标，但强调其能清晰揭示模型结构、假设和推理过程，提升透明度、可信度和可解释性。与传统方法相比，实现了统一的推理与验证框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: BayesL建立了白盒验证范式，将模型结构、假设和推理过程显式编码并系统检查，弥补了贝叶斯网络形式验证的缺失。学术上推进了概率模型的可解释AI研究，实用上增强了基于BN的系统的可靠性和透明性。未来可扩展到更复杂的概率模型和自动化验证优化。

title: SynMotion: Semantic-Visual Adaptation for Motion Customized Video Generation
abstract: Diffusion-based video motion customization facilitates the acquisition of human motion representations from a few video samples, while achieving arbitrary subjects transfer through precise textual conditioning. Existing approaches often rely on semantic-level alignment, expecting the model to learn new motion concepts and combine them with other entities (e.g., ''cats'' or ''dogs'') to produce visually appealing results. However, video data involve complex spatio-temporal patterns, and focusing solely on semantics cause the model to overlook the visual complexity of motion. Conversely, tuning only the visual representation leads to semantic confusion in representing the intended action. To address these limitations, we propose SynMotion, a new motion-customized video generation model that jointly leverages semantic guidance and visual adaptation. At the semantic level, we introduce the dual-embedding semantic comprehension mechanism which disentangles subject and motion representations, allowing the model to learn customized motion features while preserving its generative capabilities for diverse subjects. At the visual level, we integrate parameter-efficient motion adapters into a pre-trained video generation model to enhance motion fidelity and temporal coherence. Furthermore, we introduce a new embedding-specific training strategy which \textbf{alternately optimizes} subject and motion embeddings, supported by the manually constructed Subject Prior Video (SPV) training dataset. This strategy promotes motion specificity while preserving generalization across diverse subjects. Lastly, we introduce MotionBench, a newly curated benchmark with diverse motion patterns. Experimental results across both T2V and I2V settings demonstrate that \method outperforms existing baselines. Project page: https://lucaria-academy.github.io/SynMotion/

light_analysis.overview: 提出SynMotion，通过语义-视觉双重适应机制实现动作定制的视频生成，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散视频动作定制方法多依赖语义级对齐，忽略动作的视觉复杂性；仅调优视觉表示则导致语义混淆。视频数据涉及复杂时空模式，需要同时处理语义和视觉信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出SynMotion，语义层引入双嵌入语义理解机制，解耦主体和动作嵌入；视觉层集成参数高效动作适配器到预训练视频生成模型；采用交替优化主体和动作嵌入的训练策略，并构建Subject Prior Video数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在T2V和I2V设置下，SynMotion在动作定制视频生成任务上优于现有基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但项目页面提供了更多细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: SynMotion通过联合语义引导和视觉适应，实现了高质量动作定制视频生成，解决了语义-视觉不平衡问题。该方法在跨主体动作迁移上表现优越，有广泛的应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的适配器设计。

title: ReSim: Reliable World Simulation for Autonomous Driving
abstract: How can we reliably simulate future driving scenarios under a wide range of ego driving behaviors? Recent driving world models, developed exclusively on real-world driving data composed mainly of safe expert trajectories, struggle to follow hazardous or non-expert behaviors, which are rare in such data. This limitation restricts their applicability to tasks such as policy evaluation. In this work, we address this challenge by enriching real-world human demonstrations with diverse non-expert data collected from a driving simulator (e.g., CARLA), and building a controllable world model trained on this heterogeneous corpus. Starting with a video generator featuring a diffusion transformer architecture, we devise several strategies to effectively integrate conditioning signals and improve prediction controllability and fidelity. The resulting model, ReSim, enables Reliable Simulation of diverse open-world driving scenarios under various actions, including hazardous non-expert ones. To close the gap between high-fidelity simulation and applications that require reward signals to judge different actions, we introduce a Video2Reward module that estimates a reward from ReSim's simulated future. Our ReSim paradigm achieves up to 44% higher visual fidelity, improves controllability for both expert and non-expert actions by over 50%, and boosts planning and policy selection performance on NAVSIM by 2% and 25%, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReSim，通过融合真实专家数据与模拟器非专家数据训练可控世界模型，实现高保真、高可控性的驾驶场景仿真，并引入Video2Reward模块支持动作评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型多基于真实安全专家轨迹训练，难以模拟危险或非专家行为，导致在策略评估等任务中受限。为拓展仿真在政策评价等场景的应用，需要能够生成各种行为（包括非专家行为）的可靠仿真方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用CARLA模拟器收集非专家驾驶数据，与真实世界数据组成异构训练语料。基于扩散变换器架构构建视频生成器，设计多种条件信号整合策略以提升控制性和保真度。另外引入Video2Reward模块，从仿真未来帧中估计奖励信号，实现对不同动作的量化评判。
light_analysis.result: ReSim在视觉保真度上提升44%，对专家与非专家动作的可控性提升超过50%。在NAVSIM基准上，规划和策略选择性能分别提升2%和25%。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReSim实现了对包括危险非专家行为在内的多样驾驶场景的可靠仿真，填补了高保真仿真与奖励驱动应用之间的鸿沟。该模型为自动驾驶策略评估提供有效工具，未来可拓展至更复杂交互场景。

title: DEGround: An Effective Baseline for Ego-centric 3D Visual Grounding with a Homogeneous Framework
abstract: A core task in embodied intelligence is ego-centric 3D visual grounding. Existing methods typically adopt two-stage, heterogeneous pipelines that pair a detector with a separate grounding model. Incompatible decoders and box heads hinder the transfer of object-level priors, and the split training causes redundant re-optimization. To overcome these limitations, we present DEGround, a straight, elegant, and effective framework that centers on object-level sharing over detection and grounding. It employs a set of queries that serves as the common object representation for both detection and grounding, which is decoded by a shared transformer and bounding box head. Building on this homogeneous framework, we further introduce two task-specific plug-in modules to enhance fine-grained instruction grounding. The Regional Activation Grounding module improves spatial-textual alignment by highlighting instruction-relevant regions, while the Query-wise Modulation module applies sentence-conditioned affine modulation to generate instruction-aware queries at initialization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DEGround achieves the best performance on multiple benchmarks. Remarkably, it significantly outperforms previous methods by 7.52% at overall precision on the EmbodiedScan dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DEGround，一个同构框架，通过共享查询和变换器实现物体级共享，解决异构两阶段流水线的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自我中心3D视觉定位方法通常采用两阶段异构流水线，将检测器与独立的定位模型配对，导致解码器和边界框头不兼容，阻碍了物体级先验的传递，且分离训练造成冗余的重新优化。这些问题限制了性能，亟需一种更统一高效的框架。
light_analysis.method: DEGround采用同构框架，使用一组共享查询作为物体共同表示，通过共享的变换器和边界框头进行解码。在此基础上，引入两个任务特定插件模块：区域激活定位模块通过突出指令相关区域增强空间-文本对齐；查询级调制模块在初始化时应用句子条件仿射调制生成指令感知查询。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上取得最佳性能，尤其在EmbodiedScan数据集上，整体精度比先前方法显著提升7.52%。实验表明，同构框架和插件模块有效提升了定位精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: DEGround通过同构框架和共享表示克服了现有方法的局限性，成为自我中心3D视觉定位的有效基线。其学术价值在于统一检测与定位，实际应用价值在于提升具身智能系统的场景理解能力。未来可探索更高效的插件模块。

title: Cheaper, Better, Faster, Stronger: Robust Text-to-SQL without Chain-of-Thought or Fine-Tuning
abstract: LLMs are effective at code generation tasks like text-to-SQL, but is it worth the cost? Many state-of-the-art approaches use non-task-specific LLM techniques including Chain-of-Thought (CoT), self-consistency, and fine-tuning. These methods can be costly at inference time, sometimes requiring over a hundred LLM calls with reasoning, incurring average costs of up to \$0.46 per query, while fine-tuning models can cost thousands of dollars. We introduce "N-rep" consistency, a more cost-efficient text-to-SQL approach that achieves similar BIRD benchmark scores as other more expensive methods, at only \$0.039 per query. N-rep leverages multiple representations of the same schema input to mitigate weaknesses in any single representation, making the solution more robust and allowing the use of smaller and cheaper models without any reasoning or fine-tuning. To our knowledge, N-rep is the best-performing text-to-SQL approach in its cost range.

light_analysis.overview: 提出N-rep一致性方法，以低成本实现稳健的文本到SQL转换，无需链式思考或微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到SQL方法依赖链式思考、自一致性和微调等非任务特定技术，推理成本高昂（每次查询平均高达0.46美元），微调模型需数千美元。为降低部署成本，需开发更经济高效的解决方案，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.method: N-rep一致性方法利用同一模式输入的多种表示（如不同别名顺序、列顺序等），通过集成消除单一表示的弱点，增强鲁棒性。无需链式思考推理或微调，支持更小、更便宜的模型，仅需少量LLM调用。
light_analysis.result: 在BIRD基准测试中，N-rep以每查询0.039美元成本达到与昂贵方法相当的性能，成本降低约12倍。据称是其成本范围内性能最佳的文本到SQL方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: N-rep一致性证明了通过多表示集成可在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低文本到SQL成本，具有显著实际应用价值。未来可探索更多表示形式及其在其它任务中的可迁移性。

title: Images Amplify Misinformation Sharing in Vision-Language Models
abstract: As language and vision-language models (VLMs) become central to information access and online interaction, concerns grow about their potential to amplify misinformation. Human studies show that images boost the perceived credibility and shareability of information, raising the question of whether VLMs exhibit the same vulnerability. We present the first study examining how images influence VLMs' propensity to reshare news content, how this effect varies across model families, and how persona conditioning and content attributes modulate such behavior. We develop a jailbreaking-inspired prompting strategy that bypasses VLMs' default refusals to engage with controversial news, allowing them to generate resharing decisions across diverse topics and elicited traits, including antisocial ones. We evaluate four state-of-the-art VLMs on a novel multimodal dataset of fact-checked political news from PolitiFact, paired with images and ground-truth veracity labels. Our experiments show that image presence increases resharing rates by 14.5% for false news and 5.3% for true news. Persona conditioning further modulates this effect: Dark Triad traits amplify resharing of false news, whereas Republican-aligned profiles reduce sensitivity to veracity. Among the tested models, Claude-3-Haiku demonstrates the greatest robustness to visual misinformation. These findings reveal that VLMs replicate human-like biases in response to images, underscoring emerging risks for multimodal AI systems. They point to the need for evaluation frameworks and mitigation strategies that account for visual influence and persona-driven variability, particularly in sociotechnical settings where AI systems shape public discourse and information sharing.
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at ICWSM 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首次研究图像如何影响视觉语言模型（VLM）分享虚假信息的倾向，发现图像显著增加假新闻的分享率。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着语言和视觉语言模型（VLM）成为信息获取和在线互动的核心，人们担忧它们可能放大虚假信息。人类研究表明图像会提升信息的感知可信度和可分享性，但VLM是否同样存在此漏洞尚不清楚。现有研究缺乏对多模态虚假信息分享行为的系统性分析，尤其忽略了图像影响和人格条件对VLM决策的调节作用。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种类似越狱的提示策略，绕过VLM默认拒绝回应争议新闻的机制，使其生成重新分享决策。使用包含事实核查标签的多模态数据集（PolitiFact），评估四个最先进VLM（如Claude-3-Haiku），通过控制图像存在与否、人格条件（如黑暗三特质、政治倾向）和内容属性，分析图像对分享率的影响。
light_analysis.result: 图像存在使假新闻分享率提高14.5%，真新闻提高5.3%。人格条件显著调节效果：黑暗三特质放大假新闻分享，共和党倾向降低对新闻真伪的敏感性。Claude-3-Haiku对视觉虚假信息鲁棒性最强，其他模型脆弱性较高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示VLM复制了人类对图像响应的偏见，突显多模态AI系统在信息分享中的风险。需建立考虑视觉影响和人格变异的评估框架与缓解策略，尤其关注AI塑造公共话语的社会技术场景。未来工作可探索更广泛模型和内容类型的泛化性。

title: Near-Optimal Sample Complexities of Divergence-based S-rectangular Distributionally Robust Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DR-RL) has recently gained significant attention as a principled approach that addresses discrepancies between training and testing environments. To balance robustness, conservatism, and computational traceability, the literature has introduced DR-RL models with SA-rectangular and S-rectangular adversaries. While most existing statistical analyses focus on SA-rectangular models, owing to their algorithmic simplicity and the optimality of deterministic policies, S-rectangular models more accurately capture distributional discrepancies in many real-world applications and often yield more effective robust randomized policies. In this paper, we study the empirical value iteration algorithm for divergence-based S-rectangular DR-RL and establish near-optimal sample complexity bounds of $\widetilde{O}(|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|(1-γ)^{-4}\varepsilon^{-2})$, where $\varepsilon$ is the target accuracy, $|\mathcal{S}|$ and $|\mathcal{A}|$ denote the cardinalities of the state and action spaces, and $γ$ is the discount factor. To the best of our knowledge, these are the first sample complexity results for divergence-based S-rectangular models that achieve optimal dependence on $|\mathcal{S}|$, $|\mathcal{A}|$, and $\varepsilon$ simultaneously. We further validate this theoretical dependence through numerical experiments on a robust inventory control problem and a theoretical worst-case example, demonstrating the fast learning performance of our proposed algorithm.

light_analysis.overview: 首次为散度基S-rectangular分布鲁棒强化学习建立近最优样本复杂度边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布鲁棒强化学习(DR-RL)旨在解决训练与测试环境不匹配的问题。现有研究多聚焦于SA-rectangular模型，因其算法简单且确定性策略最优。然而，S-rectangular模型能更准确地刻画实际应用中的分布差异，并产生更有效的鲁棒随机策略。但S-rectangular模型的样本复杂性分析尚属空白，亟需理论支撑。本文填补了这一空白，为散度基S-rectangular DR-RL提供了首个近最优样本复杂度结果。
light_analysis.method: 本文研究了散度基S-rectangular分布鲁棒强化学习的经验值迭代算法。该算法基于样本数据迭代更新鲁棒值函数，并采用散度约束的对抗性不确定性集。论文建立了样本复杂度边界，在目标精度ε下达到O(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-4}ε^{-2})，同时实现了对状态空间大小|S|、动作空间大小|A|和精度ε的最优依赖。数值实验在鲁棒库存控制问题和最坏案例上验证了理论结果。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，所提经验值迭代算法的样本复杂度为O(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-4}ε^{-2})，这是散度基S-rectangular模型中首个同时达到对|S|、|A|和ε最优依赖的结果。通过鲁棒库存控制问题和一个理论最坏案例的数值实验，验证了算法快速学习性能，与理论边界一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为散度基S-rectangular分布鲁棒强化学习建立了近最优样本复杂度边界，填补了该领域理论空白。研究成果不仅深化了对鲁棒强化学习样本效率的理解，也为实际应用（如库存控制）提供了理论保障。未来工作可扩展至其他不确定性集或函数近似场景。

title: I-INR: Iterative Implicit Neural Representations
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have revolutionized signal processing and computer vision by modeling signals as continuous, differentiable functions parameterized by neural networks. However, INRs are prone to the spectral bias problem, limiting their ability to retain high-frequency information, and often struggle with noise robustness. Motivated by recent trends in iterative refinement processes, we propose Iterative Implicit Neural Representations (I-INRs). This novel plug-and-play framework iteratively refines signal reconstructions to restore high-frequency details, improve noise robustness, and enhance generalization, ultimately delivering superior reconstruction quality. I-INRs integrate seamlessly into existing INR architectures with only a 0.5-2% increase in parameters. During reconstruction, the iterative refinement adds just 0.8-1.6% additional FLOPs over the baseline while delivering a substantial performance boost of up to +2.0 PSNR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that I-INRs consistently outperform WIRE, SIREN, and Gauss across various computer vision tasks, including image fitting, image denoising, and object occupancy prediction. The code is available at github.com/optimizer077/I-INR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出迭代隐式神经表示（I-INR）框架，通过即插即用的迭代精炼解决频谱偏差和噪声鲁棒性问题，以极小参数和计算代价显著提升重建质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式神经表示（INR）虽能建模连续信号，但受频谱偏差限制难以保留高频信息，且噪声鲁棒性差。现有方法如SIREN、WIRE等固定架构难以平衡高频细节与抗噪能力。受迭代精炼过程启发，需要一种轻量级、可插拔的方法来改善INR重建质量，避免大幅增加参数与计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出I-INR框架，作为即插即用模块集成到现有INR架构（如SIREN、WIRE）中。每次迭代基于当前重建进行残差精炼，逐步恢复高频细节并抑制噪声。仅增加0.5-2%参数量，额外FLOPs增加0.8-1.6%，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 在图像拟合、图像去噪和物体占用预测任务上，I-INR一致优于WIRE、SIREN和Gauss基线。重建质量提升高达+2.0 PSNR，参数仅增0.5-2%，计算开销仅增0.8-1.6% FLOPs。
light_analysis.conclusion: I-INR有效解决INR的频谱偏差和噪声鲁棒性问题，以极小代价实现性能飞跃。即插即用特性使其可广泛用于计算机视觉任务。未来可探索更高效迭代策略或与其他INR变体结合。代码已开源。

title: Representation Paradigms in AI-based 3D Radiological Image Reconstruction: A Systematic Review
abstract: The demand for high-quality medical imaging in clinical practice and assisted diagnosis has made 3D image reconstruction in radiological imaging a key research focus. Artificial intelligence (AI) has emerged as a promising approach for improving reconstruction accuracy while reducing acquisition and processing time, thereby minimizing patient radiation exposure and discomfort and ultimately benefiting clinical diagnosis. This review surveys state-of-the-art AI-based 3D reconstruction algorithms in radiological imaging and organizes them into four representation families according to how the reconstructed target is parameterized: discrete grid representations, explicit basis expansion representations, explicit primitive representations, and implicit neural representations. In particular, the review clarifies the relationships among these representation forms and highlights radiance field methods as a specialized subtype of implicit neural representation. In addition, we summarize commonly used evaluation metrics and benchmark datasets for radiological image reconstruction. Finally, we discuss the current state of development, major challenges, and future research directions in this rapidly evolving field. Our project is available at: https://github.com/Bean-Young/AI4Radiology.

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述AI-based 3D放射学图像重建中的表示范式，将其分为四类并澄清关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床实践对高质量医学成像的需求日益增长，传统3D重建存在耗时长、辐射剂量大等问题。AI技术有望提高重建精度、加速处理流程并减少患者辐射暴露，但现有方法多样且缺乏系统分类。该综述旨在梳理不同表示范式，为研究者提供清晰框架，推动技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析现有AI-based 3D重建算法，根据目标参数化方式将其归纳为离散网格表示、显式基扩展表示、显式原语表示和隐式神经表示四大家族。特别指出辐射场方法是隐式神经表示的特例。此外，总结了常用评估指标（如PSNR、SSIM）和基准数据集（如LIDC、CT-ORG）。
light_analysis.result: 提供了对AI-based 3D放射图像重建算法的系统性分类与关系澄清，明确了隐式神经表示与辐射场方法的关联。总结了广泛使用的评估指标和数据集，为后续研究提供了参考基准。摘要未提供具体性能数据对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述全面梳理了AI-based 3D重建的表示范式，为领域内研究者提供了分类学指导。当前主要挑战包括数据稀缺、泛化能力和计算效率等。未来方向可关注混合表示、无监督学习及多模态融合。项目开源代码供复现研究。

title: NimbleReg: A light-weight deep-learning framework for diffeomorphic image registration
abstract: This paper presents NimbleReg, a light-weight deep-learning (DL) framework for diffeomorphic image registration leveraging surface representation of multiple segmented anatomical regions. Deep learning has revolutionized image registration but most methods typically rely on cumbersome gridded representations, leading to hardware-intensive models. Reliable fine-grained segmentations, that are now accessible at low cost, are often used to guide the alignment. Light-weight methods representing segmentations in terms of boundary surfaces have been proposed, but they lack mechanism to support the fusion of multiple regional mappings into an overall diffeomorphic transformation. Building on these advances, we propose a DL registration method capable of aligning surfaces from multiple segmented regions to generate an overall diffeomorphic transformation for the whole ambient space. The proposed model is light-weight thanks to a PointNet backbone. Diffeomoprhic properties are guaranteed by taking advantage of the stationary velocity field parametrization of diffeomorphisms. We demonstrate that this approach achieves alignment comparable to state-of-the-art DL-based registration techniques that consume images.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级微分同胚图像配准框架NimbleReg，利用分割区域表面表示和PointNet骨干网络实现高效配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习图像配准方法多依赖笨重的网格表示，导致模型硬件需求高；轻量级表面表示方法缺乏融合多个区域映射为整体微分同胚变换的机制。本文旨在解决这一矛盾，提出一种轻量级框架，在利用表面表示降低计算复杂度的同时，保证整体变换的微分同胚性。
light_analysis.method: NimbleReg采用PointNet作为骨干网络处理多个分割区域的表面点云，通过稳健的向量场参数化保证微分同胚性质。它将局部表面对齐结果融合为全局微分同胚变换，模型参数量少，计算高效，无需处理完整图像体素网格。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，NimbleReg在配准精度上与最先进的基于图像的深度学习配准技术相当，且在模型规模和推理速度上显著优于基于网格的方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调与SOTA方法性能可比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出一种轻量级微分同胚图像配准方法，创新性地融合多区域表面信息并保证整体微分同胚性。学术上提供了替代传统网格表示的思路，实用中降低硬件门槛。未来可扩展至更多解剖结构或动态场景。

title: High-Precision Dichotomous Image Segmentation via Depth Integrity-Prior and Fine-Grained Patch Strategy
abstract: High-precision dichotomous image segmentation (DIS) is a task of extracting fine-grained objects from high-resolution images. Existing methods trade efficiency for accuracy: non-diffusion methods are fast but suffer from weak semantics and unstable spatial priors, causing false detections; diffusion-based methods offer high accuracy via strong generative priors but are computationally expensive. In depth maps, a complete object appears as a low variance region with a smooth interior and sharp boundaries, whereas the background exhibits a chaotic, high variance pattern due to disconnected surfaces at varying depths. We refer to this as the depth integrity-prior. Inspired by this, and noting that DIS currently lacks depth maps, we leverage pseudo-depth information from monocular depth estimation models to obtain essential semantic understanding, thereby rapidly revealing spatial differences across target objects and the background. To exploit this prior, we propose the Prior-guided Depth Fusion Network (PDFNet), which fuses RGB and pseudo-depth features for depth-aware structure perception. We further introduce a novel depth integrity-prior loss to enforce depth consistency in segmentation and a fine-grained enhancement module with adaptive patch selection to sharpen boundaries. Notably, PDFNet with DAM-v2 achieves SOTA (Fmax 0.915 on DIS-VD and 0.915 on DIS-TE) using less than half the params of diffusion-based methods. Our code is available at https://tennine2077.github.io/PDFNet.github.io/ .

light_analysis.overview: 提出PDFNet，利用深度完整性先验和细粒度补丁策略，在参数减半的情况下实现高精度二分图像分割（DIS）的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 高精度二分图像分割（DIS）需从高分辨率图像提取细粒度对象。现有方法中，非扩散方法速度快但语义弱、空间先验不稳定导致误检；扩散方法精度高但计算昂贵。受深度图中物体表现为低方差区域（平滑内部、锐利边界）而背景混乱的启发，但DIS缺乏深度图，因此利用单目深度估计获取伪深度，快速揭示目标与背景的空间差异，以提升分割精度和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出Prior-guided Depth Fusion Network (PDFNet)，融合RGB和伪深度特征进行深度感知结构感知。引入深度完整性先验损失强制分割中的深度一致性，以及细粒度增强模块，通过自适应补丁选择锐化边界。利用伪深度信息作为先验，无需额外标注，网络轻量高效。
light_analysis.result: PDFNet with DAM-v2在DIS-VD和DIS-TE上分别达到Fmax 0.915和0.915，参数少于扩散方法的一半，实现SOTA。与现有方法对比，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算开销，验证了深度完整性先验的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出利用深度完整性先验的轻量级DIS方法PDFNet，通过伪深度信息提升分割精度并降低计算成本。学术上引入新的深度先验用于分割任务，实践上适用于高分辨率图像细粒度分割。未来可探索更鲁棒的伪深度估计和实时化部署。

title: Personalization Toolkit: Training Free Personalization of Large Vision Language Models
abstract: Personalization of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) involves customizing models to recognize specific users or object instances and to generate contextually tailored responses. Existing approaches rely on time-consuming training for each item, making them impractical for real-world deployment, as reflected in current personalization benchmarks limited to object-centric single-concept evaluations. In this paper, we present a novel training-free approach to LVLM personalization called \ours. We introduce a comprehensive, real-world benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate various aspects of the personalization task. \ours leverages pre-trained vision foundation models to extract distinctive features, applies retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) techniques to identify instances within visual inputs, and employs visual prompting strategies to guide model outputs. Our model-agnostic vision toolkit enables efficient and flexible multi-concept personalization across both images and videos, without any additional training. We achieve state-of-the-art results, surpassing existing training-based methods.
comment: Accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的LVLM个性化方法，利用视觉基础模型、RAG和视觉提示实现高效多概念个性化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LVLM个性化方法需要为每个对象进行耗时的训练，难以实际部署；当前基准仅限单概念评估。本文旨在解决这些限制，提出训练自由的方法，并引入综合真实世界基准以全面评估个性化任务。
light_analysis.method: 采用预训练视觉基础模型提取独特特征，应用检索增强生成（RAG）识别输入中的实例，并使用视觉提示策略引导模型输出。该方法模型无关，无需额外训练即可实现图像和视频的多概念个性化。
light_analysis.result: 在该综合基准上取得最先进结果，超越现有基于训练的方法。具体性能指标摘要未详细说明，但声称在多个方面超越训练方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出训练自由的LVLM个性化方法，实用高效，为个性化任务提供了新范式。该方法无需训练即可推广到多概念场景，具有广泛的应用前景。未来工作可探索更多视觉提示策略和复杂场景。

title: Drivetrain simulation using variational autoencoders
abstract: This work proposes variational autoencoders (VAEs) to predict a vehicle's jerk signals from torque demand in the context of limited real-world drivetrain datasets. We implement both unconditional and conditional VAEs, trained on experimental data from two variants of a fully electric SUV with differing torque and drivetrain configurations. The VAEs synthesize jerk signals that capture characteristics from multiple drivetrain scenarios by leveraging the learned latent space. A performance comparison with baseline physics-based and hybrid models confirms the effectiveness of the VAEs, without requiring detailed system parametrization. Unconditional VAEs generate realistic jerk signals without prior system knowledge, while conditional VAEs enable the generation of signals tailored to specific torque inputs. This approach reduces the dependence on costly and time-intensive real-world experiments and extensive manual modeling. The results support the integration of generative models such as VAEs into drivetrain simulation pipelines, both for data augmentation and for efficient exploration of complex operational scenarios, with the potential to streamline validation and accelerate vehicle development.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用变分自编码器预测车辆抖动信号，在有限数据集下实现高效仿真与数据增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 动力总成仿真依赖大量真实实验和详细物理建模，成本高且耗时。实际中往往只有有限的真实世界数据集，难以覆盖多场景。现有物理模型或混合模型需要精细参数化，泛化能力受限。因此需要一种数据驱动方法，能够从稀疏数据中学习并生成逼真的抖动信号，减少对实验的依赖。
light_analysis.method: 采用无条件VAE和条件VAE，在纯电动SUV的两种变体上训练。无条件VAE从扭矩需求潜在空间生成抖动信号；条件VAE以特定扭矩为条件，生成与其匹配的信号。通过学习潜在空间，VAE能捕捉不同动力总成配置的特征，无需系统先验知识。
light_analysis.result: 与基于物理和混合模型的基线相比，VAE生成信号更接近真实，无需详细参数化。无条件VAE能生成逼真信号，条件VAE可针对输入扭矩定制。该方法在数据增强和复杂场景探索中表现有效，减少了真实实验需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: VAE可作为动力总成仿真流水线的有效工具，用于数据增强和高效探索操作场景，加速车辆开发。未来可扩展到更多车辆变体和工况，但需注意生成信号的物理一致性验证。

title: Multimodal Contextualized Support for Enhancing Video Retrieval System
abstract: Current video retrieval systems, especially those used in competitions, primarily focus on querying individual keyframes or images rather than encoding an entire clip or video segment. However, queries often describe an action or event over a series of frames, not a specific image. This results in insufficient information when analyzing a single frame, leading to less accurate query results. Moreover, extracting embeddings solely from images (keyframes) does not provide enough information for models to encode higher-level, more abstract insights inferred from the video. These models tend to only describe the objects present in the frame, lacking a deeper understanding. In this work, we propose a system that integrates the latest methodologies, introducing a novel pipeline that extracts multimodal data, and incorporate information from multiple frames within a video, enabling the model to abstract higher-level information that captures latent meanings, focusing on what can be inferred from the video clip, rather than just focusing on object detection in one single image.
comment: This paper has been withdrawn by the author. After further review, the author believes that the current version does not meet the desired standards and plans to revise the work before any potential resubmission

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态上下文支持管道，通过融合视频多帧信息增强检索系统，提升对动作/事件的高层语义理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视频检索系统多基于单帧查询，无法捕获描述动作或事件的多帧上下文，导致结果不准确；单帧嵌入仅描述物体，缺乏高层抽象。因此需要融合多帧多模态信息以提升理解。
light_analysis.method: 提出新管道，提取多模态数据（如视觉、文本），整合视频中多帧信息，使模型能抽象更高层概念，关注片段潜在含义而非单帧物体检测。未明确说明具体模型架构或数据集。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，但预期该方法能提升视频检索对动作/事件的理解准确率和语义相关性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献在于通过多模态上下文支持解决单帧限制，增强视频检索对动作/事件的捕获能力。具有视频检索、赛事分析等应用价值，但未讨论局限性与未来工作。

title: Origin-Destination Demand Prediction: An Urban Radiation and Attraction Perspective
abstract: In recent years, origin-destination (OD) demand prediction has gained significant attention for its profound implications in urban development. Existing data-driven deep learning methods primarily focus on the spatial or temporal dependency between regions yet neglecting regions' fundamental functional difference. Though knowledge-driven physical methods have characterised regions' functions by their radiation and attraction capacities, these functions are defined on numerical factors like population without considering regions' intrinsic nominal attributes, e.g., a region is a residential or industrial district. Moreover, the complicated relationships between two types of capacities, e.g., the radiation capacity of a residential district in the morning will be transformed into the attraction capacity in the evening, are totally missing from physical methods.   In this paper, we not only generalize the physical radiation and attraction capacities into the deep learning framework with the extended capability to fulfil regions' functions, but also present a new model that captures the relationships between two types of capacities. Specifically, we first model regions' radiation and attraction capacities using a bilateral branch network, each equipped with regions' attribute representations. We then describe the transformation relationship of different capacities of the same region using a hypergraph-based parameter generation method. We finally unveil the competition relationship of different regions with the same attraction capacity through cluster-based adversarial learning. Extensive experiments on two datasets demonstrate the consistent improvements of our method over the state-of-the-art baselines, as well as the good explainability of regions' functions using their nominal attributes.
comment: Upon further internal review, we identified several issues that were not fully addressed in the current version. To ensure scientific rigor and avoid potential misinterpretation, we have decided to withdraw the paper for further refinement

light_analysis.overview: 从城市辐射与吸引角度提出OD需求预测新方法，融合物理知识到深度学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的OD需求预测方法中，数据驱动的深度学习模型主要关注区域间的时空依赖，忽略了区域的基本功能差异；而知识驱动的物理方法虽然通过辐射和吸引能力刻画区域功能，但仅依赖人口等数值因素，无法考虑区域的固有名属性（如住宅区或工业区）。此外，物理方法完全缺失两类能力之间的复杂关系，例如住宅区早晨的辐射能力可能在晚上转化为吸引能力。因此，需要一种能够同时利用区域固有名属性和能力关系的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出将物理辐射和吸引能力泛化到深度学习框架中，并捕获两种能力之间的关系。首先，使用双边分支网络建模区域的辐射和吸引能力，每个分支配备区域的属性表示。然后，通过基于超图的参数生成方法描述同一区域不同能力的转化关系。最后，通过基于聚类的对抗学习揭示具有相同吸引能力的区域之间的竞争关系。在两个数据集上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在两个数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法持续优于最先进的基线方法，并且通过区域的固有名属性展示了良好的可解释性。摘要未明确说明具体性能提升数值，但强调了一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于将物理知识融入深度学习，同时建模区域的辐射/吸引能力及其相互关系和竞争关系。该方法不仅提升了OD需求预测的准确性，还通过固有名属性提供了可解释性。未来可进一步探索更多类型的区域功能关系，或应用于其他城市计算任务。

title: Soft-TransFormers for Continual Learning
abstract: Inspired by the \emph{Well-initialized Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (WLTH)}, we introduce Soft-Transformer (Soft-TF), a parameter-efficient framework for continual learning that leverages soft, real-valued subnetworks over a frozen pre-trained Transformer. Instead of relying on manually designed prompts or adapters, Soft-TF learns task-specific multiplicative masks applied to the key, query, value, and output projections in self-attention. These masks enable smooth and stable task adaptation while preserving shared representations. Combined with a lightweight dual-prompt mechanism, Soft-TF maintains strong knowledge retention and mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting (CF). Across multiple continual learning benchmarks, Soft-TF achieves state-of-the-art performance, consistently outperforming prompt-based, adapter-based, and LoRA-style baselines while requiring minimal additional parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Soft-Transformer，通过可学习的乘法掩码和双提示机制实现参数高效的持续学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习面临灾难性遗忘问题，现有方法依赖人工设计的提示或适配器，参数效率低且适应性不足。本文旨在利用预训练Transformer的丰富先验，通过轻量级微调实现稳定的任务适应和知识保留。
light_analysis.method: 基于冻结的预训练Transformer，学习任务特定的软实数乘法掩码，应用于自注意力中的键、查询、值和输出投影，实现平滑适应。结合轻量级双提示机制（任务提示和共享提示）增强知识保留，无需额外适配器或手动设计。
light_analysis.result: 在多个持续学习基准上达到最先进性能，一致优于基于提示、适配器和LoRA的基线方法，且所需额外参数最少。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调参数高效性和抗遗忘能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Soft-Transformer为持续学习提供了参数高效的解决方案，通过软掩码和双提示平衡任务适应与知识保留。未来可探索更复杂的掩码学习策略或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: MolReFlect: Towards In-Context Fine-grained Alignments between Molecules and Texts
abstract: Molecule discovery is a pivotal research field, impacting everything from medicine to materials. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in molecular understanding and generation, serving as a bridge between the molecular space and the natural language space, yet the alignment between molecules and their corresponding captions remains a significant challenge. Previous endeavors typically treat molecules as monolithic inputs, lacking an intermediate reasoning process and sacrificing explainability. In this work, we define fine-grained alignments as the precise correspondence between a molecule's sub-structures and the textual phrases that explain their properties. These alignments are crucial for LLMs to understand molecules in a more accurate and explainable manner. Normally, such fine-grained alignments require expert annotation, which is both costly and time-consuming. To allow LLMs to automatically label and learn the fine-grained alignments, we propose MolReFlect, a novel teacher-student framework, where a teacher LLM first generates and refines mappings between caption phrases and SMILES substructures and then explicitly teaches these detailed alignments to a student LLM. Experimental results demonstrate that MolReFlect enables LLMs to significantly outperform previous baselines, achieving the state-of-the-art performance in the molecule-caption translation task. Our codes are available via: https://github.com/phenixace/MolReFlect.
comment: Accepted by TKDE, To appear. Codes are available at: https://github.com/phenixace/MolReFlect

light_analysis.overview: 提出MolReFlect教师-学生框架，自动生成分子子结构与文本短语的细粒度对齐，无需专家标注，在分子-标题翻译任务上达到最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子发现对医药和材料领域至关重要，但现有方法将分子视为整体输入，缺乏中间推理过程，可解释性差。细粒度对齐（子结构与文本精确对应）依赖昂贵专家标注。因此需自动方法提升LLM对分子的可解释理解。
light_analysis.method: MolReFlect采用教师-学生框架：教师LLM首先生成并精炼SMILES子结构与标题短语之间的映射，然后显式地将这些细粒度对齐知识传授给学生LLM。该方法自动完成对齐学习，无需人工标注，并增强了模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在分子-标题翻译任务上，MolReFlect显著优于先前基线方法，达到最先进性能。具体指标摘要未明确提及，但表明在准确率和可解释性上均有提升。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: MolReFlect实现了分子与文本的自动细粒度对齐，提升了LLM在分子理解中的准确性和可解释性，为分子发现提供了高效工具。未来可扩展至其他分子相关任务（如属性预测、生成）。

title: Use of What-if Scenarios to Help Explain Artificial Intelligence Models for Neonatal Health
abstract: Early detection of intrapartum risks enables timely interventions to prevent or mitigate adverse labor outcomes such as cerebral palsy. However, accurate automated systems to support clinical decision-making during delivery are currently lacking. To address this gap, we propose Artificial Intelligence for Modeling and Explaining Neonatal Health (AIMEN), a deep learning framework that predicts adverse labor outcomes from maternal, fetal, obstetrical, and intrapartum factors while providing interpretable reasoning behind its predictions. AIMEN reveals how specific modifications to input variables could alter predicted outcomes, enhancing clinical insight. To address class imbalance and limited sample size, AIMEN employs Conditional Tabular GAN (CTGAN) for data augmentation. This process includes synthetic data generation, and we investigate in detail properties such as relaxing feature bounds for a subset of training points to explore slightly out-of-range physiological values, and applying silhouette-score-based filtering to increase the separability of synthetic samples. AIMEN uses an ensemble of fully connected neural networks for classification and outperforms state-of-the-art models such as XGBoost, TabNet, DANet, and LightGBM, achieving an average F1 score of 0.784 in predicting high-risk deliveries. Moreover, AIMEN generates counterfactual explanations that identify actionable changes involving only two to three attributes on average. Resources: https://github.com/ab9mamun/AIMEN.
comment: Accepted for publication in ACM Transactions on Computing for Healthcare (ACM HEALTH), April 2026. 26 pages, 9 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出 AIMEN 框架，结合 CTGAN 数据增强和反事实解释，预测不良分娩结果并提升模型可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 分娩过程中早期发现风险可及时干预，预防脑瘫等不良结果，但目前缺乏准确的自动化临床决策支持系统。现有方法在数据不平衡和样本量有限的情况下表现不佳，且缺乏可解释性，难以获得临床信任。因此，亟需一种既能准确预测又能提供直观解释的模型。
light_analysis.method: AIMEN 采用 Conditional Tabular GAN (CTGAN) 生成合成数据以缓解类别不平衡和小样本问题，并通过放松特征边界和基于轮廓系数的过滤优化合成样本。使用全连接神经网络集成进行分类。模型通过反事实解释揭示改变输入变量对预测结果的影响，平均仅涉及 2-3 个属性，增强了临床洞察力。
light_analysis.result: 在预测高风险分娩任务中，AIMEN 的平均 F1 分数达到 0.784，优于 XGBoost、TabNet、DANet 和 LightGBM 等基线模型。反事实解释平均仅需修改 2-3 个属性，提供了简洁且可操作的临床建议。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIMEN 成功结合数据增强与可解释 AI，提升了不良分娩预测的准确性和临床可用性。其反事实解释为医生提供了具体的干预方向，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更多特征放松策略或扩展到其他围产期场景。

title: PortraVec: Image-Based Portrait Vectorization with Text-Guided Manipulation
abstract: While portrait sketch generation is a special task in sketch synthesis, most existing methods are pixel-based, limiting their interpretability and editability. With the rise of vector generation techniques, representing sketches using vector elements may provide more flexible manipulation. However, due to the overlapping nature of vector graphics and the coarse detail modeling, existing vectorization methods struggle to capture facial integrity and fine-grained details, and lack semantic control. To address these issues, we propose PortraVec, a framework for converting pixel-based portrait images into vector sketches with text control. Specifically, we propose a two-stage image-guided generation module using Attention-aware Offset Sampling to capture face structure while correcting detail deviations, and a text-guided manipulation module based on Region-based Parameter Freezing to enable local semantic editing while maintaining global consistency. Experiments show that PortraVec achieves superior structural consistency, visual fidelity, and semantic controllability compared to state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PortraVec框架，将人像图像转换为矢量草图，并支持文本引导的局部语义编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有肖像草图生成方法多为像素级，可解释性和可编辑性差；矢量生成技术虽可提供灵活操作，但存在重叠性和细节建模粗糙问题，难以保持面部完整性和细粒度细节，且缺乏语义控制。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段图像引导生成模块，采用注意力感知偏移采样捕捉面部结构并纠正细节偏差；文本引导操作模块基于区域参数冻结，实现局部语义编辑同时保持全局一致性。
light_analysis.result: 与最先进方法相比，PortraVec在结构一致性、视觉保真度和语义可控性上表现更优。摘要未明确给出具体数值指标，但整体性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: PortraVec有效融合矢量化与文本控制，提升草图的可解释性和可编辑性，为人像编辑提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的语义控制或拓展至其他图像类型。

title: BEVal: A Cross-dataset Evaluation Study of BEV Segmentation Models for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Current research in semantic bird's-eye view segmentation for autonomous driving focuses solely on optimizing neural network models using a single dataset, typically nuScenes. This practice leads to the development of highly specialized models that may fail when faced with different environments or sensor setups, a problem known as domain shift. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive cross-dataset evaluation of state-of-the-art BEV segmentation models to assess their performance across different training and testing datasets and setups, as well as different semantic categories. We investigate the influence of different sensors, such as cameras and LiDAR, on the models' ability to generalize to diverse conditions and scenarios. Additionally, we conduct multi-dataset training experiments that improve models' BEV segmentation performance compared to single-dataset training. Our work addresses the gap in evaluating BEV segmentation models under cross-dataset validation. And our findings underscore the importance of enhancing model generalizability and adaptability to ensure more robust and reliable BEV segmentation approaches for autonomous driving applications. The code for this paper available at https://github.com/manueldiaz96/beval .

light_analysis.overview: 对BEV分割模型进行跨数据集评估，发现多数据集训练能提升泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有BEV分割研究仅使用单一数据集（如nuScenes）优化模型，导致模型面对不同环境或传感器设置时性能严重下降，即领域偏移问题。这一问题直接影响自动驾驶系统的可靠性，但目前缺乏跨数据集验证来评估模型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 本文对多种SOTA BEV分割模型进行全面的跨数据集评估，涵盖不同训练/测试数据集、传感器（相机和LiDAR）以及语义类别。通过设计多数据集训练实验，与单数据集训练对比，分析模型在不同条件下的表现。
light_analysis.result: 多数据集训练显著提升了BEV分割性能，优于单数据集训练。实验表明现有模型在跨数据集场景下泛化能力不足，存在明显的领域偏移现象，亟需提高适应性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究填补了BEV分割模型跨数据集验证的空白，强调了增强模型泛化性和适应性的重要性。成果有助于开发更鲁棒的自动驾驶环境感知方案，代码已开源以促进后续研究。

title: TouchAI: Exploring human-AI perceptual alignment in touch through language model representations
abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) behaviour with human intent is critical for future AI. An important yet often overlooked aspect of this alignment is the perceptual alignment. Perceptual modalities like touch are more multifaceted and nuanced compared to other sensory modalities such as vision. This work investigates how well LLMs align with human touch experiences using the "textile hand" task. We created a "Guess What Textile" interaction in which participants were given two textile samples -- a target and a reference -- to handle. Without seeing them, participants described the differences between them to the LLM. Using these descriptions, the LLM attempted to identify the target textile by assessing similarity within its high-dimensional embedding space. Our results suggest that a degree of perceptual alignment exists, however varies significantly among different textile samples. For example, LLM predictions are well aligned for silk satin, but not for cotton denim. Moreover, participants didn't perceive their textile experiences closely matched by the LLM predictions. This is only the first exploration into perceptual alignment around touch, exemplified through textile hand. We discuss possible sources of this alignment variance, and how better human-AI perceptual alignment can benefit future everyday tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 探索大语言模型与人类在触觉感知上的对齐，通过纺织品触摸任务验证对齐程度及差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型的行为对齐人类意图是未来AI的关键，但触觉等感知模态的多面性和细微性常被忽视。现有对齐研究多集中于视觉或语言，缺乏对触觉感知的深入探索。本文以纺织品手感任务为例，研究LLM是否能理解人类对纺织品的触觉描述并准确识别，旨在揭示感知对齐的现状与局限性，为改善人机交互中的触觉理解提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 设计“猜纺织品”交互实验：参与者触摸目标与参考两种纺织样品（如丝绸缎、棉牛仔布），仅通过触觉用语言描述差异给LLM。LLM将描述转化为高维嵌入，通过计算目标与各样本的相似度来识别目标。分析LLM预测与人类选择的匹配程度，评估感知对齐。实验涵盖多种纺织品，以对比不同材质下的对齐效果。
light_analysis.result: LLM在部分纺织品上表现出一定感知对齐，如丝绸缎预测准确率高，但棉牛仔布等材质对齐较差。整体上，参与者普遍认为LLM预测未能紧密匹配他们的触觉体验，表明对齐程度因样本而异。量化结果未给出具体数值，但强调差异显著，暗示触觉感知的多维性导致LLM对某些纹理的编码能力不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次探索大语言模型与人类触觉感知的对齐，证实存在但非一致性的对齐现象。差异可能源自纺织品的物理特性差异或LLM对触觉描述的语义理解偏差。研究为未来改善人机触觉交互（如虚拟试衣、机器人操控）提供方向，需进一步探索对齐机制及多模态融合方法。

title: NUBO: A Transparent Python Package for Bayesian Optimization
abstract: NUBO, short for Newcastle University Bayesian Optimisation, is a Bayesian optimization framework for the optimization of expensive-to-evaluate black-box functions, such as physical experiments and computer simulators. Bayesian optimization is a costefficient optimization strategy that uses surrogate modelling via Gaussian processes to represent an objective function and acquisition functions to guide the selection of candidate points to approximate the global optimum of the objective function. NUBO itself focuses on transparency and user experience to make Bayesian optimization easily accessible to researchers from all disciplines. Clean and understandable code, precise references, and thorough documentation ensure transparency, while user experience is ensured by a modular and flexible design, easy-to-write syntax, and careful selection of Bayesian optimization algorithms. NUBO allows users to tailor Bayesian optimization to their specific problem by writing the optimization loop themselves using the provided building blocks. It supports sequential single-point, parallel multi-point, and asynchronous optimization of bounded, constrained, and/or mixed (discrete and continuous) parameter input spaces. Only algorithms and methods that are extensively tested and validated to perform well are included in NUBO. This ensures that the package remains compact and does not overwhelm the user with an unnecessarily large number of options. The package is written in Python but does not require expert knowledge of Python to optimize your simulators and experiments. NUBO is distributed as open-source software under the BSD 3-Clause license.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NUBO，一个透明易用的Python贝叶斯优化包，用于昂贵黑箱函数优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯优化是优化昂贵黑箱函数的有效策略，但现有工具往往复杂不透明，难以被各领域研究人员使用。NUBO旨在提供透明、用户友好的贝叶斯优化框架，通过清晰代码、精确引用和详尽文档降低使用门槛，让研究者能轻松定制优化流程。
light_analysis.method: NUBO基于高斯过程代理模型和采集函数，支持顺序单点、并行多点及异步优化，处理有界、约束和混合参数空间。其核心设计强调模块化与灵活性，用户可用提供的构建块自行编写优化循环。仅包含经过严格测试和验证的高性能算法，避免冗余选项，确保包精简且易用。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但强调NUBO仅包含经过广泛测试和验证表现良好的算法，确保性能可靠。作为开源软件，它降低了贝叶斯优化的使用复杂性，使非Python专家也能优化模拟器和实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: NUBO以透明性和用户体验为核心，提供简洁、文档齐全的贝叶斯优化工具，有助于跨学科研究者应用该方法。其开源许可（BSD 3-Clause）促进社区贡献，未来可能扩展到更多算法和场景。潜在局限性包括可选算法较少，但这也避免了用户选择困难。

title: Practical exposure correction via compensation
abstract: In computer vision, correcting the exposure level is a fundamental task for enhancing the visual quality of observations with inappropriate lightness. However, existing methodologies tend to be impractical because they lack adaptability to unknown scenes due to restricted modeling patterns and struggle to achieve satisfactory efficiency due to complex computational flows. To tackle these challenges, we establish a new practical exposure corrector (PEC) that excels in both quality and efficiency. Specifically, to overcome the limited expressive power of existing modeling patterns, we build a general model with exposure-sensitive compensation to provide an intuitive modeling perspective. We also design a simple but effective exposure adversarial function to catalyze scene-adaptive compensation. Building on the aforementioned key concepts, we develop a stable and robust iterative shrinkage scheme, avoiding the complex inferences encountered in existing studies. Extensive experimental evaluations across eight challenging datasets showcase the strong adaptability of the developed model to unknown environments. The model offers impressive processing speed, requiring only 0.0009 s to handle a 2K image on a device equipped with a GeForce RTX 2080Ti GPU. Experimental analysis of different downstream vision tasks further verifies the flexibility of the model. The code is available at https://rsliu.tech/PEC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种实用曝光校正器PEC，通过曝光敏感补偿和对抗函数实现高效、自适应的曝光校正。
light_analysis.motivation: 曝光校正是计算机视觉中提升视觉质量的基本任务。现有方法由于建模模式受限而缺乏对未知场景的适应性，且计算流程复杂导致效率低下。需要一种同时兼顾质量和效率的实用方法。
light_analysis.method: 建立实用曝光校正器PEC。首先构建具有曝光敏感补偿的通用模型，提供直观建模视角；然后设计曝光对抗函数催化场景自适应补偿；基于此开发稳定鲁棒的迭代收缩方案，避免复杂推理。
light_analysis.result: 在8个挑战性数据集上实验，PEC对未知环境展现强适应性。处理2K图像仅需0.0009秒（GeForce RTX 2080Ti GPU）。下游视觉任务分析验证了模型灵活性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了PEC，在质量和效率上均表现优异。模型具有强适应性和快速处理能力。代码已开源。未来可探索更多应用。
